name: Voter Action Project
subject: A foundational right at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We MUST stop this bill in the Senate and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before opponents of voting rights in the Senate start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list. Why? Listen to Senator Richard Blumenthal of Connecticut: [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
U.S. Senator Richard Blumenthal speaking against the SAVE Act [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_RB.jpg]
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=8bE2yOKXeCmGhmqHVjkvLDth8MFrc3Nuu7G3H+ttEApOJo/8YK08EHPZVD35Gb3QM3mwZFB7akF4paBD3XHGIVCxgXzUHwgyVx18gaF6qGU=]
The Senate is standing up to stop the SAVE Act in its tracks, folks.
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that this bill is written in a way that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. Here's Colorado Senator Michael Bennet:
U.S. Senator Michael Bennet speaking against the SAVE Act [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/SAVE_MB.jpg]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress -- and in the White House -- favor this bill because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
Please, Team, join these brave Senators today. Fuel our efforts to stop this dangerous legislation with $25 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15.00&tknfa=eg30qpELd0NfDWiOF72RPfEdjPsCfuVYxDbwJW-GCV0=&contactdata=8bE2yOKXeCmGhmqHVjkvLDth8MFrc3Nuu7G3H+ttEApOJo/8YK08EHPZVD35Gb3QM3mwZFB7akF4paBD3XHGIVCxgXzUHwgyVx18gaF6qGU=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&tknfa=eg30qpELd0NfDWiOF72RPfEdjPsCfuVYxDbwJW-GCV0=&contactdata=8bE2yOKXeCmGhmqHVjkvLDth8MFrc3Nuu7G3H+ttEApOJo/8YK08EHPZVD35Gb3QM3mwZFB7akF4paBD3XHGIVCxgXzUHwgyVx18gaF6qGU=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50.00&tknfa=eg30qpELd0NfDWiOF72RPfEdjPsCfuVYxDbwJW-GCV0=&contactdata=8bE2yOKXeCmGhmqHVjkvLDth8MFrc3Nuu7G3H+ttEApOJo/8YK08EHPZVD35Gb3QM3mwZFB7akF4paBD3XHGIVCxgXzUHwgyVx18gaF6qGU=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100.00&tknfa=eg30qpELd0NfDWiOF72RPfEdjPsCfuVYxDbwJW-GCV0=&contactdata=8bE2yOKXeCmGhmqHVjkvLDth8MFrc3Nuu7G3H+ttEApOJo/8YK08EHPZVD35Gb3QM3mwZFB7akF4paBD3XHGIVCxgXzUHwgyVx18gaF6qGU=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250.00&tknfa=eg30qpELd0NfDWiOF72RPfEdjPsCfuVYxDbwJW-GCV0=&contactdata=8bE2yOKXeCmGhmqHVjkvLDth8MFrc3Nuu7G3H+ttEApOJo/8YK08EHPZVD35Gb3QM3mwZFB7akF4paBD3XHGIVCxgXzUHwgyVx18gaF6qGU=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=8bE2yOKXeCmGhmqHVjkvLDth8MFrc3Nuu7G3H+ttEApOJo/8YK08EHPZVD35Gb3QM3mwZFB7akF4paBD3XHGIVCxgXzUHwgyVx18gaF6qGU=]
We know the SAVE Act was fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights to be in place before the next election, folks. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law.
If you missed it: This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register, either a passport or a birth certificate that matches their current first and last name -- something millions of eligible American women don’t have. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise anywhere from 11 million to 65 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
“ There’s never been an attack on voting rights out of Congress like this ,” said Alexander Keyssar, a professor of History and Social Policy at the Harvard Kennedy School, and a leading historian of voting rights. “ It’s always been the federal government trying to keep states in check on voting rights, for the most part. ”
The consequences of a bill like this passing would be simply catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=8bE2yOKXeCmGhmqHVjkvLDth8MFrc3Nuu7G3H+ttEApOJo/8YK08EHPZVD35Gb3QM3mwZFB7akF4paBD3XHGIVCxgXzUHwgyVx18gaF6qGU= [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=8bE2yOKXeCmGhmqHVjkvLDth8MFrc3Nuu7G3H+ttEApOJo/8YK08EHPZVD35Gb3QM3mwZFB7akF4paBD3XHGIVCxgXzUHwgyVx18gaF6qGU=]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=8bE2yOKXeCmGhmqHVjkvLDth8MFrc3Nuu7G3H+ttEApOJo/8YK08EHPZVD35Gb3QM3mwZFB7akF4paBD3XHGIVCxgXzUHwgyVx18gaF6qGU=]

A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=13l2cTGceYFL2zJJOO3%2FPmMjFSbnuh9s0RBa1kKh31crF%2BXbaW4i4emZhOqxsSxPmmSqsazTc0urvOKszRpwUC7GZn3ifguWOGQyspB3PViz5AphUCczCgEe47GUs9xzIAdZfBDHXvAxQ4yrRZsuADqPQQm%2BhGuxMzDQ7Qev6sa5RHEKlOoEkuL4ph33U8CkmBZpa69w7bNMxdps1MMSlmiVpEieGgPwNQcz7tpiKpFT5zThQxHcaLIb32dxDgyGOVEnKfL2Il0H9xe%2FkkIvXx8YE89ZY7oBipbyCFiRr7seewANSOVhZ%2BvLvouhab2Klkd181KR2UbS%2BlU69siS5k3UVuQ7PBXW0n1q6f6MLUxdd6me8mIu9HiGD8BiV4m8KNDuHEIqU06zIQtlksQZtpe%2FL45PlEK4j0n7B8Nr%2Fbk%3D .

subject: They hate what I’m doing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Washington’s a different kind of warzone—high stakes, relentless battles, and no shortage of enemies. But I’m no stranger to tough fights. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5af501acafbc41f09ff4459c37357d23&_e=_0V9X-zobh6aJ0IaopHOMboHxX8vTLCjAjWa80jcoFn5D2akW7qPeoDYdueT2-sb4-X7Dfmsdk7HpZ1R9tRgYuPOup0qkgrQqebRiZPlcZgA_WaoKTLnExJM4R1t9g0AH-WeZFU1rlYL4EG35eUBmH6NhF3iA2lAHIZajXkPIi64gfVkxomX4xS9NsKhyhONP8v068KdPZlVXnjkUN7kOEcRr1S1bIv7AFKFhA4lctoKYvsyXA0Ui9ipqvyx3WBe3ekn33GyVWrO0SupJ-Xdxpy4rU-FWeY0WGEGCjzbi52j6xHyLn9ji7lB1h6ptDghmNzC-KN6wKmYbvZDIQBKaAeZGzN3Zc-_FUen3QFf95Kj-Q4KfqL66s4GFJTyAjFa0M_EPxXPmPpdlRYD5vsuRQ%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

The biased hacks at Politico have decided to take aim at me, a Navy SEAL, for daring to shake up their cozy DC bubble.

I came to Congress with a mission: to serve our nation as fiercely as I did on the battlefield. As a SEAL, I learned to confront threats head-on, and that’s precisely what I’m doing against the entrenched elites and corrupt insiders running our government into the ground. But the liberal media, desperate to protect their cronies, smeared me for my resolve to drain the Swamp.

I’m Sen. Tim Sheehy, and _**I’m fighting to dismantle the status quo, but I’m up against a ruthless coalition of fake news outlets, spineless RINOs, and vengeful Democrats.**_

Peter, _**[I need your support to stay in this fight and keep the pressure on those who would rather live in a dystopian, egalitarian society than the free and great nation our forefathers have spent the last 300 years building.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5af501acafbc41f09ff4459c37357d23&_e=_0V9X-zobh6aJ0IaopHOMboHxX8vTLCjAjWa80jcoFn5D2akW7qPeoDYdueT2-sb4-X7Dfmsdk7HpZ1R9tRgYuPOup0qkgrQqebRiZPlcZgA_WaoKTLnExJM4R1t9g0AH-WeZFU1rlYL4EG35eUBmH6NhF3iA2lAHIZajXkPIi64gfVkxomX4xS9NsKhyhONP8v068KdPZlVXnjkUN7kOEcRr1S1bIv7AFKFhA4lctoKYvsyXA0Ui9ipqvyx3WBefKfQYowg4kGpuZw1AUmIzNvsAJNgrQRDoE2O6A7CuvJ7Ma0U4UsKiB1kocFqGCTMvEYC5Nj1tFGlhReGRuEwm1G2mOmpV969tmPQkF7CvTaO15X86QnQTebv_S-hfYedyY51ym9mk7B4fKtK9GgUAQ%3D%3D)**_

[**Chip in $10 to aid me in my fight**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5af501acafbc41f09ff4459c37357d23&_e=_0V9X-zobh6aJ0IaopHOMboHxX8vTLCjAjWa80jcoFn5D2akW7qPeoDYdueT2-sb4-X7Dfmsdk7HpZ1R9tRgYuPOup0qkgrQqebRiZPlcZgA_WaoKTLnExJM4R1t9g0AH-WeZFU1rlYL4EG35eUBmH6NhF3iA2lAHIZajXkPIi64gfVkxomX4xS9NsKhyhONP8v068KdPZlVXnjkUN7kOEcRr1S1bIv7AFKFhA4lctoKYvsyXA0Ui9ipqvyx3WBeqwZhkGjp3DCwUJ6rxmCz9pMh4Ylhlwjh8Ixc-tWegajc2qV7mEWoQovbif5HFMyeyaEdQJSiXk5s32XIh9dc-E0T9XYNT3IsF1kXjHryZceTFzj4d-w7mtE7fJzMxtlPr_E5NoZbWRNZkwOsgNnCFw%3D%3D)
The mainstream, liberal media attacks me for my SEAL mindset—the unyielding drive to complete the mission. They ridicule my loyalty to President Trump’s America First agenda, which dares to put our country back on top. _**They hate that I’m exposing the waste and fraud in our government, now laid bare by Trump’s DOGE initiative.**_

But here’s the truth: they’re terrified because YOU elected me and President Trump to upend their corrupt system.

Let’s be clear: Politico’s hit job is a calculated move to shut me down. If they can muzzle me, they’ll come for you next. I’m holding the line, but I need your help to fuel this battle for America’s future:

[**Chip in $10 to aid me in my fight**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=5af501acafbc41f09ff4459c37357d23&_e=_0V9X-zobh6aJ0IaopHOMboHxX8vTLCjAjWa80jcoFn5D2akW7qPeoDYdueT2-sb4-X7Dfmsdk7HpZ1R9tRgYuPOup0qkgrQqebRiZPlcZgA_WaoKTLnExJM4R1t9g0AH-WeZFU1rlYL4EG35eUBmH6NhF3iA2lAHIZajXkPIi64gfVkxomX4xS9NsKhyhONP8v068KdPZlVXnjkUN7kOEcRr1S1bIv7AFKFhA4lctoKYvsyXA0Ui9ipqvyx3WBeFzBeAn-gdJeCEMmxUalmjxk81UNWtEqokjv1zDqKu10lW1WcTlzouM09ZXu35aotQHyjVyJE1_qQTJ22z8EXLi4RCrkXB8TVNhtzhSFpilosmkTHT-XQ1cWiH0N-iEOsUvvo6yftysPEcjRkAkK-Ig%3D%3D)
I appreciate your continued assistance. ****

I appreciate your assistance,
Tim Sheehy
U.S. Senator - Montana

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Dems are softer than cotton candy in the rain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
That’s why we can’t let them win again

Fellow Patriot, I've never been one to hold my tongue, and I don't plan on starting today, so let me lay this out for you:

_Four years is all it took for Joe Biden and Washington Democrats to:_

**[🔴 Bring on record inflation
🔴 Push a radical Marxist agenda onto American citizens
🔴 Give away our cities, neighborhoods, and jobs to illegals](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=37c9677dba6143808e6c5ae0e2480431&_e=gehQOb6lBCFNXLMkBChUe6LE3Lrug8DAW40wC-LeJbXz59zgU9jhCV_1bT1EY1FxNhVguLEfChnFOxmA35Lv9BtcDGjeLxzafPEN_uFuINQ2Dmtw1eZsNCIcR_GA4ZQHZuKzL8GGe7RmI5k7oYKWuV0YhztUoYC0bphZu1cVLiKlt9OKuMy7oYK5CTY0QB3euBxjHXNYUrMLv8svZGulvAA4qguqmaoZWzq8oip8LUQkwHymTUPwVd8wZyWR4mjodsBh32n-oZjjbzLcDNZNwRzvWlwhmgWdfeIBmft1lIuc7bDM470Pt_eUUY6SHARIuak0XlVD6FAdVm_8jHJwiNq-I158vZq-fT8sCHpkIWhqLjj7Z72M6j4SDbjo2KHNGNIQ_5KyIPhdTci6V3vPUWamwVkSsON24u81vvoBcpOOuPn8XIJbBmdobjOiHXqBS2YQ8xdjp172Xc_5Qr4mRrfdfT7sNedfkOQKgpn4HtXKxLJVlHlREN6PUCuMf9O3)**

President Trump and Senate Republicans haven't been in charge long enough to warm up the seats, yet we've already reversed years of damage done by Biden and the left. That tells me one thing: _**[Democrats are softer than cotton candy in the rain.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=37c9677dba6143808e6c5ae0e2480431&_e=gehQOb6lBCFNXLMkBChUe6LE3Lrug8DAW40wC-LeJbXz59zgU9jhCV_1bT1EY1FxNhVguLEfChnFOxmA35Lv9BtcDGjeLxzafPEN_uFuINQ2Dmtw1eZsNCIcR_GA4ZQHZuKzL8GGe7RmI5k7oYKWuV0YhztUoYC0bphZu1cVLiKlt9OKuMy7oYK5CTY0QB3euBxjHXNYUrMLv8svZGulvAA4qguqmaoZWzq8oip8LUQkwHymTUPwVd8wZyWR4mjodsBh32n-oZjjbzLcDNZNwRzvWlwhmgWdfeIBmft1lIuc7bDM470Pt_eUUY6SHARIuak0XlVD6FAdVm_8jHJwiNq-I158vZq-fT8sCHpkIWg4d7lKR5PnqwpWmSwY8ImYSPe668p1piuchblaHy8WFS3n9TWvyVD7goJtV3SWQ0uaiPM8nEQ2SxOPUKPIiQoTBIFRVIMYee_5kR9_5Df3PF0HNFn_yH2HLrFIZ_sYzRVdQyVawJtMzmWQx1X8Q33g)**_

Fellow Patriot, we have a true opportunity to secure a generational change in America, but Schumer and his cronies are already fundraising harder than ever before to crush us in the midterms. _**[I need to know whether or not I can count on you to help make sure the Democrats' dreams of crushing us don't become a reality.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=37c9677dba6143808e6c5ae0e2480431&_e=gehQOb6lBCFNXLMkBChUe6LE3Lrug8DAW40wC-LeJbXz59zgU9jhCV_1bT1EY1FxNhVguLEfChnFOxmA35Lv9BtcDGjeLxzafPEN_uFuINQ2Dmtw1eZsNCIcR_GA4ZQHZuKzL8GGe7RmI5k7oYKWuV0YhztUoYC0bphZu1cVLiKlt9OKuMy7oYK5CTY0QB3euBxjHXNYUrMLv8svZGulvAA4qguqmaoZWzq8oip8LUQkwHymTUPwVd8wZyWR4mjodsBh32n-oZjjbzLcDNZNwRzvWlwhmgWdfeIBmft1lIuc7bDM470Pt_eUUY6SHARIuak0XlVD6FAdVm_8jHJwiNq-I158vZq-fT8sCHpkIWhwWHnhKCBTQGOurIbLU6scuYbLMTDujxDv9zJ0HnJGprCoSMEx5y9X7ddMk99iW9jAnHa6muUmOZos2KXBM74hDbCAVu4rvpq8vOqxEw_HNbhpWZpYkRsRBEcMpd5BSQgobaAao0jH8ZD7C12ew9en)**_

**[CHIP IN NOW](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=37c9677dba6143808e6c5ae0e2480431&_e=gehQOb6lBCFNXLMkBChUe6LE3Lrug8DAW40wC-LeJbXz59zgU9jhCV_1bT1EY1FxNhVguLEfChnFOxmA35Lv9BtcDGjeLxzafPEN_uFuINQ2Dmtw1eZsNCIcR_GA4ZQHZuKzL8GGe7RmI5k7oYKWuV0YhztUoYC0bphZu1cVLiKlt9OKuMy7oYK5CTY0QB3euBxjHXNYUrMLv8svZGulvAA4qguqmaoZWzq8oip8LUQkwHymTUPwVd8wZyWR4mjodsBh32n-oZjjbzLcDNZNwRzvWlwhmgWdfeIBmft1lIuc7bDM470Pt_eUUY6SHARIuak0XlVD6FAdVm_8jHJwiNq-I158vZq-fT8sCHpkIWgsmEXAFy6NAnLPbgT_DaU5mJ7vSiQH5FTshpgPLkNUfJNCoqP9JRRRFXyJPj7EbW8Lps5-lZzWas2ZIFxfoC3ZelbLm86LdaNSwfZHOs7XY20dq0siZv7raqzEYuf6x0XHHOP9jzxja_4x0eFq21nN)**

You didn't hang us out to dry in 2024, Fellow Patriot, so I have all the faith in the world that I can count on you to come through for us again.

Thank you and God Bless,

clean_body: That’s why we can’t let them win again Fellow Patriot, I've never been one to hold my tongue, and I don't plan on starting today, so let me lay this out for you: Four years is all it took for Joe Biden and Washington Democrats to: President Trump and Senate Republicans haven't been in charge long enough to warm up the seats, yet we've already reversed years of damage done by Biden and the left. That tells me one thing: Fellow Patriot, we have a true opportunity to secure a generational change in America, but Schumer and his cronies are already fundraising harder than ever before to crush us in the midterms. You didn't hang us out to dry in 2024, Fellow Patriot, so I have all the faith in the world that I can count on you to come through for us again. Thank you and God Bless, Senator John Kennedy If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Marlene is the courageous leader Arizonan families need to represent them in Congress. When I was in office, I worked hard to fight for common sense gun safety and better economic opportunities for Arizonans.
I trust Marlene to do the same.
**As a former broadcast journalist, Marlene is battle-tested at holding powerful people accountable when it’s easier to look the other way.** That’s why it is crucial we send Marlene to Washington D.C. We have to elect new leadership that will put Arizonan families first and party politics second.
It is clear that David Schweikert lacks integrity. And when our leadership is compromised, it is Arizonan families that suffer the most. name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: I’m running to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us
body:
Lauren Boebert has failed the families in my hometown. I’m running to defeat her.
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89884?t=6&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J) Hello, my name is Trisha Calvarese (D), and the Voter Protection project let me know I could reach out. I just launched my campaign for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown.

**In a second, I want to tell you a little more about myself and why I’m in this race. But first, I need you to know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to take back the House.** [**So if you’re ready to join our movement, please split $10 or more now between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to defeat Boebert and build a better future for Colorado.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89885?t=7&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J)

My story begins in the rural Eastern Plains. My dad was a dedicated civil servant, and my mom was a child-care provider. From the beginning, they’ve been my models of what servant leadership means.

When they both became terminally ill with cancer less than two years ago, I returned home to provide end-of-life care for them. It was the toughest thing I’ve ever done.

It opened my eyes to how broken our systems are – and I couldn’t believe that our members of Congress weren’t doing more to fix them. **So that’s what I’m doing: I’m running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in my hometown.**

That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home.

I know the road ahead won’t be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us. But if there’s anything I’ve learned from growing up in Colorado, it’s this: There are things money can’t buy, greed can’t steal, and corruption can’t crush. It's us. We the people. This is our seat.

**So, friend, I’m asking you to join our movement today:** [**Will you please split $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to defeat Lauren Boebert, take back the House for Democrats and give working families the voice they deserve in Congress?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89885?t=8&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Trisha Calvarese and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89886?t=9&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89887?t=10&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89888?t=11&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89889?t=12&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89890?t=13&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J)
Thank you for your early support. There’s a lot of work ahead of us, but I’m so grateful to have you by my side. Together, I know we can win this thing.

Trisha Calvarese

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19767%2E878179%2Eq-kS0J) to request fewer emails. clean_body: Lauren Boebert has failed the families in my hometown. I’m running to defeat her. | Hello, my name is Trisha Calvarese (D), and the Voter Protection project let me know I could reach out. I just launched my campaign for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown. In a second, I want to tell you a little more about myself and why I’m in this race. But first, I need you to know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to take back the House. My story begins in the rural Eastern Plains. My dad was a dedicated civil servant, and my mom was a child-care provider. From the beginning, they’ve been my models of what servant leadership means. When they both became terminally ill with cancer less than two years ago, I returned home to provide end-of-life care for them. It was the toughest thing I’ve ever done. It opened my eyes to how broken our systems are – and I couldn’t believe that our members of Congress weren’t doing more to fix them. So that’s what I’m doing: I’m running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in my hometown. That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home. I know the road ahead won’t be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us. But if there’s anything I’ve learned from growing up in Colorado, it’s this: There are things money can’t buy, greed can’t steal, and corruption can’t crush. It's us. We the people. This is our seat. So, friend, I’m asking you to join our movement today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Trisha Calvarese and VPP will go through immediately: | Thank you for your early support. There’s a lot of work ahead of us, but I’m so grateful to have you by my side. Together, I know we can win this thing. Trisha Calvarese | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. subject: Honoring 169 Years of San Mateo County – Join the Celebration and Unveiling
body:
You're Invited: San Mateo County's 169th Anniversary & 500 County Center Dedication | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=c0babbc643&u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1f907694a1)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### Join us:

**May 15th, 2025 in Redwood City**
---
| | |
---
| | | |

**Celebrating Our Story**

San Mateo County and the San Mateo County History Museum cordially invite you to attend the 169th Anniversary of San Mateo County and the Dedication and Unveiling Ceremony for 500 County Center.

**_Schedule_**
_**5:00 p.m.:**_
Gather at the San Mateo County History Museum (2200 Broadway, Redwood City) for a program exploring the County's start with reenactors and live music.

_**5:30 p.m.:**_
Procession led by the **[Woodside High School marching band](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=8259b8883d&e=c0babbc643)** to 500 County Center for Dedication and Unveiling of the new building.

_**6:00 p.m.:**_
• Enjoy a short video of the building and explore the lobby and board chambers.
• Explore the county's past with kids' crafts.
• Live music by DJ John Beaver

Thursday,
May 15, 2025
FREE Event Parking at the San Mateo County Jury Parking Garage
(400 Middlefield Road, Redwood City)

Kindly RSVP by May 12, 2025.
bmurdock@smcgov.org or 650-363-4572
[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=c5c6e4e6eb&e=c0babbc643)
In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors

[A post shared by David Canepa (@davidcanepa)](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=83dddd5810&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | |
---

These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

| | Friend, What would you do if your child or grandchild was bullied in front of his classmates -- not just by other kids, but also by the school principal and teachers? That's what happened to Brooks Warden when he was in middle school in Austin, Texas. Over the course of three years, Brooks was taunted, threatened, and harassed by students and staff -- simply because he wore a MAGA hat on a field trip. And instead of stepping in to stop it, the teachers and administrators joined in**.** One teacher called him "Whitey" in class. His classmates regurgitated the media's lies about Trump supporters. Students called Brooks a "racist," a "Nazi," and even accused of being in the Ku Klux Klan. Another student beat up Brooks at school. Even the **principal** joined in by pulling earbuds out of Brooks’s ear and asking him if he was listening to "Dixie." This isn't just bullying -- it's racial and political discrimination, and the school participated in it. **[That's why the Center for American Liberty stepped in and is bringing Brooks Warden's fight for justice to the Supreme Court.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuYHMjI3JgUMIIara7SFtt90TMv5IvMKBNU5Q_n1FFOViyc88mnde6afB2XtFRE0Azk7PBIDglgB8fSw-XD_990P6RofP9Kv46fk6hd1TvcFLviiJ-3_ftrf6PM4oxj_6Y1pu-UuP98m85GdoZrx0w0pFk-gKraYsMVUuWMHLgiFPzhVXYDa4EaAs9NbmXPZoNgw0LwEl2MRVQIFTTgUFDjnLNHKmCypQotUsLwijj5xMehOckvkcFxnCOPpMjT4ZqnOM0_w4rCXQyovRY8wG15sQ78pcognZGE4EWptb3OQ9TSUt-5RxJtJeKUzLDbOal0i5Ldcl2F6j7-bxGpQh2NTNIT3u3wkUK_ZGu6sn2OzfniSasP6XkD-Bkn6S7nQh2Dy6MSi7ujl0u3b7o6v_7rrj_r379Xt7TNcnCZWeFjcMbi4EYfT0KLtWu1XwPwAA__-dTI9c)** This wasn't just a single bad day... **_...it was three years of targeted abuse._** When the Warden family asked the school for help, they were ignored. So the Center for American Liberty stepped in. We filed a lawsuit on behalf of Brooks Warden against the Austin Independent School District, arguing that the school violated Title VI of the Civil Rights Act by allowing racially motivated harassment to go unchecked. But when the case went to federal court, the judge dismissed it -- claiming the bullying was "primarily political," and the racial discrimination Brooks suffered wasn't "severe or pervasive" enough. Think about that: A student was called “Whitey” by teacher, beaten up and bullied by his classmates, and publicly humiliated by a principal, and a federal court says it doesn't count because the politics were louder than the racism. We refused to accept that. We appealed to the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals, which en banc split 9–9. Now, we've filed a petition for certiorari with the U.S. Supreme Court to make one thing absolutely clear: **Racial harassment in public schools is unconstitutional -- whether it targets a student who is white, Black, Hispanic, conservative, liberal, or anything else.** But Friend, taking a case to the Supreme Court is incredibly expensive. And we're up against a well-funded school district... The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. We don't take a dime of government funding. We rely entirely on generous patriots like you who believe no child should be harassed for their conservative beliefs or race. **[Will you chip in $35, $50, or even $100 to help us bring Brooks Warden's case to the highest court in the land?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuYHMjI3JgUMIIara7SFtt90TMv5IvMKBNU5Q_n1FFOViyc88mnde6afB2XtFRE0Azk7PBIDglgB8fSw-XD_990P6RofP9Kv46fk6hd1TvcFLviiJ-3_ftrf6PM4oxj_6Y1pu-UuP98m85GdoZrx0w0pFk-gKraYsMVUuWMHLgiFPzhVXYDa4EaAs9NbmXPZoNgw0LwEl2MRVQIFTTgUFDjnLNHKmCypQotUsLwijj5xMehOckvkcFxnCOPpMjT4ZqnOM0_w4rCXQyovRY8wG15sQ78pcognZGE4EWptb3OQ9TSUt-5RxJtJeKUzLDbOal0i5Ldcl2F6j7-bxGpQh2NTNIT3u3wkUK_ZGu6sn2OzfniSasP6XkD-Bkn6S7nQh2Dy6MSi7ujl0u3b7o6v_7rrj_r379Xt7TNcnCZWeFjcMbi4EYfT0KLtWu1XwPwAA__-dTI9c)** We're not just fighting for Brooks -- we're fighting for every student whose rights have been ignored because they don't fit the Left's narrative. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Call today! Ed Martin’s confirmation isn’t certain!
body:
Without pressure from you, Ed Martin may not be confirmed as the next U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** It's imperative that Ed Martin be confirmed as the U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia to help turn the tide of the American justice system back to neutral, and no longer allow it to be weaponized against conservatives. We need your help to get Ed Martin's nomination out of committee quickly and to start encouraging certain Senators to vote for him if/when there is a floor vote.
Ed is more than qualified for this position, being a seasoned legal veteran who stands up for the constitution and the rights of all Americans. He is a man of integrity and principles and has a vast amount of experience navigating complex legal challenges, while also ensuring that government power remains within its set boundaries.
Here's how you can help - **please note we want to be kind and courteous in our request of the Senators** :
**Call Senator Grassley********(202-224-3744)** and ask that he...
> **_...move Ed quickly through the House Judiciary Committee to be presented to the Senate for a formal confirmation._**
**
****Call Senator Tillis****(202-224-6342)** and ask him...
> **_...to reconsider his opposition to Ed Martin and to please vote yes on his confirmation in committee and on the floor._**
**
****Call Senator Murkowski****(202-224-6665)** and ask that she...
> **_...support Ed Martin for U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia._**
**
****Call Senator Collin****s (202-224-2523)** and ask that she...
> **_...support Ed Martin for U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia._**

This is a quick, urgent request in order to create a groundswell of support for Ed Martin to be confirmed as the next U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. ******************************** __ **__** **** ************
---
| **** ************ Thank you! ******
**In liberty,
Jenny Beth**** __ **__** **** ************
---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations?

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpv4n2kp8gbc9kihl9i88ca1h6t4pkq9ulkdc610_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdi64o31c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zajd68irnj9n4tj28qskiuje83nrh8g988iuhmdo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdi64o31c5h2bs)**_ [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zglrq96av6f5aali1s9nod642btpl56vggekn180_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdi64o31c5h2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr68qitims2j6eguhscoj52q22m4tcdds555uc0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdi64o31c5h2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsq1oure7oeu7j0akkkctf891odo95ts0ialk8eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdi64o31c5h2bs)**_
---

Pop Acta Media | ICYMI News
---

name: Republican Senate Majority HQ
subject: Help shape our 2026 Senate Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
You helped us win — now help us govern

Friend,

President Trump announced Tuesday that [Iran-backed Houthi militants in Yemen had “capitulated”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnDAQhZ_GdLMyw8U_hYs0dH_alMheD-DEF2QPu-LtI1Z5gzSnOdKnc75f38u38cGn7aeJpHnNS6J3DcRMZdnzybuvXPwfqpRcOJMp7CMtKHEAOYBUizM-XEvfOL0SIXUN6Vb149hip6Zm160xU6do-DK2Rat655RxY4-WBnLWDI3XN00OUrVSjq16TPZJdp1Gi25SXx2KXpLznMvjd_aJd1rDlV9UHs8cm6B35qOK7ofAWeCcriNXviuB8w0WOMtPjALns8L9T-DM5YwHVHNVOCu8fQhQOR9gc7Q-bXBRpFThnwJ4BuNjBd7pApcTw9skBs6w-m1nMOmKuZDAuSnaHTfO11GJXm7R-PBZyv-l96XxbwAAAP__w6qRTw) and agreed to stop targeting U.S. ships in the Red Sea.

# Wednesday, May 7, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1789, [the first inaugural ball](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAQRb8GMy1sEcaA4CVm89INLRzaoXcRLGzH9e-3Zn9h81v31Dkf9-nuKFJ6_ncrWl7ylPDcIzJjmUI-ONDOhb5wx-TjkVxhWnECCX0t-1qayTuK16QqbxdEwK5C2xqldQudGapgEfHhNcxqQey61ikDWhvUs775BVBVZN9vspemlVK3phnmB87LoGfwg7l1IJRET5xL85kpccAlXvmFpXnktYo2MG-76P4JGAWM53k2nL27aMlH8vng90zASMnjd7OFTcAIslUCRtkLGL276rdkLle9uqs2HASMVbF-OylG2rURSj5XR_EXyH-q9LLwEwAA___f8Xwm) was held in New York City to celebrate the swearing-in of President George Washington. Washington attended the gala solo but was happy nonetheless to dance the minuet with “dignity and gravity.” A story in today's _Et Cetera_ offers a masterclass in why you probably [shouldn’t let a second grader play with your unlocked phone](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAQBeCnwR3WeLBNKCi2cZdtt7T4GcfsYoiAxMrbr3yL-wK3mGmO9B3p_LmvdxNiSI_f5iDdtrwmOmuk1qise361PdRWwj-qlHx8JVNaOGhFwInDxEGu3oT4WcfO640ISXSkBznO84BCqm7Xg3VWCWkmaUAo5cjeNlI4G3DOChy7oC8NJpADwDzIXllHdlOzRa_kTSAbgXxoufR_c0htpy1-8ptK7_LRRb239qxM_GK4MFzO8-xP295XyHC5aIYLfD9Mnj-K8VS4cS54Ss3E-OG5eCqVXy6XAADcv47rKsOlK9o_zxBjqLNkIzwOE-JXffvRZm-N_wMAAP__Z-J_Nw)—unless you're craving 70,000 lollipops on your doorstep. We're flying today with [IotaComm](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkE3O2yAQQE-Dd7YwGAgLFpWi7NJtlwibcTwtPxbgRLl95bT6LvBt5z3NjN6vu707DJgeP10E09ZsE7xqgNag2C0fbcPaCv6BCsmHI7nSMIJllImeip4q6x2Gt506b1YABrwDM6pJypFxpbvNgJZaSwETd1xRWL0AqYRSXM7O6dl3aM5tVFA1UipHNeh5gXnVcmZeqwtnZKLgseUy_M6Y2gZreOcnlGHJsQtma22vhP8g7EbYDdMTahswN7fkGE_nBPx2tGhrPsoChF8hOgyEyXMYweMRCb_uDn2_u9ISlLrh_p8vLu4OH-ljfMHxQnsuuP0XgY1KUqm4Frorxu8vDAGrVGSij_PU59X2rb5Pw_4GAAD__73cj2Y) with a 1.5 trillion market opportunity you'll want to hear about.

## Judge Orders Entry for 12,000 Refugees
A federal judge has ordered the Trump administration [to admit 12,000 refugees previously approved for entry](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO4zAQBU8jZTKoFj9WwGATZd50Q4EWm2bv8GNQLRu-_UBzhYnfQwFV_27rzVGi8vjrMloOdS343hMyY1tjPTjSzo2-cMfi01FcY8q4ggA1CDUIs3pH6bPK3tuACDj1aEcjtR5hMnMfrdzQI6Bym5HjqMK2zaPRGpwKwnk_9WRPmlDCjELo0Vzm-4b3MOs7-NlcJ-ikQE9c2-V_pcIRQ_rUF7bLVnOfbGR-7t30p4Olg4UjRkrp3DpYYs14CnWwKLjKqzQDtyM_B-czlVPNMdUy1Oax7UPDcDwQz3vfrH--KSXatemkeGRHP9Sef5XpZeE7AAD__8JJfds), rejecting a narrow reading of who qualifies. The ruling reverses President Trump’s Jan. 20 executive order, which paused the U.S. Refugee Assistance Program and limited entries to those en route by early February. Biden-appointed Judge Jamal Whitehead decried the [administration’s interpretation of an appeals court ruling](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkb-SnDAMxp8GOt0Y88dQUKTZ7tKmZAQWWBtjM7ZYcm-fYW_yBKk080n6pJ_063P6RPYctp-40yhrnAJd2ZMIpcnFUxxnSfybMgXrz4BJeKdJK92CakGZySL7r6kp7bgSaapLGivTdF2lazOUbpwHPaxzPfd9Wxs0a9MrW7daV4g9kVlKHm831SpTKdVV5mOYF5rXoZu1HUxf66JRZFli-nhGDuJo9V_xReljiXvpRydy5KL-UehHoR_LnCt9Zwr9uFHugMIxwBWTt4V-2DfRIvA87UbwxB09XI6FHKGFTCjiCS7MjsMmMUBMllKGI1FmS0HAxoDegqRzPwDtzuH2_B4j8a0IVFopBYnWcyPKYCkfLAQOvZD9p79rc74bjxS3hDuEmxEWTsvJAks8k0BcAY-D0GegP7Scwi_6XqtMoz0u9p5zZ4pGbTuyf19G_uudr1H_DQAA__9-hL4c) in the case, and affirmed that all refugees with confirmed travel plans before Jan. 20 are protected.
## Trump Halts Strikes as Houthis Back Down
President Trump announced Tuesday that [Iran-backed Houthi militants in Yemen had “capitulated”](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOnDAQhZ_GdLMyw8U_hYs0dH_alMheD-DEF2QPu-LtI1Z5gzSnOdKnc75f38u38cGn7aeJpHnNS6J3DcRMZdnzybuvXPwfqpRcOJMp7CMtKHEAOYBUizM-XEvfOL0SIXUN6Vb149hip6Zm160xU6do-DK2Rat655RxY4-WBnLWDI3XN00OUrVSjq16TPZJdp1Gi25SXx2KXpLznMvjd_aJd1rDlV9UHs8cm6B35qOK7ofAWeCcriNXviuB8w0WOMtPjALns8L9T-DM5YwHVHNVOCu8fQhQOR9gc7Q-bXBRpFThnwJ4BuNjBd7pApcTw9skBs6w-m1nMOmKuZDAuSnaHTfO11GJXm7R-PBZyv-l96XxbwAAAP__w6qRTw) and agreed to stop targeting U.S. ships in the Red Sea. The decision caps a two-month campaign, dubbed Operation Rough Rider, that struck over 800 targets and cut [Houthi missile and drone launches by 69%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OtCAYRq8GOw2CghYUX_LFbrbd0oC8Krv8GHgZM3e_mb2FrZ_kOTnn87E-tPMuHh86gMI9rRHu4gER8nqmiqcrmN03FIjW16gzugAro2xs6dhSuVrt_GsdGqt2AAa8AdXLQYiecTk3p9ph5IKDmceJGT3MUsBuB2MlCAnTpBun3m90pLKnVPSym80GZp-FYXaWE2dkoGAdptx9JRfxhN2_0hNyt6XQeHUiXoXwf4QthC33fXcvfab0Xglb3jqELZhruFodY6pxg9LW0hZMV2tSMC4ebS8440IMsjsxeMKXo25bqhEhE_6_b7Ky1-28d0VIMtAjaOd_-finaE_FfgIAAP__fl6B-Q). The Houthis’ attacks had disrupted global shipping routes for months, but Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio called the development a win for regional stability. The announcement comes ahead of [Trump’s planned trip to the Middle East](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ygzAQhJ9GdPKI40emUJGGzmlTMid0MpcIRCRhj98-g18h3Rb77XyzX7fphhx4u3_iSqb4OG30zIFKoTQt8SgL55L4hzJtLhwbpsIrTaCgk6qTSk8OObymtnLGEwE1FZlat31fQ6OHajGtJ2875bS1oHqimbDvZn9tdIe1tW3F5lxTndK1Un2tL4Odyfqht-AGfW1AtIocl5gu35G3spAPr_igdJnjWgWzlLJn0XwIGAWMZaGdNt7yEfAXC75bAsZTfA4kYAQQMKr2TAq6E0nHupcoH5y5yDckMx6OJSa0jPJAkj7FVa74knVTJeP2J4fAudeiVfcVObxlyr8efBj4CwAA__9G2IZy) amid hints of a forthcoming “very big” diplomatic reveal.
## REAL ID Requirement Starts Today
As of today, adults flying domestically [must show a REAL ID](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAYRZ8Gd4zw5x_swkUad5s2JcLDZfmyGFbAjDNvH01eIfWVrs45vz7Mh-XI6fOnPbE1n03CVSNaQzEhP1rg2gp_oSK5-Ei2ND5hSNEk1SSVNs5yfJmxc5sHCEOHrdfjPPc06LUL26Jm7bVa1p5oGHEcfuxXspMHLbPvx46395ualO6Vmnt9W487Dr_OB7lVLwOJUcFxy-X2O3NqAT6-8hPlds9nF7fQ2ncVww9Bu6C9BQSO8b0J2kM-8RYStCf8qc0Wc8KxNRcXCNonWiYiki7LV37IBDhpZYGNkp084HOBvOASqrOvKpF8LnecSE06WBc5QQYUVHkF22TL8ivlS9Delc19Xxwj11mLUX2elv9Rde2_Mj83-hsAAP__7WeUFg) or federally approved alternative to clear TSA checkpoints. Most IDs with a star in the corner are compliant, while enhanced IDs from select states also qualify. Homeland Security Secretary [Kristi Noem told Congress](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb8GOkdmMDYuXGyTLttuiYw9hNk3QGRPEuXvn3i_8MqrK13dc_7dplskpv3-N24YZDmmHd-VUQTLtB5PWalKoS-suGd-7rEIbTiBhkHpQWk35Uj8mUybw4II2LcYOmes7aB3vl2D8-AXmwa0GiDOxlkYwI7QpznZuZtbCueaHrTrtLadu_g54bx4O0P2buyhMRozyVEu_w_aZcWFP8cLyyUdW8thFXnUpv_TwLWBa3ycAGd1hiKUGBu4FoysKCsp8YWMpaqK6VlIPipjzEw7qvXYkOOeFYw-jyb3qdPZ28FYcHpZNI4pjtr0ti0hP97ETNW6xuj7Fol_3sivFL4CfAcAAP__VauE0g) that while 81% of Americans already have compliant IDs, those without them can still fly using passports or tribal IDs. TSA has warned that travelers without compliant ID will face delays and secondary screening, especially in states with low compliance, like New Jersey. At Boston's Logan Airport, TSA is [pulling aside travelers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZCDTBnsIHFxCNpdeiAxuD31r7JHdM2j-fsX-wqZVUpXe-3df7o4ipcdfd6DlkJeEZ43IjGXZ84t3qlzoCysmH1_JFaYDF5AwtnJspVm8o_hZhsbbgAioGrS9GbTuQZmp2e2mFBo9DGpz4bb2ymiPIUiJ06bhNoaG7LUmR2l6KXVvumndcA2TXsFP5qZADBI9cS7d_0yJdwzxk99Yui0fTbQ787MK9UfALGA-z7Pb1npRXL2Aec2VcxIwX5mAuaCLLfk25odLraPyzIVbj85HSihgbor1z5NipKqNGOTjcBR_zvhXht4WvgMAAP__Ljp79A) without compliant ID to avoid slowing down the main lines. Passports, military IDs, and other official documents are still accepted, and a REAL ID is not required for everyday activities like driving or voting. See [what’s needed in your state](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFy6yAQgOHTSJ01K4TAFBSvcefXpmRAuzKbIOEBLI1vn0mukAP8_8z3cXd3z4n3x3-_kW1rdjudNVFrVFzMrxa5tsJfVGnH9Np9abyREyDmC8wX0A49p7eTPdqVSNDUkx21VGoUkzZ9tEEiyCVISUDiGjDIeTTGyAVXVFcDPdufG8ygRwA16sGEhcJqVBBo9HUSnQRCbrkMn5n3FmlN73xQGZa89cnG1p61m_514taJ23meA8Y6PPLRiVshny6MfbH4PDklrkp3Eh6b5_Sbtz-ZDyu-AwAA__9QSWtP).

On this day in 1789, was held in New York City to celebrate the swearing-in of President George Washington. Washington attended the gala solo but was happy nonetheless to dance the minuet with “dignity and gravity.” A story in today's Et Cetera offers a masterclass in why you probably —unless you're craving 70,000 lollipops on your doorstep. We're flying today with with a 1.5 trillion market opportunity you'll want to hear about. | Don’t feel like reading The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Judge Orders Entry for 12,000 Refugees A federal judge has ordered the Trump administration , rejecting a narrow reading of who qualifies. The ruling reverses President Trump’s Jan. 20 executive order, which paused the U.S. Refugee Assistance Program and limited entries to those en route by early February. Biden-appointed Judge Jamal Whitehead decried the in the case, and affirmed that all refugees with confirmed travel plans before Jan. 20 are protected. Trump Halts Strikes as Houthis Back Down President Trump announced Tuesday that and agreed to stop targeting U.S. ships in the Red Sea. The decision caps a two-month campaign, dubbed Operation Rough Rider, that struck over 800 targets and cut . The Houthis’ attacks had disrupted global shipping routes for months, but Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio called the development a win for regional stability. The announcement comes ahead of amid hints of a forthcoming “very big” diplomatic reveal. REAL ID Requirement Starts Today As of today, adults flying domestically or federally approved alternative to clear TSA checkpoints. Most IDs with a star in the corner are compliant, while enhanced IDs from select states also qualify. Homeland Security Secretary that while 81% of Americans already have compliant IDs, those without them can still fly using passports or tribal IDs. TSA has warned that travelers without compliant ID will face delays and secondary screening, especially in states with low compliance, like New Jersey. At Boston's Logan Airport, TSA is without compliant ID to avoid slowing down the main lines. Passports, military IDs, and other official documents are still accepted, and a REAL ID is not required for everyday activities like driving or voting. See . name: USAF/ANG Combat Veteran Troy Downing
subject: This might be my last stand.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I’m no stranger to pulling myself up by the bootstraps, but I need your help.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUwN18yTy1ZMS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MzY2NDktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MDdfMk8tWTEuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjM2NjQ5LTI4OTkifQ/p63k_8ZIL2wp3ZXxcbESiw)
---
Peter, I'm about to throw in the towel.

I thought there were more Patriots like you out there who'd be willing to take a stand with me. But the response has been deafening silence.

My name is Troy Downing, and I'm a combat veteran, a Christian, a husband, and a proud dad. I'm also a GOP freshman on a mission to put America First.

**As you know, House Republicans are clinging to a razor-thin majority - just a handful of seats stand between us and the radical Left taking control. And the Democrats will stop at nothing to flip it.**

I'm not looking for a handout or a huge donation. [**I just need a small contribution from Patriots like you to keep my campaign afloat.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUwN18yTy1ZMS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MzY2NDktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MDdfMk8tWTEuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjM2NjQ5LTI4OTkifQ/AhhTmDJFge7oJGl_3QB8oA)
---
[ **RUSH REINFORCEMENTS** ](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUwN18yTy1ZMS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MzY2NDktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MDdfMk8tWTEuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjM2NjQ5LTI4OTkifQ/WrMqeQ05eMwbWTBXS7ng6Q)
---
Every little bit counts, and without it, I'm done.

If I can defend this critical House seat, it'll be a crushing defeat for the radical Left. But I need your help to make it happen.

[**Will you stand with me, Peter, and chip in a few bucks to help a combat vet take down the Democrat machine?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUwN18yTy1ZMS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MzY2NDktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MDdfMk8tWTEuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjM2NjQ5LTI4OTkifQ/z1TGVWduHLBvwuLJowKktA)
---
[ ** SEND HELP NOW ** ](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQwJmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDUwN18yTy1ZMS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MzY2NDktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA1MDdfMk8tWTEuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjM2NjQ5LTI4OTkifQ/PxKRPCRQVELS6TpyE4YaPw)
---
Your support would be a godsend.

Sincerely,Troy Downing
_Conservative Veteran_

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: New Spurs Coach, Murder Suspect Runs, and Cinco de Mayo Babies
body:
Legendary San Antonio Spurs coach Gregg Popovich introduced Mitch Johnson as the team’s next head coach at a press conference on Monday. Popovich continues to recover from a stroke suffered in November, which has kept him off the court for much of the season.

# Wednesday, May 7, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1945, saxophone player and organist [Cornelius Bumpus](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LtugzAUxvGnMVuQ74TBQ1uJLV07Igcfh6MabPkSkrevklfo9n3Lb_j_XOaLxYD77dtuYOrDx3mHowSoFfJ7ppbLEu2ybi07yKWVBMvMKVcnqk50mJ3F8Jxl58yVupF1YNggtWZKj-duNdxrefVSMDtKJxcmHQitQIiRXs9y0R2aF0YVHRijTKje-lE7psdBWCXd4Imk4LDG3NcVKjxs8eEZ75D7JW5dMGutqRDxQfhE-AR7f-AvJnBo-5hvhE-vT_j0FfMOAVuZP9uWWumycenAELDogUh62yyGt1n_V-Ju-F8AAAD__xZ6c70) was born in Dallas. During his career, he toured with notable groups like the Doobie Brothers and Steely Dan. Babies in a Brownsville hospital NICU were dressed up in Cinco de Mayo outfits on Monday. ## Fort Worth ISD Warned of State Intervention
Texas Education Commissioner Mike Morath warned Fort Worth ISD Monday that he was bound by law to address student performance at one of the district’s middle schools that had received a failing accountability rating for [five consecutive years](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0TGO5CAQBdDT4KxaGINpBw42cTabbmgVUNhItLGgPJ65_apnj7BZqb70paf_52P9wJTTsf3GF838Fct60N0yMVP9Oc-rNl_Q76-rBqrtaif5VUllQBqQdg2Y8vequzA7Gaa-o7m3ehx7M07Pbp-d8r01MjqnrfMY1VOZp1Q-opSRvOvS_C6TRtq-l_1gHhinMfTjZAc0OtgotKSQuNQH78T0hS3m7_JJ9eHLq8vzznw2MfwSahFque_7cUfEdyjUgpWTzyTU8sYIteTiMQu1MNaKB4Mv18Hf7wchNDpCg396iKUy3KXyDqkFqLRhDenYoPm9lAyGd2hcMW07w3Wg93QyukxQkdOxCbWopwUzhBjGSQLF4QkabQQ3uh6stlJ7NyBp29U5nHfKObXRCi23F6b8w-P_G-VzVn8DAAD__zcZo0o). The Leadership Academy at Forest Oak's 6th-grade campus [failed to meet state standards](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykULuu4yAQ_RrcEfEwOBQU27i7225pTWCIkQhYgOPk71f2L9xuNOfovP79LD8QU8zPv_BC2z-hLBmPlrB3rNe57bW5Am597dVjbXvb0C2CCUWZomxaPMT0XcbB2wfzhg9o-TRqzZU292G16OHBJxBSozTqrhm4IJnQaJBzQDNEe4oxxSbOGZfqBsFoz7WZJKjRT4GMDH3spd76ih0_0EL6ljfWmyuvIdm1960R-YeImYj5OI5bfjgfjhMmYj5LEDGn4iARMTuoHSuNmfYVqUvQWi0XMZTa6VFqX2lsngZw2OjlR9HvDnosmcITs_vSmDvWN-bzR8Qs71Iqw4mYh2r9dsSUYtMTGdnzBTFdQfvv5n1b8T8AAP__k6aRow) in the recently released 2023 public school ratings. It last earned a passing grade in 2015. Schools were not rated for several years during the COVID-19 pandemic. Although the campus was closed in 2023, [Morath said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu5CAMQL-GdB4RBsKkoNgm3d12y4gLZoJEQtY48_j71aTYH7iN5eYcW-fP1_zlc8nb_bdf0fEr1XnDZyvIjHSu-0EtVB-W9aCI1I62Y5iVVAakAWnn6HN5z7qL7lvGse_Q9VYPQ2-G8dYt7ma-B5-C1NHIm76agNZEO8YRjZYYVJfdRyaNtH0v-6u5-DQOsR9Ge_VGR5uElhgzV7rwgowv31J51wfSJdS1K25h3pu4_hJqEmpKlfhZiRfCvRJfKt2Fmj4nhJrk_3F6gLGUBh8ETgZyixDquh-lVXpD3hjpgRvnugHh3yMTRvCJkaAx5e0ONUHyuRyEDTxDW45POozQwlJrEWrqyMX9mUvJbbBCy_vqczl_558Vfzj1LwAA___YPZnR) that “has no bearing on, and does not abrogate, the compulsory action the statute requires the commissioner to take,” which includes appointing a board of managers to govern the district. Three incumbent Fort Worth ISD board members were [reelected to four-year terms](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAUhZ8GOwygiBYUU6zdv91mS4NwGUkQDFzHmbffOK-w3Zec5Ms55-_P8mNCDOn52-yg8e3zkuCqERChfPE4S7XZ2G0_i4NSz3qAXQQTkjJJmVqcCfGz9I3TK3MTb0Bz1Q8Dl8M0NpteLR_Far1VhsPovZPj4EBJ1VnDxARN0LeMSaY4Z7yTrfHT4Pgwqc7I3ilPegYuYC4tboDwNtXHT35BaW3em6g3xKOS7kHETMR8XVe713RnRMyQ6FmJmO8lRMxfhggWQ070PJxBqNTngvTKBTcaqqPVbjlHumZTHA3JnvsKCSvdcnQhPWlOFDOtYPC2mUIfD_5LpT-yKdodV4gx1EGRnj13E-K3JP7ftS8t_gUAAP__EkaREQ) over the weekend. Newly appointed Superintendent Karen Molinar said the district would appeal the 2023 rating.
## Paxton Drops Lawsuit, Launches Investigation
Attorney General Ken Paxton [dropped a lawsuit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM2upCAQhZ9Gd9UBf_CyYNHJjJvJne0sTQmlkkEggG379hP7FWb3pSpV58v58z19o3XWr79xJ1XeS5g8ndlRKZQ-GI-UdUC97UcylPKRI-mpYU0PrAc2TAatu6auNmpmRvKaFB86IXgv5Fe9KSlmQ6KXi2klR5rbofvSxEjOM_IZWW3V_Yz1bOCc8bZ_4CKF4UIOLfadGZaqY2RsCelRNir0xry4K7woPXTYa6e2UmKu2mfVjFUznuf52LO_d1UzkocjV80Yg7PF6hvX-9Tv5EvVjDrdY3SQUBOUjUK6wOGZD1sAV7Q-F9AhRnIObDaQKAf3IgMfEcAV_pKHiO8SPGS87gRM8Hzyn1v69aNOysTTOmezGKqOrTta9_Eu_9f2SzX_AgAA__-_X5j7) Tuesday against Coppell ISD over allegations it was teaching critical race theory, saying district officials "voluntarily took measures to ensure that unlawful critical race theory (CRT) will not be taught in its classrooms." Paxton [sued the district in March](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1rwzAQhn-NvDno04oGDaEh0CFtaQodjSqdYoEcGUlOnKW_vcRdu3W6B-7h7uX9PPZHE2K4nF_MCLouPvUXuJUItUJecZpzscnYYZyzg1zmMoHtKaaixaLFsncmxHvPG6e_sFOkAU0k7zoiOrVtBg3cbr0ET5gSihPrDBEWsHedFIpx1wT9OIYFloRgwsTGeNU50inJjOBOesQxuFBT3tQBKiym-HhPV8gbm8Ym6qHWqSC2Q_SA6OEPB9GDz8GZezuabIeWkvbxcvUZYrtvxHYVlorY_s0sNV0QFRSfZigrPKVpghhXfj7t1_l6hfy7fP9osnbTLcQYSicRx-fRhLhmq_9r9KrpTwAAAP__YWSHYg) after an undercover video released by the watchdog group Accuracy in Media showed an administrator explaining how the district had "gotten around" the state’s ban on CRT. District officials insisted the footage was "grossly misleading." This development follows Paxton’s [newly launched investigation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL-upSAQxp8GO04AQbSg2MbubrulQRh1sggGUM99-41nH-F2k8yX3_fnz9f0ZTFgXH_bHUx9L2mKcJcAtUL-nMeZi0vWbfuZPeRylgPcJJhQlCnK9OQthu9JNt7MzA-8AcO17DquuqFvNjOzfhDMKdeqtpX9ormY-85K7aCdhWQNmgfGFNOcM96ql12GzvNu0K1V0uuFSAYea8qvukGFty1L-E4X5JdLexPMVutRSPuLiJGI8b7v19-3jc-TiPGpQMQYkrOBiNGepWIkYjyjh-weCsVYIV8INw1gfaE10Y8LtSvFeEGpuNqKKT7KRP8jKBZPxNhk448bQ8DSaSLZulsMn1z1Z2teRvwLAAD__8_vjGI) into Austin ISD over similar allegations. Citing footage obtained by the same organization in a court filing, Paxton requested information about an "unwritten policy of developing and teaching curricula... in violation of state law prohibiting instruction on critical race theory." In 2021, state lawmakers prohibited public schools from [instruction that promotes the idea](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LtuwyAYBeCnwVssLjbEA0OjyMqQdGiHjtYf-G2j4oAA5_L2VfwK3c7w6Rzp_FyGCzjvbtMnLKjLcwzDDR_ZYymYthjXlE0AMy9rspjymiOagVPe7mi7o2qw4PxraCqrr9R2rELNVCMla2W3r2ZNjRJoAcWeUisAGsnYCMZeuVDKcqicfpfRlirGKBNtDWMnLZOdEtA2Vo2koWhdCakuMxZ8Qh79K9wx1SYslddzKTET8UF4T3hvILoSfL3Begp3wvuD8_4cwu8aCe9PLpeQXjXk-CSiP-P0jTkTcdyrL8Ll2xJxPB1Ep7oqaRsfznuXpSINnRZwfpst_zvrrvlfAAAA__9UWX5F) that "one race or sex is inherently superior to another" or that a person’s race or sex determines whether he or she is an oppressor or a victim.
## Popovich Introduces Next Spurs Coach
Legendary San Antonio Spurs coach Gregg Popovich introduced Mitch Johnson as the team’s next head coach at a [press conference on Monday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykUbGu5CAQ-5qkmxWQkFyKFNeke9deGREYAk-EQQO7-_bvT7u_cJILy7Is2f77tX-ZmGI-_5gL1_bjac_4rAlbQ_7Qcudqydhw3dkh13staHcllAahQcy7MzG99rF36yHcIntc5TxOk9TT8qsPqzycnYxzdtRGCW8X5_3otBZSj2LRRx_Xd5jQYpZSyEHfjF8mJ6dlHowe3ey7UaCLjfjWAjb8MdWnFz2Qb5auPq2htVK74Xentk5ttRC3enuZQPQ2dGrLh-nUZrhFm7BT28l4nlCo0CPaAIVNrFjhis0G-KaQK2WIbzQmd7eN-AWFsVawlD0yZouA18HGYoWMT2BKCPGCTJAon8jw2ewtYYJv9AhyHtQ4SzncQrtSz6srz5hSrNPcjeK8TEyfQu3_bnis6l8AAAD__yMmoac). Popovich continues to recover from a stroke suffered in November, which kept him off the court for much of the season. “ _Things are getting better by the day, but it’s not good enough for what we plan ahead_ ,” [Popovich said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu4yAYhE-DOywgYEJBsY27bLulReDHsMJgAY6T2z85V3jdSKOZ0Tf_HsvDxBTz-tdsoPvblyXD2RL0DvUr96M2W4wN21Ed1Ha0HezCCBOYCEzk4kxMn4UPTj-JU3QATSWfJiomdR-CvkvKrOReEEUtc8pZyZgHpRhlTwd8iPoqI4JISgm9idF4NTk6KXkzgjvpESfgYi917AE6vE3z6VNeUEdbtiHp0Pve0O0PYjNi83meY36ay0NsvggQm78UeK2wrngve3lFG_AWuw34fwm5lYxj7rW4w_ZSP_iKYVuyhwrZwlC128-YUmyTRJysm4npu95_99lLs58AAAD__-johE0), adding that Johnson is “going to do a great job.” Several current and former Spurs players were in attendance. Although the 76-year-old Popovich is stepping down as head coach, he has been named the team’s [president of basketball operations](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu5CAMQE-TdB5BAmFTUGwz3d92y8gBE_giIQJm-HP7VXKFbSwXT0_2-_u1fGGI4dj-4E66_ri0HNRKpFop3-v5ysUkNH5_ZUu5vMpJZhnYIIFJYGqxGOJnEb3VK7Mz70lzJaaJy2n-1XvtjBAKLV_RKGtHnHEVs0KnRicHOfM-6EvGJFOcMz7KB7p5snya1YhSWOU6wciGmvKjeqr0g8XFT3pTfpi091H7Ws_Sjb-74dkNz9baw6ylnCnXchHd8DxWvCa1cgFYjYf7L9gybRuc6UzvYDyEo-ZkX4YK-LAXig6wAEX4JkdQEzSKJu0EBzXwhBbuMrCHS_md_FHS0Q3PPmt7thBjKJPqBNt2DPG-tv5f47ce_gUAAP__7J2VqA). "_I’m no longer coach. I’m El Jefe,_ " he joked, revealing a T-shirt with the Spanish phrase for “the boss.” Popovich coached the Spurs for 29 seasons, winning [five NBA championships](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE8DGahtMIbAwSZkf9MNUY_dgCWDLbsZZm6_mrnCj-oFpVLp_ftZftAHf25_8SDDrzUuJ90lEDPlL6YrFxvR7seVHeVylUR2kSBVA6oBvTj04b30tTMPcJOoyQjdD4NQwzTWu-kHHFf5sDh1WnTTaCep9LoqkArtCFB78xkDBVoIEJ1qcZ0GJ4ZJd6h6p9eqB3KeY255J6YXljW845Nya-NRB7Mzp1J1fyo5V3K-77s93gVPPDmePn5KlZxLipnLF678SczsbaBKzlumbWtSTPHp7d48_LZR4eaIB51cGgkd6E6oNu2pzsal24fgy6CrHrYDffje4N_Jexr5PwAA__-2YoVi). He holds the record for the most wins as a head coach, [with 1,589](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkstyozAQRb8G7-TSAwQsWOA4xHH8ymMqFW8oIdqgWCAiBIH5-ql4drOd3a1T3b04fd_3-V4ordrqIBpI3HQxeQvfvQbnwN5iN9heGiHrZrAl2H7oO5A5xTRAOEA4zEuh9Jz7izIpcBmTBSQk9DknAY-jRZ0ACWTMKI4DGZVFWMo49CGKJOCIRCWDhUp-juEAh4RgwoKluMS8JDwOmQj8Mrx4PoZSOWOXrgYHk-gvejYj2KU0zUIntXNd77HUo5lHs74z1vXLWdTG_Ax4NGsL4dFMWKekBo9mlYWqQp3pzKhkjYoZuRpQOzQF2P6WNVTQlsLOSAoLYJG5_OWmrZxqAN20oJsXRDjFjHBOlrVrtMeyapDSDK0D67E18SivBgm5hQtYe2Ni84LlZs93c8xKJoczjccznfSuOYzFa_TvRt6rymPr9DlN083qMMjqmqLGyTM9kpM99bs6Hj_49MDhGL1lq1gHxili5PZdDE8z88fmDtXsdZfXnKhpyq-fwUdBgsPL84N9ne9b9vbI2t_HrZ7vvlaPx4-vWu0C0Z5j_20dQh2IPNv9Srfrw_O2y49tu4JmrTefVJz49Xu6Hrr7qn86UQopMqTg7IqfbLsfFjYpu2-ltep56Pm4aoTSt5-5_2vamNA_AQAA___HferZ).

New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Fort Worth ISD Warned of State Intervention Texas Education Commissioner Mike Morath warned Fort Worth ISD Monday that he was bound by law to address student performance at one of the district’s middle schools that had received a failing accountability rating for . The Leadership Academy at Forest Oak's 6th-grade campus in the recently released 2023 public school ratings. It last earned a passing grade in 2015. Schools were not rated for several years during the COVID-19 pandemic. Although the campus was closed in 2023, that “has no bearing on, and does not abrogate, the compulsory action the statute requires the commissioner to take,” which includes appointing a board of managers to govern the district. Three incumbent Fort Worth ISD board members were over the weekend. Newly appointed Superintendent Karen Molinar said the district would appeal the 2023 rating. Paxton Drops Lawsuit, Launches Investigation Attorney General Ken Paxton Tuesday against Coppell ISD over allegations it was teaching critical race theory, saying district officials "voluntarily took measures to ensure that unlawful critical race theory (CRT) will not be taught in its classrooms." Paxton after an undercover video released by the watchdog group Accuracy in Media showed an administrator explaining how the district had "gotten around" the state’s ban on CRT. District officials insisted the footage was "grossly misleading." This development follows Paxton’s into Austin ISD over similar allegations. Citing footage obtained by the same organization in a court filing, Paxton requested information about an "unwritten policy of developing and teaching curricula... in violation of state law prohibiting instruction on critical race theory." In 2021, state lawmakers prohibited public schools from that "one race or sex is inherently superior to another" or that a person’s race or sex determines whether he or she is an oppressor or a victim. Popovich Introduces Next Spurs Coach Legendary San Antonio Spurs coach Gregg Popovich introduced Mitch Johnson as the team’s next head coach at a . Popovich continues to recover from a stroke suffered in November, which kept him off the court for much of the season. “ Things are getting better by the day, but it’s not good enough for what we plan ahead ,” , adding that Johnson is “going to do a great job.” Several current and former Spurs players were in attendance. Although the 76-year-old Popovich is stepping down as head coach, he has been named the team’s . "I’m no longer coach. I’m El Jefe, " he joked, revealing a T-shirt with the Spanish phrase for “the boss.” Popovich coached the Spurs for 29 seasons, winning . He holds the record for the most wins as a head coach, . | Flying together with our sponsor Even brain doctors were left in complete awe... name: Craig Riedel for Senate
subject: Riedel Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel
body:
| | | | |
---
Riedel Campaign Update | May 7, 2025
---
Riedel Proud to Support Ramaswamy for Governor
Craig Riedel recently issued the following statement regarding the 2026 race for Governor:
"As I've traveled across the 1st Senate District and Northwest Ohio this spring, it's been exciting to see such enthusiasm among Republicans. President Trump is making America great again by securing our border, restoring America's manufacturing base, and bringing back common sense.
Here in Ohio, we've seen a new leader arise with a strong vision for our state's future. Vivek Ramaswamy has barnstormed the state with passion and determination. He's advocated for transformative changes: eliminating the state income tax, fixing our broken property tax system, and ensuring a strong education for every Ohio child.
I couldn't be more supportive of Vivek's vision for our state. There is no doubt that he's the leader our state needs to advance a bold conservative agenda in Columbus these next 8 years. And that's why I am proud to support Vivek Ramaswamy for Governor."

---
|
---
|
---
Craig & Danette on the Lincoln Day Circuit
It's Lincoln Day season in Ohio, and Craig and Danette have enjoyed making their way across the 1st Senate District this spring.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Craig Speaks at Tax Day Rally

Craig spoke at a Tax Day rally alongside fellow Northwest Ohio conservatives.
As our Senator, Craig will fight to eliminate Ohio's income tax so that you can keep what you earn.
And he will work to provide meaningful property tax relief for all Ohioans.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Standing Up for Life
Craig attended the NW Ohio Crises Pregnancy Centers (CPC) Gala in Archbold. It was wonderful to celebrate and support the work they do to help expectant mothers in need.
Craig and Danette are unabashedly and proudly pro-life.
---
| |
---
| Craig Spends Time in Findlay
Craig was on hand for the grand opening of the new Hancock County GOP HQ and held a meet-and-greet with voters this month at Dietsch Brothers Ice Cream.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Riedel Interviewed on Local News

Craig appreciated the opportunity to speak with Hometown Stations in Lima about his proven conservative track record and his priorities for the 1st Senate District.
Click below to watch his interview.

| Hey Peter,
Medley Long's special election for State Rep in Beverly & Wenham is just over one week away on Tuesday, May 13th. Join us for THE FINAL PUSH!!!
🚪 Door Knocking & Phone Banking in District
Meet up at 8 West St, Beverly
* Saturday May 10 & Sunday May 11
* Morning shift meets at 10a, afternoon shift meets at 3p
* P.S. - the campaign's home base on Election Day will be here too. Come over to make GOTV calls any time on Election Day May 13th.

📞 Phone Banking at MassGOP HQ
MassGOP HQ, 85 Merrimac St, Boston
* Wednesday, May 7 | 4:00 - 7:00 PM
* Thursday, May 8 | 4:00 - 7:00 PM
* Monday, May 12 | 4:00 - 7:00 PM

Whether you're a seasoned volunteer or it's your first time getting out there, we need your help to get Medley over the top.
It's crunch time. JOIN US TO MAKE THE FINAL PUSH!!
See you out there, MassGOP Field Team

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I’m sick and tired of this
body:
at do-nothing Republicans

| | | | |
---
Fellow patriot,
If you’re sick and tired of** _do-nothing Republicans who talk a big game before every election and then lose all their courage when it’s time to pass laws_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of **_RINO’s begging for your money everyday only to disappear the instant a tough fight begins_** ...
If you’re sick and tired of spending your time and money to help **_politicians who turn their backs on you the moment their plane lands in DC_** ...
**Then you feel exactly the way I do.**
[STAND WITH MTG](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/arjT/?__vbtrk=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
It’s time for Republicans in Congress to get it through their heads that we won an historic landslide election in November on the coattails of President Trump and his America First agenda, and that the Republican base, and the American people, expect swift action.
**Republicans need to get serious about:**
* Making the DOGE cuts permanent.
* Making it a felony to do sex change operations on children.
* Investigating and prosecuting those responsible for the Republic-ending lawfare waged against President Trump and his allies.
* Stopping the blank checks to Ukraine.
* Holding the COVID tyrants at the CDC accountable.
* Passing NO tax on tips, overtime, and social security.
* Reigning in the rogue federal judiciary.

If we don’t take bold action on these priorities, voters will justifiably lose faith in Congressional Republicans and they will punish us at the ballot box in the midterm elections.
**I’m sending a wake up call to Republicans in DC: **
**When MTG is upset, the base is upset.**
We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to save our country and if we blow it we deserve to lose the next election.
That’s why I’m holding the establishment’s feet to the fire in the fight to codify President Trump’s agenda.
The powers in Washington are going to punish me for saying this but let me be clear: I don’t care. I don’t work for the Establishment, Special Interests, or the Corrupt Swamp. **I work for YOU.**
**_[That’s why I’m so proud to fund my political operation $10, $25, and $50 at a time from patriots across this country like you who are sick and tired of the status quo](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/arjT/?__vbtrk=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I didn’t come to Congress to make friends, I had enough before I got here.
I came to Congress to deliver for the American people, to truly REPRESENT the interests of **_We The People_**.
**_[And that’s exactly what I’m doing](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/arjT/?__vbtrk=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
With urgency,
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/arjT/?__vbtrk=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/arjT/?__vbtrk=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
****

_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/arjU/?__vbtrk=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4OTkxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=288991&trkid=669737600&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314
