name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgamqr03pvb9govoi3ovt9p1cbot3vncig6lhlgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb2bqh5shnr6ajtuosv5he49icihbcptuaolsaf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkdoq41mq9821do6vbttaknok5l1hu8irg1l3s8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm3qghcad3et0fje6dd18830c8tq2ue10cs6l5lg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1ablvb8egnogbekl23dse3nti2cre554je6rico_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj0f21v5bqvlfs7psush70n05vcf6jms8jqd5f48_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkb96jc04k2690t1c1e953pb2433v5dp81iu9bp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zptmfq9a5tp6bjh8s0esb33td6vp02gg8t7lv280_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z45nnboeifgelp8c2n4qjtn0fb54ch5bpml6rne8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zujb545vsml6aivn552fuh70m8k9fampb7c8nek8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob1c1g66p724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0lq4tm9eumekiopc01upu8h0845uojm3h9jt9d8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6cor6c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp7amahnuv7dt2rr22221clot0nm24denlhh51uo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr1cdhmcpj3cpge49fg)

_**Brace yourself - I’m about to drop a MAGA Truth Bomb:**_
President Trump was only able to complete 100 Days of his 2nd Term thanks to YOU.
We’re touched by the support from Patriots like YOU & we’re bringing the MAGA Movement to new heights all thanks to _YOUR FEEDBACK._
But sadly, the Fake News still tries to RUIN everything MAGA Patriots like yourself helped build:
They keep spreading countless lies about his Cabinet Nominees, support his Impeachment, and defend violent Cartel Members who’ve been deported, then say _WE’RE_ the bad guys!
_**[I’m taking no chances to protect THE TRUTH about Trump Voters - but to do so I’ll need your help.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zp9obb93pm94hnlgcpl6hoo5oaksldpg4q0eo4ho_)**_

I plan on personally showing _**[YOUR RESPONSES](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z45tq1rlp7ujvqllk1p8qihv700la2kkljlc3l5o_)**_ to President Trump next time he’s in **Florida**.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood is trying to turn our children against us
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zepl7ck90fj9jvm322bvqlsnbiliu3l7b338ikkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj62pb4c3h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z85m9goe4br7k5rvhjld9seji531ek8b3up2p36g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj62pb4c3h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2g2m15r5kamop63krjm29p0kl4h39ubd63u1a1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj62pb4c3h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl8nmvj2m1skv5dgj1d5n8qq8glgkock7kv487v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj62pb4c3h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zutl952egl743g7asd3s9uv1566o0f8o2g18fuu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj62pb4c3h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbn7q1haojdsoif631vbg9cconk4cseviqj98ue0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj62pb4c3h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zelfi2i7hk9t1rm46kuao4p3mdje15ds218etbgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj62pb4c3h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6qk1budqklh3vtqt0la9re49lu5d6lmhpe932io_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj62pb4c3h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zblmbs4lldp9t00jdfaq5gr1a8k8k3f4keqnng9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj62pb4c3h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Trump Reveals His 2028 Picks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
It’s NOT who you think

Friend,

President Trump just named his potential successors for the 2028 presidential election, and let's just say: **America is BUZZING.**

He said **the GOP has "a lot of good people"** and then he namedropped **Vice President JD Vance,** _but he didn 't stop there._

In a surprising move, he also named **Secretary of State Marco Rubio.**

But now, he wants to know what YOU think, Friend.

_**[Who should be President Trump's successor in 2028? Cast your vote below.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6scov7lmie9sas1cr1qeimmls2vtrncmmcjd3to_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6aob6c5h2bs)**_

_President Trump knows the MAGA movement isn 't just about one man_ -- it's about **We The People** fighting to save our country, restore faith, and secure freedom for the next generation.

---

This is the latest in my _Former Member_ series, where I talk to former members of Congress--Democrats and Republicans--to get their perspectives on what it was like to serve, and how things are different then vs. now.
Last week, I spoke with [Bob Inglis](https://substack.com/redirect/7d56e680-a8fa-44c4-9218-6c270f1d816f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a former Republican Congressman from South Carolina who served two separate stints in Congress: from 1993 to 1999, and again from 2005 to 2011.
He isn't your typical elected Republican--he works on addressing climate change at [RepublicEn.org](https://substack.com/redirect/6285ddba-96f7-44af-811c-9178c4b1bc4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [endorsed Kamala Harris](https://substack.com/redirect/603aaff9-9951-49c3-89a5-eb61243ef51b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2024. But he served with an ascendant Newt Gingrich and still considers himself a Republican.
Give it a listen.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTYyNTUzMDA0LCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzQ2NjIyNjQ5LCJleHAiOjE3NDkyMTQ2NDksImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.4pLtBO643khtwQRSMtd20-JjzNRWfc6RlcALwQMN89w?)
### **Topics from my conversation with Bob Inglis**
_Want a transcript of this conversation? Click the "Transcript" tab towards the [top of this page](https://substack.com/redirect/16e4770e-5cd1-4d76-ab7f-303dff6df66c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
* _0:00 - 2:05_: Introduction, more on [RepublicEn.org](https://substack.com/redirect/6285ddba-96f7-44af-811c-9178c4b1bc4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and how Republicans are talking about climate change.
* _2:06 - 6:45_: How climate change is already impacting people across America--changes to housing costs, insurance markets, and more.1
* _6:46 - 8:34_: Serving in Congress in the '90s, and the rise of Newt Gingrich's Republican Party.
* _8:35 - 11:22_: The rise of--and surviving in--the [Tea Party](https://substack.com/redirect/a0132273-ab92-4b3e-b165-008b74a6fccd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* _11:23 - 15:48_: Trump getting older, and whether Congressional Republicans really like him. (Spoiler: no, not really. But they're afraid of losing their jobs.)
* _15:49 - 17:09_: What we can learn from Billy Tarver, the unluckiest man in South Carolina.
* _17:10 - 22:06_: Anything you regret from your time as a Republican in Congress?
* _22:07 - 25:09_: How do you reach people whose "facts" are so disconnected from reality?
* _25:10 - 27:04_: What do you miss about serving in Congress?
* _27:05 - 28:06_: Can you still be a Republican at this point if you endorsed Harris?
* _28:07 - 32:14_: Policy solutions for climate change, and wrap-up.

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=162553004&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYyNTUzMDA0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY2MjI2NDksImV4cCI6MTc0OTIxNDY0OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.TF3iPnqq0KAe5JV2AKLGKcI8hn4f89yT7af3Y3WWu7g)
_**Feel free to share this post with someone who 'd enjoy it.** (If you're reading this email because someone sent it to you, [please consider subscribing](https://substack.com/redirect/3edea67d-736b-4bdd-83c2-de06457acf1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)_
_For press inquiries, please contact press@ben-samuels.com._
1
Point of clarification on something I said in reference to [Patrick Witt](https://substack.com/redirect/672196d6-3680-4053-9f22-0dc225b12dbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). While it is likely that we've met before--I think I interviewed him at one point while I [covered football for ](https://substack.com/redirect/8fe23967-492f-488a-aa2b-1648b04b7f80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[The Harvard Crimson](https://substack.com/redirect/8fe23967-492f-488a-aa2b-1648b04b7f80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ and he was the quarterback for Yale--I am honestly not 100% sure.
(As the Yale QB, he was at the [center of a scandal](https://substack.com/redirect/7d70d023-f1cd-4844-a96a-b71da4a93d9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that made national news. Now, he's just [run-of-the-mill nuts](https://substack.com/redirect/ae9e5ca3-00d0-4f88-83f7-7d32ffbe0aeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
But I don't want to make it sound like I have any personal relationship with him, because I don't. What I was referring to (inarticulately) was the fact that I know people who knew him in law school, which is true.
In any event: Witt ran for the Republican nomination for Georgia Insurance Commissioner and [got absolutely smoked](https://substack.com/redirect/9bc2ee78-54af-4ff3-acf8-904e4d4b0fcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) despite [Trump's endorsement](https://substack.com/redirect/9aa56be1-920e-4d5b-b320-4995ebd99935?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

name: Trump Succession Poll
subject: Trump Reveals His 2028 Picks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Common Sense
body:
It’s NOT who you think

Friend,

President Trump just named his potential successors for the 2028 presidential election, and let's just say: **America is BUZZING.**

He said **the GOP has "a lot of good people"** and then he namedropped **Vice President JD Vance,** _but he didn 't stop there._

In a surprising move, he also named **Secretary of State Marco Rubio.**

But now, he wants to know what YOU think, Friend.

_**[Who should be President Trump's successor in 2028? Cast your vote below.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpr8ll1ddtc4qtj0k329iu4fgpcv80ae40frhftg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6eoj2cph2bs)**_

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8fij0u3v35o83vtptcg9mog2fj61kk9pouqj6l8_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj6eoj2cph2bs)

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Mark Kelly told me I could reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Sen. John Hickenlooper is running for re-election in Colorado and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from him, and [**rush a split donation between John’s campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hickenlooper-split.KqhzN0&refcode=em250507-1-90&t=1&akid=6063%2E6688874%2ElpPDpd)
---
Hey Folks, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.
[**Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Mark Kelly to help build this campaign from the ground up?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hickenlooper-split.KqhzN0&refcode=em250507-1-90&t=2&akid=6063%2E6688874%2ElpPDpd)
**[DONATE NOW →](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hickenlooper-split.KqhzN0&refcode=em250507-1-90&t=3&akid=6063%2E6688874%2ElpPDpd)**
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_
**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**
Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hickenlooper-split.KqhzN0&refcode=em250507-1-90&t=4&akid=6063%2E6688874%2ElpPDpd)
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hickenlooper-split.KqhzN0&refcode=em250507-1-90&t=5&akid=6063%2E6688874%2ElpPDpd)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service—first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.
**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**
[**That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5—about the cost of two Wynkoop pints—to help us build a winning campaign?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-hickenlooper-split.KqhzN0&refcode=em250507-1-90&t=6&akid=6063%2E6688874%2ElpPDpd)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5 →](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1573?c0=mek-em-hickenlooper-split.IQNzX7&refcode=em250507-1-90&t=7&akid=6063%2E6688874%2ElpPDpd)**
---
****
| **[DONATE MORE →](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-hickenlooper-split.VSHTR8&refcode=em250507-1-90&t=8&akid=6063%2E6688874%2ElpPDpd)**
---
****
I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems.
Thanks for being part of the team.
Giddy up,
John

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=6063%2E6688874%2ElpPDpd).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Tariff idiocy - the latest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek, as you know I’ve led an effort to challenge Trump’s tariffs, which are wrecking the American economy.
A tariff is nothing more than a sales tax — a sales tax on the products that American families and businesses use every single day, like groceries, clothing, and building supplies. This tax is falling on everyone, but like all rising costs, it falls hardest on those who can afford it least.
It’s perfectly clear: People want lower costs, not higher! That’s why I’m laser-focused on doing everything I can possibly do in the Senate to reverse these ill-advised and price-hiking tariffs.
Last week, I forced a vote on my bill to terminate Trump’s tariffs — and the GOP blocked it. In fact, Senate Republicans are so invested in this tariff idiocy that they actually brought JD Vance over to break a tie so they can keep on damaging the American economy.
It makes no sense!
I’m not going to stop fighting against this Administration’s reckless and illegal trade wars that are driving up costs for everyday Americans and buckling our economy.
Someone has to stand up for families and businesses in the face of Donald Trump, and it’s clear the GOP is not going to do it.
If you’re with me, I'd love to know — because grassroots support is a huge part of how we’re able to keep pushing these important issues. Will you sign your name to my petition to say you’re in to keep fighting for our economy? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/cEheKwfNiUCWFuDfL_n-iw2]
ADD MY NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/cEheKwfNiUCWFuDfL_n-iw2]
Thank you very much.
-Tim Kaine

name: Rhena Hicks
subject: Happy Teacher Appreciation Week!
body:
It is Teacher Appreciation Week, and though Virginia’s budget just raised teacher salaries by an average of $3,000, tea
| | |
---
| |
---
| Happy Teacher Appreciation Week!
---
| Friends-
It is Teacher Appreciation Week, and though Virginia's budget just raised teacher salaries by an [average of $3,000](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oJzgkB-QfwDmh2FW7wf8OS50KKTpLJOP-cImUGiZzw-tHPCPZJPBk1vosPSuAM2yeSwe-rBnJNvI5sAZenxwG0g_OOT4-UUjofSuPvzXvDAuU0FtTuuJ3tpZtPURCwcxvvE6s3r4uhI6HAhjvPM7oLJXkBRdVjMvxRjsCg9ISW4nyIlfqIpDpIftDmjyCOx_UuVR343WKxXwiW00W7ry-fl-CpxboZ_uw-SzI2a_mnrBMpaHa0b3iQ_j2h1fDwBw26x-YhNEbi-40rnzRAA9IE5d5VEnGj2lW--cBDFxXm-2DujxroD5pWeYsc39B2Y_&c=AnYw6haI6t1tduHsN4AAseKiMkZQMfR_phmWPtLfmSKWE-OyYksv_Q==&ch=0Ro-j8sZwWGqdZX1IJlA095fOZIHrTNfwUXr6yvebYLFXD4ttr1Gfw==), teacher pay in Virginia is still stagnant compared with other states. The Virginia Education Association says that, adjusting for inflation, it looks like Virginia's teachers are making more, but are actually losing money, which has a direct impact on student learning.
---
| |
---

subject: I’m told my reputation precedes me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I hope that’s a good thing.

| |
---
| | | Folks - it's John Kennedy.

---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z90tqesgpun4a2lghhip8kijhrlv7ffibi7qa360_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj69o32clh2bs "John Kennedy")
---

I'm told my reputation precedes me.

I hope that's a good thing.

I try not to sound like some stuffy politician - I like talking in plain English and speaking from the heart.

So believe me when I say that I'm deeply concerned right now.

My friend, Steve Scalise, just informed me that the top House Democrat Super PAC is already unloading $50,000,000.000 (and no, this ain't a typo) into key battleground districts. They're hitting us harder and earlier than ever before.

That's enough cash to completely overwhelm DOZENS of our most vulnerable Conservatives!

_And to make matters even worse, my buddies in the House have a HUGE deadline coming up, and I just got word they 're falling 15-20% behind their goal._

It'll be a real disaster if they miss it.

With all due respect, I'm personally asking you for just a few bucks before time officially runs out. _**[We've only got DAYS 'til May is over and done with so do you think you could do that for me?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zomd54g44rpijqprr51qtgn0ca6nsgcqck7rggtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj69o32clh2bs "We’ve only got DAYS ‘til May is over and done with so do you think you could do that for me?")**_

Conservatives control the House by the slimmest margins in 100 years.

I know we still have the Senate and White House but it could all be over for us if we don't dig deep and help SAVE the House Majority. That's why:

_Newt Gingrich already reached out ...
Steve Scalise already reached out...
And FOUR freshmen Members of Congress reached out too..._

I hate being a pest but we don't have time to sit around - not if we want to win!

_**[So I'm personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8poibq847cuuljduluqko76834jfcbu9oc2gcv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdj69o32clh2bs "So I’m personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat every last Liberal in America.")**_

God bless you,
John Kennedy

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12927875?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
|
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

Although last week was scheduled to be our final week in Tallahassee for the legislative session, it has now been extended through June 6. We do not have an agenda for the upcoming weeks hammered out just yet, but we do know that the main goal will be to finalize the budget. **House Speaker Daniel Perez** will be assigning lawmakers to various committees that will specifically go over certain items in the budget. Our time deliberating on legislation concluded last week. We were on the House floor until 10:25 p.m. on Friday, the 60th day of the legislative session!
---
|
---
| I’m proud to share that I had two bills passed in both the House and Senate and will hopefully be making their way to the Governor’s desk very soon.

**Learn more about these bills below:**
* My bill, [CS/CS/HB 113 - Fleeing or Attempting to Elude a Law Enforcement Officer](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=c1a1975f02&e=d1c1b9864f), successfully passed through the legislature. This bill increases penalties for those who flee from law enforcement while also strengthening accountability through enhancement on the police scorecard. This legislation makes it clear that if you flee from or elude law enforcement, you will face serious consequences.
* Another one of my bills, [CS/HB 4067 (Local Bill) - Equestrian Sport Facilities in Marion County](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=0cffde800c&e=d1c1b9864f), also passed through the legislature. This bill protects what makes our area special by helping ease regulatory challenges as the **World Equestrian Center** continues its impressive growth. Thanks to the heavy support of our local equestrian community, we were able to get this bill through the legislative process.

---
|
---
| My fellow House members and I are working toward permanently cutting the sales tax in half, proposing a budget lower than that of the Governor and Senate. We began this process with the goal of stopping unnecessary spending, and we are sticking to it!

I’m also excited to share that I was appointed to serve on the House’s **Select Committee on Property Taxes**! During this legislative session, I worked hard to start Florida down the road to permanently eliminating the property tax, so I’m encouraged by this effort by House leadership to bring this idea to fruition. Join this movement by visiting [endpropertytaxnow.com](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=d87b05e26b&e=d1c1b9864f)!
---
|
---
| | Thank you for your continued support of my leadership in the state legislature! I look forward to keeping you updated on our work in the weeks to come.

Have a great week!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=db40ca9c5d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=db40ca9c5d).

---

In a 6-3 SCOTUS decision, Clarence Thomas cast the deciding vote to BAN transgenders from the military.
**Our greatest Supreme Court Justice is standing up to DEI and has returned strength to our armed forces.**
President Trump, Pete Hegseth, and the rest of our America-First Majority just gained a big win for America and for those who defend us.

Did you hear the news? We are proud to have endorsed Erica Deuso as mayor of Downingtown, Pennsylvania.

Erica is running against two opponents. **In the primary, which is happening in a matter of DAYS (May 20th), she’s running against a “Democrat” who proudly calls himself _a white nationalist._**

Erica was recently featured in the _Philadelphia Inquirer_ and has earned key endorsements from the local Democratic party, as well as the outgoing mayor. Meanwhile, her “Democratic” opponent has doubled down on his transphobia. She has been running a strong campaign, but she needs our help.

[**Erica is depending on grassroots support to help her defeat her _white nationalist, transphobic_ PRIMARY opponent, and we want to help her get as close to her fundraising goal as possible. Erica is a well-respected scientist, businesswoman, and advocate for marginalized communities. She believes in building a safe, sustainable, and strong community where everyone has a voice and every resident, regardless of age, race, gender, or background, feels welcome and protected.

Her Democratic opponent, Barry Cassidy, on the other hand, is running as a Democrat, but his words and actions tell a shocking story. **He is a proud white nationalist who routinely uses racist and anti-LGBTQ language. He openly aligns with MAGA extremism.**

That’s not all: If Erica wins the primary, she will be facing off against Republican Richard Bryant, **a far-right extremist and unapologetic Trump supporter.** He uses his online platform to spew misogyny, anti-trans rhetoric, and racist commentary. Additionally, he is known to mock women for their appearance, attack the LGBTQ+ community, and spread harmful lies about climate change and immigrants. He advocates for violence, promotes mass deportation, and supports banning books and suppressing votes. As Erica’s campaign has stated, **“This isn’t political disagreement—this is dangerous, dehumanizing extremism.”**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107243929/544061506/-459442197?refcode=EM_F_250506Deuso_N_CD_90DO_11_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNzJlMzc4LTQ5MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F2Tz_61070qe2Gdr6Q1BNODzIz6FhoJkYFYju89usy0=)
---
In Erica’s own words: _“I bring my whole self to this work—including my perspective as a trans woman who’s had to fight to be taken seriously in rooms where decisions get made. That makes me more determined to lead with purpose and to make sure every woman in Downingtown knows her voice matters, and her community has her back. Because when we take care of women, we’re taking care of the whole town.”_

**Her campaign must raise $17,000 to fully fund its voter outreach and mobilization programs ahead of May 20. Through our incredible community of grassroots supporters, we know we can help her get there.**

[**Rush support to Erica’s campaign ahead of Primary Day by pitching in a split $20.25 or more immediately →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107243930/544061509/-459442197?refcode=EM_F_250506Deuso_N_CD_90DO_11_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNzJlMzc4LTQ5MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F2Tz_61070qe2Gdr6Q1BNODzIz6FhoJkYFYju89usy0=)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager

**RED ALERT: My historic DOGE initiative is being SUED by deranged radical leftists!**
**_FIRST,_** they filed suit to stop me from ELIMINATING tremendous fraud at USAID.
**_THEN,_** they went to court again to keep me from FIRING unaccountable bureaucrats.

body:
Did you catch Wesley’s email the other day, Peter?

Our teachers deserve better, _and our kids do, too._

We’re proud to stand with Wesley in this fight to protect Missouri’s public schools — will you join us in standing with him? [**Add your name today. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107245771/544065767/-16148020?ms=em25_250507_kicker_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em25_250507_kicker_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em25_250507_kicker_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250507_kicker_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=89fG3UUSAU7VCkslRSTF1kUZyg/HRtUGt35oQVf37PuZ9ebMx7AhSzzoJSK84xuNKr3LzUpg5s1586Jm1f32D0I4rhDo4bKmnQcFuJz/DSRM/hpiWekozZE95NTgWgy7RND+Zuw8aJ7TMMJBJFBOeJO+fXVjK273p20KjdB80kM=&refcode2=4f21a88f-4b2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGYyMWE4OGYtNGIyYi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XTh3nVmCvygpAud4__v-eVYWwvXRE-LTFQo6M5epKSA=&emci=35b67af9-912a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=4f21a88f-4b2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1020964)

Team Bell

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Wesley Bell
Date: May 5, 2025
Subject: Trump doesn't give a damn about Missouri teachers or schools. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107245784/544065824/-16148020?ms=em25_250507_kicker_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em25_250507_kicker_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em25_250507_kicker_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250507_kicker_adv_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=89fG3UUSAU7VCkslRSTF1kUZyg/HRtUGt35oQVf37PuZ9ebMx7AhSzzoJSK84xuNKr3LzUpg5s1586Jm1f32D0I4rhDo4bKmnQcFuJz/DSRM/hpiWekozZE95NTgWgy7RND+Zuw8aJ7TMMJBJFBOeJO+fXVjK273p20KjdB80kM=&refcode2=4f21a88f-4b2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGYyMWE4OGYtNGIyYi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XTh3nVmCvygpAud4__v-eVYWwvXRE-LTFQo6M5epKSA=&emci=35b67af9-912a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=4f21a88f-4b2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1020964) Team,

It’s National Teacher Appreciation Week — **and I want to start by saying thank you to every teacher who shows up for our kids, day in and day out.**

The ones who stay late grading papers, who buy school supplies out of their own pockets, and who help shape the hearts and minds of the next generation. Missouri teachers are some of the most dedicated people I know, _and they deserve so much more than just our gratitude._

But right now, **they’re under attack.**

With Donald Trump back in the White House, his administration has made it clear: Public education is in their crosshairs.

He’s moving to dismantle the Department of Education entirely — and if that happens, Missouri schools would be some of the hardest hit.

Missouri schools would lose millions in federal support for special education, free school lunches, and programs that serve our most vulnerable students. And it doesn’t stop there...they're attacking LGBTQ+ kids, extreme groups are targeting books that challenge traditional thinking, and extreme politicians are trying to dictate what can and can’t be taught in our classrooms.

Trump and his MAGA cronies are launching an all-out assault on our public schools and the people working so hard to hold them together. I’m not letting this go unanswered.

clean_body: Did you catch Wesley’s email the other day, Peter? Our teachers deserve better, and our kids do, too. We’re proud to stand with Wesley in this fight to protect Missouri’s public schools — will you join us in standing with him? Thank you, Team Bell \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Wesley Bell Date: May 5, 2025 Subject: Trump doesn't give a damn about Missouri teachers or schools. Team, It’s National Teacher Appreciation Week — and I want to start by saying thank you to every teacher who shows up for our kids, day in and day out. The ones who stay late grading papers, who buy school supplies out of their own pockets, and who help shape the hearts and minds of the next generation. Missouri teachers are some of the most dedicated people I know, and they deserve so much more than just our gratitude. But right now, they’re under attack. With Donald Trump back in the White House, his administration has made it clear: Public education is in their crosshairs. He’s moving to dismantle the Department of Education entirely — and if that happens, Missouri schools would be some of the hardest hit. Missouri schools would lose millions in federal support for special education, free school lunches, and programs that serve our most vulnerable students. And it doesn’t stop there...they're attacking LGBTQ+ kids, extreme groups are targeting books that challenge traditional thinking, and extreme politicians are trying to dictate what can and can’t be taught in our classrooms. Trump and his MAGA cronies are launching an all-out assault on our public schools and the people working so hard to hold them together. I’m not letting this go unanswered. | And let’s be real — it’s easy for someone like Donald Trump, who was born into privilege, sent to elite private schools, and never had to rely on the public school system, to treat public education as if it doesn't matter. But deep down, he knows better. He knows that public schools are where kids — no matter their zip code — get a fair shot to learn, grow, and build a better future. He just doesn’t care. Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Not Again…
body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

A new Fox News poll just dropped — and its bad news.

Democrats are in a stronger position heading into the 2026 midterms than they were in 2018 when they flipped 40+ seats and took back the House.

https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

We cannot let history repeat itself.

Because if Democrats seize the majority again, they won’t just raise taxes and open the border — it’ll be endless impeachment hearings, sham investigations, and non-stop political warfare aimed at one man: President Trump.

That’s why I’m stepping up to defend our majority — and launching my America First Majority Fund – but I can’t defend it alone.

[So please make a contribution to my America First Majority Fund so that we can defend the Republican House majority and continue delivering victories for President Trump and the American people.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/america-first-majority-fund-/?utm_campaign=20250507&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

clean_body: Peter, A new Fox News poll just dropped — and its bad news. Democrats are in a stronger position heading into the 2026 midterms than they were in 2018 when they flipped 40+ seats and took back the House. We cannot let history repeat itself. ---

Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem **[clashed with Democrat Rep. Rosa DeLauro](https://substack.com/redirect/f95ce005-1ae7-49ae-9166-bfa4d37cddb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over the uselessness of FEMA in serving Americans affected by natural disasters during a House Appropriations Committee hearing, Tuesday.
Noem clearly **[struck a nerve](https://substack.com/redirect/f95ce005-1ae7-49ae-9166-bfa4d37cddb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , criticizing one of the Democrat's beloved federal agencies.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f95ce005-1ae7-49ae-9166-bfa4d37cddb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f95ce005-1ae7-49ae-9166-bfa4d37cddb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Where is the evidence of the failure of FEMA?!!" DeLauro pressed Noem.
**["Ma'am, we still have claims open from Hurricane Katrina,"](https://substack.com/redirect/f95ce005-1ae7-49ae-9166-bfa4d37cddb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Noem calmly responded. "We have fire claims that are still unpaid to people who said they were due them 6-8-10 years old."
Noem didn't stop there, echoing President Trump's intend on holding federal agencies to a new level of accountability they have not been accustomed to. "What the President has said is he is sick and tired of federal agencies, who pick and choose who wins and who loses," Noem explained. "He wants to make sure that the federal government, when it makes a commitment that it follows through!"
"The federal government is abdicating its commitment to the American people,..." DeLauro began to say.
Noem cut here off with a heck of a truth bomb, "It did, certainly under Joe Biden's administration!"
The Democrat congresswoman **[became very frustrated by Noem's answer](https://substack.com/redirect/f95ce005-1ae7-49ae-9166-bfa4d37cddb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, "I knew you were going to go there!"
Watch the tense congress sparring match here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f95ce005-1ae7-49ae-9166-bfa4d37cddb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together With Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/cf99b960-cc67-4ac6-bac2-83f4f929ff9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Elon Musk Dreams, Mode Mobile Delivers**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cf99b960-cc67-4ac6-bac2-83f4f929ff9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As Elon Musk puts it, "Apple used to really bring out products that would blow people's minds." Those days are long gone, and a new smartphone company is stepping up to deliver the mind-blowing moments we've been missing. **[They've just been granted the stock ticker $MODE](https://substack.com/redirect/cf99b960-cc67-4ac6-bac2-83f4f929ff9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by the Nasdaq, and you can still make an investment in their pre-IPO offering.
Turning smartphones from an expense into an income stream, Mode has already **[helped users earn and save an eye-popping $325M+](https://substack.com/redirect/cf99b960-cc67-4ac6-bac2-83f4f929ff9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and seen an astonishing 32,481% revenue growth rate over three years. Uber did it to taxis, Airbnb did it to hotels...And now, Mode Mobile is doing it to the $1 trillion smartphone industry.
Don't miss your chance to invest in the next big disruption to smartphones. **[Join 41,000+ shareholders and invest at $0.30/share today.](https://substack.com/redirect/cf99b960-cc67-4ac6-bac2-83f4f929ff9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Invest Today](https://substack.com/redirect/cf99b960-cc67-4ac6-bac2-83f4f929ff9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# AG Pam Bondi announces the FBI is reviewing Epstein files
Attorney General Pam Bondi told reporters, Wednesday, that the FBI is reviewing files related to Jeffrey Epstein and his apparent underage sex network for elites.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1cbdccbe-c0eb-48bd-ad00-ca7826315ecf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"There are tens of thousands of videos of Epstein with children or child p*rn, and there are hundreds of victims," she told the press.
"No one victim will ever get released. It's just the volume and that's what they're going through right now. The FBI is diligently going through that."
* * *
# Scott Jennings answers if he will run for Kentucky senate seat
A reporter **[asked CNN Republican superstar Scott Jennings](https://substack.com/redirect/e4f7112d-a945-4615-be09-0669390e7db8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** if he will run for senate in Kentucky amid recent reports that the cable news panelist was considering doing so with President Trump's blessing.
"Man the internet is a crazy place," Jennings said, dodging the question. "A long way until next May."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e4f7112d-a945-4615-be09-0669390e7db8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
When the reporter asked again about recent headlines alleging his intent to run, he got more of a response from Jennings.
"I read all those with some amusement," he said. "But I'll tell you this, I think Kentucky has benefitted from having Republican senators for a long time,... I think that seat ought to be in the hands, ultimately of someone who is going to help President Trump execute on his agenda. Frankly, I think politics is a team sport and the President is ahead of our team,..."
"Whoever Donald Trump endorses will be the next senator of Kentucky," Jennings affirmed.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Why I ask
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Why do I need to raise money even though I just won?
#

We've sent a number of fundraising emails since my election, and I know some folks wonder why. Why do I need to raise money even though I just won?
It's a fair question -- please let me try to answer.
As you know, President Trump is trying to cut taxes for billionaires and paying for it by taking an axe to programs people need to survive.
We're talking about the poor, the hungry, the elderly, and we're talking about veterans as well. All on the chopping block.
You may also know that I've done a series of town meetings recently -- something that will continue in the future. And in many of those meetings, I talk about the impact of those cuts on families, impacts on programs, and benefits I am familiar with firsthand.
I did not grow up wealthy. Far from it. I benefited from a number of lifesaving programs before joining the Marine Corps. And after I served in Iraq, I relied on a number of the benefits I earned through my service.
When I tell those stories, it makes a difference. People listen. We are able to connect. With veterans. With working class voters. With Latinos. Precisely the people Democrats need to convince.
That takes resources. And the response to these emails is my primary way of raising those funds. So that means I have to ask. And today is one of those days.
[**Can I count on you to make a contribution to my re-election campaign today? I will use your donation to get around talking about the impact of Trump's cuts to programs people need to survive.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may25.XT1Xme&refcode=em250507-1-90&t=1&akid=3852%2E734936%2ET1XY-p)

name: Andy Kim
subject: Trump “doesn’t know” if he needs to uphold the Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
In a recent interview, Trump was asked if he needs to upload the Constitution as president.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107250318/544079063/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmIxZjJkNy01MTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OSUwPe9gxwGKU9U5Zop_5i-ZRHxb2eGW2LX4dPhXqtY=&emci=5432bdfa-9a2a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=9fb1f2d7-512b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=26261389)
---

| | In a recent interview, Trump was asked if he needs to uphold the Constitution as president. His answer? **_"I don't know."_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107250319/544079064/-1197072038?refcode=2025-05-07-constitution&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9fb1f2d7-512b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmIxZjJkNy01MTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OSUwPe9gxwGKU9U5Zop_5i-ZRHxb2eGW2LX4dPhXqtY=) Let's refresh his memory about Article II, Section 1, Clause 8 of the Presidential Oath of Office: _"I do solemnly swear (or affirm) that I will faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and will to the best of my Ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States."_ That is his presidential oath of office, and right now, he is failing to uphold his oath by ignoring the Constitution and abusing his power. As much as it hurts Trump's ego, our country elects presidents, not kings. Trump's desire to be a king ignores our Constitution and sullies his oath of office. **In the Senate, I will continue to hold Trump and his administration accountable, and I will fight to ensure that we uphold our Constitution and the promise to always fight for the people who elected us in the first place.** More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We will be in court today!
body:
Today, we will be in court for oral arguments on the City of Evanston’s motion to dismiss our lawsuit challenging the city’s race-based “reparations” program.

|
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Later today, we will be in court for oral arguments on the City of Evanston 's motion to dismiss our lawsuit challenging the city's race-based "reparations" program.**
**[And we need your help!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73834&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73834&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Our historic lawsuit argues that the city's use of race as an eligibility requirement for this program... _which makes $25,000 direct cash payments to black residents and descendants of black residents_ ...violates the Equal Protection Clause of the Fourteenth Amendment to the U.S. Constitution.

And the program uses race as a _proxy_ for discrimination, _without requiring actual proof of_ _discrimination_!

I am optimistic our lawsuit will proceed, because Evanston's program is clearly discriminatory and unconstitutional...yet sadly, reparations are gaining steam in other liberal cities and states across the country.

That's why Judicial Watch's class-action lawsuit on behalf of six white individuals is so critically important...**because if we prevail in Evanston we will be creating a potentially precedent-setting legal standard to challenge and strike down other _race-based_ programs**.

**[And that's why I am asking you to support us with a contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73834&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73834&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

However the court rules on the city's motion to dismiss our lawsuit, we will continue this litigation all the way to the end of the legal road...and that includes, if necessary, the federal appeals courts all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court!

We are committed to fighting for our "color-blind" Constitution and its "equal protection" guarantees for all Americans _where it counts_ , through the legal system and the courts.

But all our efforts...legal research, investigations, and filing lawsuits...come with very real price tags attached, especially when we are confronting the deep pockets of government lawyers!

That's why I am hopeful you will decide to join with us and help _[support all our work on behalf of the rule of law](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73834&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_ , with a special contribution today.

**Thank you in advance for your decision to support our work!**

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=73834&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

That's why Judicial Watch's class-action lawsuit on behalf of six white individuals is so critically important...because if we prevail in Evanston we will be creating a potentially precedent-setting legal standard to challenge and strike down other race-based programs. However the court rules on the city's motion to dismiss our lawsuit, we will continue this litigation all the way to the end of the legal road...and that includes, if necessary, the federal appeals courts all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court! We are committed to fighting for our "color-blind" Constitution and its "equal protection" guarantees for all Americans where it counts , through the legal system and the courts. But all our efforts...legal research, investigations, and filing lawsuits...come with very real price tags attached, especially when we are confronting the deep pockets of government lawyers! That's why I am hopeful you will decide to join with us and help , with a special contribution today. Thank you in advance for your decision to support our work! Sincerely, Thomas Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 (C)2024, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | |

subject: You’re breaking my heart, Friend

body:
The Radical Left is officially gaining the upper hand

|

| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmcikdb01k022dtju0152pcpu85f7paguqfoud68_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdgm2ob6c3h2bs)
---

_**[Your House Republican Membership is about to EXPIRE.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfk3a54ttvar0sonttl3gtj746i52dcjagd5ef4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdgm2ob6c3h2bs "Your House Republican Membership is about to EXPIRE.")**_ I'm not going to sugarcoat it - if you don't renew _NOW_ , we'll lose a crucial patriot in our fight against the Radical Left's socialist agenda.

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3130vh58ofbfkjcb4lt1ej2nhv7t4tq8pv5rqe0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdgm2ob6c3h2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

**I know I can count on you, Friend.** You've been a rock-solid supporter of our conservative movement for years, fighting alongside me and House Republicans against the Radical Left's attempts to undermine our values and destroy everything we've worked for.

__**[But I need you to renew your Membership today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7qpuk1f2kt2oh4sfka8sehpp0l9ndloa3ouodjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdgm2ob6c3h2bs "But I need you to renew your Membership today.")**__ We're on the cusp of the biggest battle of our lives, and I need to know if you're with me. **The Radical Left is gearing up to take down our conservative leaders and destroy everything we've worked for. We can't let that happen.**

Don't let the Radical Left gain the upper hand. _**[Renew NOW, Friend.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znt8ndk96shhri72lr1r2v1a3fauj2tonoepe0ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdgm2ob6c3h2bs "Renew NOW, Friend.")**_

Sincerely,

Rep. Anna Paulina Luna

Peter - Kellyanne Conway here.

I read your Voter Verification results and I must say that I'm impressed with your answers. You are the kind of American we want on our side to defend our Republican Senate majority.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: Spanberger for Governor HQ
subject: We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you.

| | | **☀️ **To each of Abigail's dear supporters, **🇺🇲**

We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom.
---
| | We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. _Our average gift last month was a hair under $30._

It adds up fast, but unfortunately, not everyone is in a position to give. And we completely understand that.
---
| | The fact is that our opponent knows we have momentum on our side, and Democrats nationwide view our race as a bellwether for 2026 (and beyond!). Moreover, Virginia has the only election this year where Democrats can flip a Governor’s seat blue.

_That's why the same far-right billionaire donors who sent Trump to the White House are pouring money into Winsome Earle-Sears' campaign._
---
| | Now, with the general election just weeks away, we have to ramp up our outreach to folks across the Commonwealth.

Our opponent is already paying for digital ads distorting Abigail's record, but it’s only going to get more intense. Setting the record straight is going to be expensive -- which is why our team set an ambitious fundraising goal for the month of May.
---
| | While it may not seem like much, if every person reading this email contributed even $5, we’d breeze past our goal and have enough resources to win.

[_**What do you say, Peter? If electing Abigail Spanberger is important to you, if flipping the Virginia Governor’s office seems worth $5 to you, make a contribution today to lay the groundwork for a big victory in November.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107252974/544087543/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-05-07_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFmYzQ1ZjMtNTQyYi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D7XRV201Kb2uAB_zEgQrF2KdRifPDTWH5-pX8msIE3U=)

clean_body: We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. | | | ☀️ To each of Abigail's dear supporters, 🇺🇲 We know we send you a lot of emails, but today's is especially important to read from top to bottom. | | We'll cut right to the chase: our strategy to flip Virginia blue depends on the small donations of people like you. Our average gift last month was a hair under $30. It adds up fast, but unfortunately, not everyone is in a position to give. And we completely understand that. | | The fact is that our opponent knows we have momentum on our side, and Democrats nationwide view our race as a bellwether for 2026 (and beyond!). Moreover, Virginia has the only election this year where Democrats can flip a Governor’s seat blue. That's why the same far-right billionaire donors who sent Trump to the White House are pouring money into Winsome Earle-Sears' campaign. | | Now, with the general election just weeks away, we have to ramp up our outreach to folks across the Commonwealth. Our opponent is already paying for digital ads distorting Abigail's record, but it’s only going to get more intense. Setting the record straight is going to be expensive -- which is why our team set an ambitious fundraising goal for the month of May. | | While it may not seem like much, if every person reading this email contributed even $5, we’d breeze past our goal and have enough resources to win. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = | | 💪 Your support means so much at this critical moment of the race. ♥️ Together, Spanberger for Governor HQ * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: billionaires first, veterans last
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m fighting every day to deliver on the promises we’ve made to veterans.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4701%2E35263%2EyxXqc-)
Peter — Trump’s budget puts billionaires first and veterans last. If his budget plan moves forward, the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs workforce will be slashed by 80,000 workers, making it harder for veterans to receive their hard-earned benefits. **This administration’s budget cuts and federal layoffs are already affecting military veterans in Milwaukee.** Recently, I spoke with a group of local veterans, past and present VA employees, and advocates who shared what these cuts mean for veterans. I listened as they described how difficult it’s become to access essential health appointments, with some having to schedule appointments weeks in advance to receive care. It’s unfathomable that the brave men and women who serve our country are being cast aside by Trump and unelected billionaire Elon Musk in the name of “efficiency” and tax cuts for the wealthiest among us. We’ve made promises to people who donned the uniform and went into harm’s way on behalf of all our freedoms. **We need to keep those promises.** **[I’m fighting every day to deliver on the promises we’ve made to veterans. I’m listening to our vets and will continue to push back against the Trump administration’s proposed cuts to the VA. If you can support this fight with a grassroots donation today, I’d be grateful to have you in my corner.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-may25.qIHRRA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4701%2E35263%2EyxXqc-)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-may25.N_R_0O&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4701%2E35263%2EyxXqc-)

* **TOP NEWS**

"**UT System chancellor leaves to lead University of California** ," Texas Tribune's **Ayden Runnels** \-- "University of Texas System Chancellor **JB Milliken** will leave the 256,000-student system to take a new out-of-state position as University of California president, system officials said Friday.

"We are fortunate to have had Chancellor Milliken at the helm of the UT System for almost seven years," said UT System Regents' Chair **Kevin P. Eltife** in a statement. "The board and I are grateful for our close and very productive relationship with him, and we are proud of what we accomplished together. He has led the UT System admirably and innovatively."

Milliken was appointed as UT System chancellor in 2018 after spending years as chancellor for City University of New York, and has also served as president of the University of Nebraska. Milliken was named the new president of the University of California on Friday, and will enter that role in August, according to statements from UC and the UT System.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/2130f829-ec75-4219-97fd-e801438487f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**John Zerwas** , the University of Texas System's executive vice chancellor for health affairs and a former Republican member of the Texas House, will serve as acting chancellor when Milliken leaves in June, according to a news release from the UT System. Zerwas, who is a doctor, retired from the Legislature in 2019 after seven terms in the House, at one point serving as chair of the budget-writing House Appropriations committee.

Eltife praised Zerwas' work as vice chancellor and his ability to strengthen partnerships between UT and health institutions.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/2130f829-ec75-4219-97fd-e801438487f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We continue to have the benefit of Dr. Zerwas' long and distinguished service in the Texas Legislature as a higher education advocate and budget expert," Eltife said." TOP NEWS "UT System chancellor leaves to lead University of California ," Texas Tribune's Ayden Runnels \-- "University of Texas System Chancellor JB Milliken will leave the 256,000-student system to take a new out-of-state position as University of California president, system officials said Friday. "We are fortunate to have had Chancellor Milliken at the helm of the UT System for almost seven years," said UT System Regents' Chair Kevin P. Eltife in a statement. "The board and I are grateful for our close and very productive relationship with him, and we are proud of what we accomplished together. He has led the UT System admirably and innovatively." Milliken was appointed as UT System chancellor in 2018 after spending years as chancellor for City University of New York, and has also served as president of the University of Nebraska. Milliken was named the new president of the University of California on Friday, and will enter that role in August, according to statements from UC and the UT System. John Zerwas , the University of Texas System's executive vice chancellor for health affairs and a former Republican member of the Texas House, will serve as acting chancellor when Milliken leaves in June, according to a news release from the UT System. Zerwas, who is a doctor, retired from the Legislature in 2019 after seven terms in the House, at one point serving as chair of the budget-writing House Appropriations committee. Eltife praised Zerwas' work as vice chancellor and his ability to strengthen partnerships between UT and health institutions. "We continue to have the benefit of Dr. Zerwas' long and distinguished service in the Texas Legislature as a higher education advocate and budget expert," Eltife said." subject: Trump is all-in for Blakeman. Are you all-in with us?
