body:
| | Dear Friends,

Donald Trump just endorsed Bruce Blakeman — and Blakeman couldn’t be prouder. He’s out there bragging about it like it’s some kind of badge of honor.

**[If that doesn’t fire you up, it should. Chip in right now to help us fight back and flip this seat — before Trumpism takes deeper root in Nassau.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107254269/544091588/-1414184198?contactdata=pcL3mcPXznmSnVGPB0HG7mc9ZJU2P3H65rFAm0LzUYEZqJY8iKF6qdyndMmbGDqmUYWDv4uReBpAzSYCtJcDayz9SsrOGVK2hFiwhXdmy8c=&am=50.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDE5ZmEyMzMtNTcyYi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XQBKNbgBJ1VFPdkmbn_dP63LOiD7bHkv9Rp-8vGp3Fw=&emci=19293396-472b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=d19fa233-572b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=17551891)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107254270/544091589/-1414184198?contactdata=pcL3mcPXznmSnVGPB0HG7mc9ZJU2P3H65rFAm0LzUYEZqJY8iKF6qdyndMmbGDqmUYWDv4uReBpAzSYCtJcDayz9SsrOGVK2hFiwhXdmy8c=&am=50.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDE5ZmEyMzMtNTcyYi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XQBKNbgBJ1VFPdkmbn_dP63LOiD7bHkv9Rp-8vGp3Fw=&emci=19293396-472b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=d19fa233-572b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=17551891)
Let’s call it what it is: Blakeman is hitching his wagon to Trump’s toxic agenda because he’s out of ideas and out of touch. While he’s busy chasing headlines and polishing press releases, Nassau is missing out — to the tune of $9 billion in lost private investment.

That’s not leadership. That’s failure.

**[I’m running to flip the script — to fight for Nassau families, not Trump’s politics. We deserve real leadership, not another loudmouth looking for the next Fox News hit. Will you join my team?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107254271/544091590/-1414184198?contactdata=pcL3mcPXznmSnVGPB0HG7mc9ZJU2P3H65rFAm0LzUYEZqJY8iKF6qdyndMmbGDqmUYWDv4uReBpAzSYCtJcDayz9SsrOGVK2hFiwhXdmy8c=&am=50.00&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDE5ZmEyMzMtNTcyYi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XQBKNbgBJ1VFPdkmbn_dP63LOiD7bHkv9Rp-8vGp3Fw=&emci=19293396-472b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=d19fa233-572b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=17551891)**

Let’s show them Nassau doesn’t back down. Join us.

Thanks for being in this fight,
Seth Koslow

* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**UT System chancellor leaves to lead University of California** ," Texas Tribune's **Ayden Runnels** \-- "University of Texas System Chancellor **JB Milliken** will leave the 256,000-student system to take a new out-of-state position as University of California president, system officials said Friday.

"We are fortunate to have had Chancellor Milliken at the helm of the UT System for almost seven years," said UT System Regents' Chair **Kevin P. Eltife** in a statement. "The board and I are grateful for our close and very productive relationship with him, and we are proud of what we accomplished together. He has led the UT System admirably and innovatively."

Milliken was appointed as UT System chancellor in 2018 after spending years as chancellor for City University of New York, and has also served as president of the University of Nebraska. Milliken was named the new president of the University of California on Friday, and will enter that role in August, according to statements from UC and the UT System.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/78439053-529b-4a1a-864d-82454e16d0c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**John Zerwas** , the University of Texas System's executive vice chancellor for health affairs and a former Republican member of the Texas House, will serve as acting chancellor when Milliken leaves in June, according to a news release from the UT System. Zerwas, who is a doctor, retired from the Legislature in 2019 after seven terms in the House, at one point serving as chair of the budget-writing House Appropriations committee.

Eltife praised Zerwas' work as vice chancellor and his ability to strengthen partnerships between UT and health institutions.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/78439053-529b-4a1a-864d-82454e16d0c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We continue to have the benefit of Dr. Zerwas' long and distinguished service in the Texas Legislature as a higher education advocate and budget expert," Eltife said." Read the most recent FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . TOP NEWS "UT System chancellor leaves to lead University of California ," Texas Tribune's Ayden Runnels \-- "University of Texas System Chancellor JB Milliken will leave the 256,000-student system to take a new out-of-state position as University of California president, system officials said Friday. "We are fortunate to have had Chancellor Milliken at the helm of the UT System for almost seven years," said UT System Regents' Chair Kevin P. Eltife in a statement. "The board and I are grateful for our close and very productive relationship with him, and we are proud of what we accomplished together. He has led the UT System admirably and innovatively." Milliken was appointed as UT System chancellor in 2018 after spending years as chancellor for City University of New York, and has also served as president of the University of Nebraska. Milliken was named the new president of the University of California on Friday, and will enter that role in August, according to statements from UC and the UT System. John Zerwas , the University of Texas System's executive vice chancellor for health affairs and a former Republican member of the Texas House, will serve as acting chancellor when Milliken leaves in June, according to a news release from the UT System. Zerwas, who is a doctor, retired from the Legislature in 2019 after seven terms in the House, at one point serving as chair of the budget-writing House Appropriations committee. Eltife praised Zerwas' work as vice chancellor and his ability to strengthen partnerships between UT and health institutions. "We continue to have the benefit of Dr. Zerwas' long and distinguished service in the Texas Legislature as a higher education advocate and budget expert," Eltife said." * **TOP NEWS**

"**UT System chancellor leaves to lead University of California** ,” Texas Tribune's **Ayden Runnels** \-- "University of Texas System Chancellor **JB Milliken** will leave the 256,000-student system to take a new out-of-state position as University of California president, system officials said Friday.

"We are fortunate to have had Chancellor Milliken at the helm of the UT System for almost seven years,” said UT System Regents' Chair **Kevin P. Eltife** in a statement. “The board and I are grateful for our close and very productive relationship with him, and we are proud of what we accomplished together. He has led the UT System admirably and innovatively."

Milliken was appointed as UT System chancellor in 2018 after spending years as chancellor for City University of New York, and has also served as president of the University of Nebraska. Milliken was named the new president of the University of California on Friday, and will enter that role in August, according to statements from UC and the UT System.

**John Zerwas** , the University of Texas System’s executive vice chancellor for health affairs and a former Republican member of the Texas House, will serve as acting chancellor when Milliken leaves in June, according to a news release from the UT System. Zerwas, who is a doctor, retired from the Legislature in 2019 after seven terms in the House, at one point serving as chair of the budget-writing House Appropriations committee.

Eltife praised Zerwas’ work as vice chancellor and his ability to strengthen partnerships between UT and health institutions.

Sign up now and invite your friends and family to be part of the informed. | TOP NEWS "UT System chancellor leaves to lead University of California ,” Texas Tribune's Ayden Runnels \-- "University of Texas System Chancellor JB Milliken will leave the 256,000-student system to take a new out-of-state position as University of California president, system officials said Friday. "We are fortunate to have had Chancellor Milliken at the helm of the UT System for almost seven years,” said UT System Regents' Chair Kevin P. Eltife in a statement. “The board and I are grateful for our close and very productive relationship with him, and we are proud of what we accomplished together. He has led the UT System admirably and innovatively." Milliken was appointed as UT System chancellor in 2018 after spending years as chancellor for City University of New York, and has also served as president of the University of Nebraska. Milliken was named the new president of the University of California on Friday, and will enter that role in August, according to statements from UC and the UT System. » John Zerwas , the University of Texas System’s executive vice chancellor for health affairs and a former Republican member of the Texas House, will serve as acting chancellor when Milliken leaves in June, according to a news release from the UT System. Zerwas, who is a doctor, retired from the Legislature in 2019 after seven terms in the House, at one point serving as chair of the budget-writing House Appropriations committee. Eltife praised Zerwas’ work as vice chancellor and his ability to strengthen partnerships between UT and health institutions. » “We continue to have the benefit of Dr. Zerwas’ long and distinguished service in the Texas Legislature as a higher education advocate and budget expert,” Eltife said." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: New PA Project Education Fund
subject: You're Registered to Vote, Now What?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/NPP_Ed_logo_RGB_green1-01.jpg]
Hi Friend,
Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter!
In our previous edition we warned about the slippery slope we were in when it came to deportations.
Since, the Trump regime has wrongly detained dozens of U.S. citizens — including a ten-year-old Texas girl [https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/us-citizen-child-recovering-brain-cancer-deported-mexico-undocumented-rcna196049] recovering from brain cancer, a 19-year-old U.S. citizen with learning disabilities who was [https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/04/us-citizen-jose-hermosillo-wrongly-detained-ice-patrol-governments-account-false/?fbclid=IwY2xjawJ2Qi9leHRuA2FlbQIxMQBicmlkETFPbU5wOTFVREhWYktoNnc5AR7Fe9oVKjamHuG3WmhfyvfnCRNedF3MORvKe81-https://www.motherjones.com/politics/2025/04/us-citizen-jose-hermosillo-wrongly-detained-ice-patrol-governments-account-false/] wrongfully incarcerated [https://popular.info/p/federal-immigration-authorities-wrongfully] for 10 days in a privately run immigration detention facility in Arizona or a 20-year-old born in Georgia [https://www.nbcnews.com/news/latino/us-born-citizen-detained-ice-immigration-florida-rcna201800] , and arrested in Florida.
All mistakes, that cause fear in the American population. The deportation of Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, who, due to an “administrative error,” was sent to a dangerous and violent mega-prison in El Salvador, does not help ease the fear.
The Fifth and Fourteenth Amendments to the Constitution [https://www.law.cornell.edu/wex/due_process] establish the right to due process — the Fifth Amendment says that “[n]o person shall ... be deprived of life, liberty, or property, without due process of law.” The Fourteenth Amendment extends this obligation to the states.
No PERSON. This is true even for the undocumented, even if someone is here without authorization.
Due process for Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, should have included notice of deportation and the opportunity to contest it before it happened. Now even as the Supreme Court has ruled for his return, he has yet to be returned home
We remember Fannie Lou Hamer's statement: "No one is free until everyone is free," which is more relevant today than ever.
REGISTER TO VOTE [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
Social Media of the Week
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/Screenshot%202025-04-24%20110558.png] "I'll tell you what freedom is to me: no fear." – Nina Simone
Nina Simone was a classically trained pianist (not common for a young Black woman in the 1950s) who fused her foundation with jazz, gospel, blues, and folk to create a sound entirely her own, defying all genres.
She didn’t fit into a box or label, nor did she try to.
Simone was denied entry to a prestigious music school, the Curtis Institute of Music in Philadelphia, because of her race. This moment fueled her lifelong work in civil rights.
Her songs like “Mississippi Goddam” became an anthem for civil rights and Black empowerment nationally.
"An artist's duty is to reflect the times." – Nina Simone
#NinaSimone [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/ninasimone?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R] #BlackHistory [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/blackhistory?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R] #CivilRights [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/civilrights?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZViLdRd4IdJCtrYBGLEVTsPypsKpd6j0yaJmAcVXReBXdJJtwHk4ez66hT4UrL2bj7DBCdw6k-jLVGQf2hZ2Rvg2Ic85g5mN6f5_osQMI3oU5fwxrWsV4zVuFTAzsS68tQ-im0MyR10YVg0qkqSDvfYOhYedO-ZcnQeMoFAbdzmLA&__tn__=*NK-R]
SHARE ON FACEBOOK [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/ [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
Let's save our planet by saving our democracy.

Happy #EarthDay [https://www.instagram.com/explore/tags/earthday/] from NPPEF - remember you have the choice to voice your vote for leaders and legislations that protect our only home, planet Earth.
SHARE ON INSTAGRAM [https://www.instagram.com/p/DIwHhQRzQNo/]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/7237344C447445787878394747342B75584E47375A57552F745265427662334B544A4A36505A58657A5871474B7A5A6E53705571424758325657365969365747/editor_images/WCM%20logo.JPG] #CourtsMatter
The U.S. Justice Department withdrew its lawsuit [https://triblive.com/news/pennsylvania/justice-department-drops-lawsuit-accusing-pennsylvania-city-of-diluting-power-of-hispanic-voters/] that accused the heavily Hispanic city of Hazleton in Pennsylvania of illegally diluting the political power of its growing Hispanic population. The department’s initial lawsuit, filed in January, said the “at-large” system of electing city council members, as opposed to electing them by district, was unfair to Hispanic voters and prevented them from getting elected to city council. Hazleton’s 30,000 residents are about two-thirds Hispanic, according to U.S. Census figures. One-third is non-Hispanic white.
Closer to Philadelphia, the largest health system in Delaware County began closing two hospitals [https://6abc.com/post/crozer-health-hospital-emergency-rooms-stop-accepting-patients/16228691/] Wednesday after a federal judge in Texas approved their bankruptcy proceedings. The emergency rooms of Taylor Hospital in Ridley Park and Crozer-Chester Medical Center in Upland are expected to close today, Friday, April 25th. Emergency medical services will end next Friday, on May 2. Crozer's ambulatory centers at Brinton Lakes, Broomall, Haverford, and Media are expected to remain open.
This November, voters will have the power to retain or vacate three seats of the Pennsylvania Supreme Court.
The votes cast by powerful Pennsylvania voters in November will impact our lives for years to come, as Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court will make decisions about our election administration, immigrant rights. access to abortion, the safety of our workplaces, how bankruptcies are handled, and the right to unionize. Make sure you can voice your vote!
CHECK YOUR REGISTRATION [https://vote.pa/check/?org=nppef]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA016/1/99735/images/DelCo_2.png] We are hiring!
Let's provide civic education together!
We're looking for people passionate about voting rights in Erie, Lawrence, Lehigh Valley, Bucks, Montgomery, Chester, and Delaware County to help us shape the future of Pennsylvania.
Join our team and help us provide civic education in our communities and register folks to vote!
Positions start at $20 an hour.
Interested? Contact jobs@nppef.org
EMAIL US [jobs@nppef.org]
News You Can Use
State Rep. David Rowe (R-Union) wants to introduce a bill to make it easier for hunters and fishermen to get registered to vote [https://www.palegis.us/house/co-sponsorship/memo?memoID=46210] . He represents a lot of sportsmen in the rural 85th state House District, which includes parts of Union, Juniata, and Mifflin counties and all of Snyder County.
“The bill will not complicate the process of getting a license. The bill will not add another step to the hunting license process,” Rowe told Capital-Star [https://penncapital-star.com/government-politics/general-assembly/state-rep-david-rowe-wants-to-make-it-easier-for-sportsmen-to-register-to-vote/] . “Rather, it will simply make it more accessible. So, for sportsmen that are going to a state office, there will be paper registration forms available for them to simply grab.”
As a voting rights organization, we applaud all legislation that would make it easier for people to register to vote, and make our voices to be heard at the ballot box.
Meanwhile, Pennsylvania’s first two openly autistic legislators, State Reps. Jessica Behnam (D-Allegheny) and Abigail Sailsbury (D-Allegheny), condemned the comments made by the Department of Health Secretary, Robert F. Kennedy Jr., attacking autistic people [https://www.witf.org/2025/04/23/pa-lawmakers-some-on-the-autism-spectrum-denounce-rfk-jr-comments/] . They are also opposed to his plan to collect private medical records from US citizens to research autism. Remember that slippery slope regarding immigrant deportations?
And if you are waiting for a tax return but have defaulted student loans, there is a chance the government will garnish your return and even your wages. The Department of Education announced Monday it will restart collections on defaulted federal student loans on May 5 [https://thehill.com/homenews/education/5259465-education-department-defaulted-federal-student-loans-debt-collection-trump-mcmahon] , including potentially garnishing wages for millions of workers. The Treasury Offset Program allows the government to withhold federal payments such as tax returns for individuals in default. After a 30-day notice, the federal government could also begin garnishing a borrower’s wages. So make sure to check your statement.
NPPEF on the Ground

Many 17 year old students don't know this and might pass up the opportunity to register to vote, thinking they have to be 18 at time of registering.
It's our passion to bridge the gap here on civic education.

clean_body: [] Hi Friend, Welcome to the latest New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) newsletter! In our previous edition we warned about the slippery slope we were in when it came to deportations. Since, the Trump regime has wrongly detained dozens of U.S. citizens — including a ten-year-old Texas girl [] recovering from brain cancer, a 19-year-old U.S. citizen with learning disabilities who was [] wrongfully incarcerated [] for 10 days in a privately run immigration detention facility in Arizona or a 20-year-old born in Georgia [] , and arrested in Florida. All mistakes, that cause fear in the American population. The deportation of Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, who, due to an “administrative error,” was sent to a dangerous and violent mega-prison in El Salvador, does not help ease the fear. The Fifth and Fourteenth Amendments to the Constitution [] establish the right to due process — the Fifth Amendment says that “[n]o person shall ... be deprived of life, liberty, or property, without due process of law.” The Fourteenth Amendment extends this obligation to the states. No PERSON. This is true even for the undocumented, even if someone is here without authorization. Due process for Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia, should have included notice of deportation and the opportunity to contest it before it happened. Now even as the Supreme Court has ruled for his return, he has yet to be returned home We remember Fannie Lou Hamer's statement: "No one is free until everyone is free," which is more relevant today than ever. REGISTER TO VOTE [] Social Media of the Week [] "I'll tell you what freedom is to me: no fear." – Nina Simone Nina Simone was a classically trained pianist (not common for a young Black woman in the 1950s) who fused her foundation with jazz, gospel, blues, and folk to create a sound entirely her own, defying all genres. She didn’t fit into a box or label, nor did she try to. Simone was denied entry to a prestigious music school, the Curtis Institute of Music in Philadelphia, because of her race. This moment fueled her lifelong work in civil rights. Her songs like “Mississippi Goddam” became an anthem for civil rights and Black empowerment nationally. "An artist's duty is to reflect the times." – Nina Simone #NinaSimone [] #BlackHistory [] #CivilRights [] SHARE ON FACEBOOK [] [] Let's save our planet by saving our democracy. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23046%2E4449941%2E0XpICa) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23046%2E4449941%2E0XpICa) [**★ TRUMP PRESIDENTIAL STRAW POLL ★
Responses due by MIDNIGHT **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61096?t=3&akid=23046%2E4449941%2E0XpICa) [**BREAKING FROM _MSNBC_ : Donald Trump's approval rating is at the lowest of any modern president at this point, except for his own first term. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61096?t=4&akid=23046%2E4449941%2E0XpICa) [**Do you approve of President Donald Trump? -> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61096?t=5&akid=23046%2E4449941%2E0XpICa) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61096?t=6&akid=23046%2E4449941%2E0XpICa) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61096?t=7&akid=23046%2E4449941%2E0XpICa)

Donald Trump has spent the first three months of his Presidency wreaking havoc on the American people. He and his "Co-President" Elon Musk have GUTTED federal agencies providing crucial benefits, have bullied and slapped crippling tariffs on close allies, and even boisterously refused to follow court orders!
[**And now Trump 's dictatorial bully tactics have our nearly 250-year-old democracy in a CONSTITUTIONAL CRISIS!

It's absolutely DESPICABLE!! We can only imagine what another four years of chaos will bring... **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61096?t=11&akid=23046%2E4449941%2E0XpICa)
We know American leadership like Trump's only leads to uncertainty, chaos and isolation, and the destruction already unleashed onto the government might take DECADES to repair!

**But we 're not sure _how many_ Americans approve of Trump's leadership three months into his presidency.**

[**So we 're urgently reaching out to top Fight for Reform members in your city to see if they approve. Your answer is CRUCIAL to showing how Trump's tactics are terribly unpopular with the American people!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61096?t=12&akid=23046%2E4449941%2E0XpICa)
[**Do you approve of President Donald Trump? -> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61096?t=13&akid=23046%2E4449941%2E0XpICa)

_\- Fight for Reform_

name: Team Crow
subject: Putting your voice front and center
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
This much is clear, folks: We need to take back political power 2026.

Donald Trump has been in office for a little over 3 months — and in that time, he’s attacked working families, worked to rip away Americans’ health care, and tried to push through more handouts and tax breaks for the wealthy and well-connected.

Republicans have refused to stand up to Trump’s extreme agenda, which means we need to elect Democrats to Congress who will.

As the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s (DCCC) new Recruitment Co-Chair, Jason is leading House Democrats’ strategy to take back the House in 2026 — and he wants to put the voices of folks like you front and center.

That’s why we’re reaching out today with our May Priorities Survey. Your responses will help guide Jason’s work to flip the House blue and elect Democrats across the country who will bring a new generation of leadership to Congress.

So what’s on your mind today? What issues are keeping you up at night? Let Jason know by filling out our survey today >> [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/may-priorities-survey-1]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/may-priorities-survey-1]

Thanks for taking the time to respond.

— Team Crow
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Trump’s budget: billionaires first, working Americans last
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
This is no surprise, Peter: Trump’s new budget is a disaster. **His proposed budget includes massive cuts to Medicare and Medicaid, public education and food benefits, and rental assistance and small business development.** Since Donald Trump returned to office, his administration has made it abundantly clear that he cares more for billionaires than the millions of Americans who need access to affordable health care or the families across the country who rely on public schools. **Trump and Republicans’ agenda is obvious, Peter: billionaires first, Americans _last_.** Their partisan budget is a front to peddle Trump’s corruption and put Americans dead last. We can't let that happen.**

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. # [#]
Peter, it’s official – Gov. Abbott signed his billionaire-backed school voucher scam into law over the weekend. It’s a disaster.

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-may25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_050725_HEADLINES_30DO_D1_S1

It’s estimated that a billion tax dollars will be spent on Abbott’s voucher scam in the first two years. Reallocating money from Texas public schools will lead to closures in underserved areas and undermine protections for students of color and students with disabilities.

Evidence shows that vouchers overwhelmingly benefit the wealthy, and they don’t lead to better academic outcomes for our students.

We absolutely must mobilize supporters at every level to elect a new generation of progressive leadership in Texas who will help us fix this mess.

Can we count on you to support our efforts on the ground? Together, we can work to ensure our public schools are places where ALL students can learn and succeed – no matter their age, race, gender, or ZIP Code.

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-may25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_050725_HEADLINES_30DO_D1_S1

Thanks, Peter.– Texas Organizing Project PAC

clean_body: Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Peter, it’s official – Gov. Abbott signed his billionaire-backed school voucher scam into law over the weekend. It’s a disaster. It’s estimated that a billion tax dollars will be spent on Abbott’s voucher scam in the first two years. Reallocating money from Texas public schools will lead to closures in underserved areas and undermine protections for students of color and students with disabilities. Evidence shows that vouchers overwhelmingly benefit the wealthy, and they don’t lead to better academic outcomes for our students. We absolutely must mobilize supporters at every level to elect a new generation of progressive leadership in Texas who will help us fix this mess. Can we count on you to support our efforts on the ground? Together, we can work to ensure our public schools are places where ALL students can learn and succeed – no matter their age, race, gender, or ZIP Code. Thanks, Peter.– Texas Organizing Project PAC [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. To date, TOP PAC has mobilized hundreds of thousands of voters across the state with the aim of transforming Texas and building a reflective democracy — one that looks like us and shares our values. For more information, visit toppac.org [] . [] CONTRIBUTE » [] [] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY » [] [] LEARN MORE » [] Pol. adv. paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac.org [] , not authorized by any federal, state, or local candidate or candidate’s committee. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

body:
| |
---
Oppose Taxpayer Funded Gardasil Advertising | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUzNzU2NTQ4Njg0ODQyODg4LFwiclwiOjE1Mzc1NjY0MzMwNjI0MzQ0Nn0iLCJzIjoiYjg3ZjQ3MjVjNDMwNGM4NiJ9)

---
|
---
# ACTION ALERT: STOP THE GARDASIL BILL
|
---
Rep. Donna Howard is targeting vulnerable college students with HB 1787. During this bill’s hearing, Rep. Howard stated that the bill would require the state to promote Gardasil shots as a means to prevent HPV and cancer on college campuses though this text is **_not in the bill_**. If this bill passes, your college students will be inundated with **state-funded, predatory marketing campaigns** **p****romoting Gardasil** , and we have had no reliable assurances that an HPV vaccine mandate will not be considered as part of a statewide strategy to lower HPV rates among young men and women.
|
---
# MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD
|
---
### **EMAIL AND CALL YOUR STATE REPRESENTATIVE**
Use our public [House Directory](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUzNzU2NTQ4NzA0NzY1ODQ1LFwiclwiOjE1Mzc1NjY0MzMwNjI0MzQ0Nn0iLCJzIjoiNjEwMzA4NzZlMmVhOGVlMCJ9) to find contact info for your State Representative. **Not sure** who your State Representative is? Click [here](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTUzNzU2NTQ4NzE0MjAzMDM2LFwiclwiOjE1Mzc1NjY0MzMwNjI0MzQ0Nn0iLCJzIjoiNTg0NDM1NTBiZWY0NTVjNCJ9), enter your address, and look for:
“Representative [Name]
Texas House District [Number]”
_Your State Rep should be the second name on the list of results._
**Then use the linked directory to call and email.**
_[](mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov)_
| |
---
|
---
### ****SAMPLE EMAIL MESSAGE:
SUBJECT: Vote NO on HB 1787
Dear Representative, I am writing to you today to ask you to please vote “no” on HB 1787 that is up for a vote in the full House Thursday, May 8. This bill would use our state resources to market an unproven, unpopular and liability-free pharmaceutical product to Texas college students. Thank you,
[YOUR NAME] _Or use your own personal experience in your email to the committee regarding why state funds should not advertise for-profit, liability-free products._****
_[](mailto:kevin.sparks@senate.texas.gov)_
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
##### Texans for Vaccine Choice
1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States |

Derek-
With just days to go, I'm making one last call for sponsors to support the Young Democrats of America and the Minnesota Young DFL as we host our **Spring National Meeting** in**Minneapolis, Minnesota,** from **May 9 -11** at the Royal Sonesta Downtown.

We're expecting nearly 150 Young Democrats from across the country for a powerful weekend of training, networking, and organizing under the theme: "**Winning and Governing: The Minnesota Blueprint for Progress.** " We're excited to be joined by a number of amazing elected officials including **State Representative Athena Hollins,** **State Senator Zaynab Mohamed, State Steve Cwodzinski, **and **Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan**. **YDA is a completely volunteer-led organization, every dollar you give goes directly to supporting our mission** -- helping us run accessible, high-impact programming that prepares young Democrats to win elections and govern effectively.

We're doing a last call for persons or campaigns interested in supporting the Young Democrats of America at our **Friends of Young Democrats** (**$100), Bronze ($250)**,**Silver ($500)** , and **Gold ($1000)** sponsorship levels.

---

clean_body: | | Derek- With just days to go, I'm making one last call for sponsors to support the Young Democrats of America and the Minnesota Young DFL as we host our Spring National Meeting inMinneapolis, Minnesota, from May 9 -11 at the Royal Sonesta Downtown. We're expecting nearly 150 Young Democrats from across the country for a powerful weekend of training, networking, and organizing under the theme: "Winning and Governing: The Minnesota Blueprint for Progress. " We're excited to be joined by a number of amazing elected officials including State Representative Athena Hollins, State Senator Zaynab Mohamed, State Steve Cwodzinski, and Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan. YDA is a completely volunteer-led organization, every dollar you give goes directly to supporting our mission -- helping us run accessible, high-impact programming that prepares young Democrats to win elections and govern effectively. We're doing a last call for persons or campaigns interested in supporting the Young Democrats of America at our Friends of Young Democrats ($100), Bronze ($250),Silver ($500) , and Gold ($1000) sponsorship levels. "Circle symbol \(disambiguation\") Friend of YDA ($100) Name listed in the event program Social media recognition 🟤 Bronze Sponsor ($250) 2 Reception tickets Podium recognition during opening session Name/Logo on Sponsorship Board All Friend of YDA benefits ⚪️ Silver Sponsor ($500) Logo and link to your company or individual website listed on the conference website All Bronze Sponsor benefits Gold Sponsor ($1,000) Podium recognition during opening and closing sessions Speaking opportunity to the meeting on Saturday 5/10 Advertisement slide during all general session To become a meeting sponsor: . You can also find out more information about our upcoming meeting at Your investment goes towards the mission of YDA, which is to engage young people across the country to train the next generation of Democratic leaders, elect Democrats, and advocate for progressive issues. We appreciate your consideration and continue to value your support every day -- please do not hesitate to reach out with any questions. Quentin Wathum-Ocama President, Young Democrats of America qocama@yda.org 651-367-4724 | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Only if you can afford it
body:
If stopping Trump's agenda and electing Democrats that will hold him accountable is important to you...
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=569%2E2563979%2ESFxaeB)

$5.
That is the donation Kamala Harris is hoping you'll make to the Democratic National Committee today. Yes, $5.
$5 because the DNC is leading the fight to stop Trump from cutting funding for lifesaving programs in order to give tax cuts for some of the richest people in this country.
$5 because the DNC is also leading the fight to hold Trump accountable in the courts -- already initiating a lawsuit to stop a Trump executive order that would suppress voters and upend voter registration systems.
$5 because yes, the DNC is also leading the fight to elect Democrats across the country, including taking back the House so we can stop his agenda in Congress.
As you can imagine -- doing all of that is expensive. We're sure you'd also agree it's important work that must be done.
But the only way to fund that work to successful completion is with the generous donations of people who care enough about the outcomes to act.
We know that $5 may not seem like it can do all that, but as you read this, lots and lots of people are donating to the DNC. Now they are hopeful you'll add a donation of your own.
What do you say?
[**If stopping Trump's agenda and electing Democrats who will hold him accountable feels worth $5 to you, and if you are able to make that donation, Kamala Harris is hopeful you'll use this link to do it today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250507-1B&refcode2=569_2563979_SFxaeB&akid=569%2E2563979%2ESFxaeB)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em250507-1B&refcode2=569_2563979_SFxaeB&akid=569%2E2563979%2ESFxaeB)**

| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em250507-1B&refcode2=569_2563979_SFxaeB&akid=569%2E2563979%2ESFxaeB)**

Thank you in advance for contributing. It means a lot to the VP, and to our chances in the fight ahead.
Team Kamala

subject: Friend, regarding your Membership

body:
I regret to inform you that your House GOP Membership has expired...

|
---
| | | Friend,

I wouldn't be coming to you like this if it wasn't important.

My team just informed me that, as of today, your House GOP Membership has **expired.**

This is no cause for alarm - **[but I'm going to ask you to step up and renew your Membership for 2025 right away.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmt3bsto0l3vsh8m7i1a1pad7i57852399dgjs10_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdgm1p76cjh2bs "but I’m going to ask you to step up and renew your Membership for 2025 right away.")**

---

---

I would hate to lose a member of our team like you, Friend.

I know how hard you worked to elect Republicans and send Democrats packing last year, and we need that same grit and determination this year.

**[So without further ado, will you please renew your House GOP Membership for 2025 immediately?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zus99o5t2jlqdoi3pqunu9u34hmpblnfoef8t5l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob3cdgm1p76cjh2bs "So without further ado, will you please renew your House GOP Membership for 2025 immediately?")**

---

I hope to see your name atop our revised Membership roster soon.

Sincerely,

Speaker Mike Johnson

name: Nikki Budzinski HQ
subject: What are your priorities?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107260425/544111623/753003349?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmFkMjM5Mi02MDJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4I04I0aM6Ksq4jVaCJPOWEbyP7LyP_hqzqgc5iuE0fI=)
Friend,

Nikki’s top priority in Congress will always be fighting for what matters to working families in IL-13. Right now, she’s working to protect Medicaid and SNAP from devastating cuts proposed by Republicans in Congress.

While families are struggling to make ends meet, House Republicans are voting on a resolution to officially rename the Gulf of Mexico.

We need politicians in Congress, like Nikki, who are focused on making life better for the people of our district – not wasting their time. Although it seems early to focus on next year’s midterm elections, Nikki already has two declared Republican opponents. If they flip this seat, they will become a rubber stamp for ignoring the urgent needs facing Central and Southern Illinoisans.

We flipped this seat blue back in 2022 in large part due to the support of people like you. We’re calling on you again to support Nikki as she works for us in Congress – not with donations, but with your responses to our May priorities survey.

**[While Nikki and the team are meeting with hundreds of Illinoisans across the district, it’s impossible to reach everyone at once. That’s why we’re counting on you to be one of the 250 supporters we need to complete our survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107260426/544111625/68469987?refcode=em-5.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmFkMjM5Mi02MDJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4I04I0aM6Ksq4jVaCJPOWEbyP7LyP_hqzqgc5iuE0fI=&emci=d8862b8c-602b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=26ad2392-602b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13891387)**
| **[Begin the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107260427/544111626/68469987?refcode=em-5.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmFkMjM5Mi02MDJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4I04I0aM6Ksq4jVaCJPOWEbyP7LyP_hqzqgc5iuE0fI=&emci=d8862b8c-602b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=26ad2392-602b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13891387)**

Your participation in this survey will help form our next steps on the campaign trail.

Thank you,

Team Budzinski

clean_body: | = Friend, Nikki’s top priority in Congress will always be fighting for what matters to working families in IL-13. Right now, she’s working to protect Medicaid and SNAP from devastating cuts proposed by Republicans in Congress. While families are struggling to make ends meet, House Republicans are voting on a resolution to officially rename the Gulf of Mexico. We need politicians in Congress, like Nikki, who are focused on making life better for the people of our district – not wasting their time. Although it seems early to focus on next year’s midterm elections, Nikki already has two declared Republican opponents. If they flip this seat, they will become a rubber stamp for ignoring the urgent needs facing Central and Southern Illinoisans. We flipped this seat blue back in 2022 in large part due to the support of people like you. We’re calling on you again to support Nikki as she works for us in Congress – not with donations, but with your responses to our May priorities survey. | Your participation in this survey will help form our next steps on the campaign trail. subject: A convicted felon with a prison fetish
body:
| |
---
You’d think it’d be a bit weird for a convicted felon to have a fetish for prisons. But then again, we’re talking about Donald Trump here. And renting El Salvador’s CECOT torture prison just isn’t doing it for him. | [View in browser](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUzNzU5MzEzMDEzMjQ1ODM5LFwiclwiOjE1Mzc1OTM1MTQ5MDc0MTcwNn0iLCJzIjoiY2JkY2RhMWM0NzQwYzU4MiJ9)
| |

---
|
Team,

You’d think it’d be a bit weird for a convicted felon to have a fetish for prisons. But then again, _we’re talking about Donald Trump here._

And **_renting El Salvador’s CECOT torture prison just isn’t doing it for him:_**

---
| | [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUzNzU5MzEzMDI2ODc3MzM1LFwiclwiOjE1Mzc1OTM1MTQ5MDc0MTcwNn0iLCJzIjoiMGM2YjQwOTkwZDFjY2ZiMyJ9)
---
| **In a move that can only be described as complete insanity,** Donald Trump wants to spend an estimated _$2 billion dollars to reopen & renovate the famous 91 year old prison that hasn’t been operational in over 6 decades_. Why? Because **every good dictator needs a notorious prison to throw his opponents in.

** In the first 100 days of his presidency, he has tested the waters by deporting countless immigrants with legal status to El Salvador without due process. He also continues to defy the Supreme Court’s order to have wrongfully deported Maryland father, Kilmer Abrego Garcia, returned.

**Donald Trump uses prisons in his open warfare with our constitution** \- the constitution he swore an oath to uphold. But now, he is saying _he doesn’t know whether he even needs to follow the constitution_ :

---
| | [ ](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUzNzU5MzEzMDMzMTY4NzkzLFwiclwiOjE1Mzc1OTM1MTQ5MDc0MTcwNn0iLCJzIjoiMDgwNzFmMTVhYzQ4Y2ZiNSJ9)
---
| Trump doesn’t deserve to have another prison to throw innocent people in - _he_ deserves to be in prison.

**We must fight back against the brazen authoritarianism coming from his administration and we are on the ground doing the work that our leaders in DC are too afraid to do.**[Will you to donate to National Ground Games network of organizers and help us fight back against Trump’s fascism in every swing district in America?](https://rpprrv.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEzMjg2NTcsXCJsXCI6MTUzNzU5MzEzMDM4NDExNjc3LFwiclwiOjE1Mzc1OTM1MTQ5MDc0MTcwNn0iLCJzIjoiZWNiMTQ5NDc0Mzc0N2IzZCJ9)

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Pictures from the district
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107261692/544115740/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODVjYTYzNS02MzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2OfmUNzjhOUpj8Uu7FD7JdyA25oprmUhCQmrTaK7Iw=)
Peter, Sometimes, it’s nice to get away from Washington, and back to my home district around real people who just want to get to know each other and rally around each other’s challenges. Folks are fed up with the chaos in Washington, and just want to see results that actually benefit us. And it’s not easy in this environment of hate and division that extremists promote, but we have to always keep focus on the ones doing the work, not those yelling the loudest. Below are some highlights from events over the past month that I wanted to share. But first and foremost, I want to thank you, Peter. Your support allows me to support these people in making real, meaningful change. And I’m confident that if we keep going, we can bring that spirit of meaningful, working-class change back to Washington. -Eric | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107261693/544115741/-1812448514?refcode=em-5.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODVjYTYzNS02MzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2OfmUNzjhOUpj8Uu7FD7JdyA25oprmUhCQmrTaK7Iw=)
---
* * *
**I had a blast walking down Main Street in Kewanee with Mayor Gary Moore meeting incredible local business owners, hearing their stories, and celebrating the heart of this community!** From florists to furniture, Kewanee’s small businesses are full of pride, resilience, and hustle. I’m proud to be their partner in Washington and can’t wait to be back!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107261694/544115742/-1812448514?refcode=em-5.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODVjYTYzNS02MzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2OfmUNzjhOUpj8Uu7FD7JdyA25oprmUhCQmrTaK7Iw=)
**I spent time with Meals on Wheels in Rockford delivering food to real people.** It’s important to learn about the impact of this program and understand why it’s better and more economical to keep senior citizens in their homes. Big thanks to my friend Larry for taking the wheel and showing me the ropes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107261695/544115743/-1812448514?refcode=em-5.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODVjYTYzNS02MzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2OfmUNzjhOUpj8Uu7FD7JdyA25oprmUhCQmrTaK7Iw=)
**I was proud to visit the brand new Northern Illinois Food Bank location in Rockford, right in the heart of a former food desert.** The last time I was in this building, it was a Kmart—today, it’s a lifeline. I promised I’d be back when the doors opened, and I’m grateful to see this promise fulfilled. This space is now delivering hope, dignity, and healthy meals to families who need it most.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107261696/544115744/-1812448514?refcode=em-5.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODVjYTYzNS02MzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2OfmUNzjhOUpj8Uu7FD7JdyA25oprmUhCQmrTaK7Iw=)
**I met at the headquarters of the wonderful nonprofit SAL Community Services, serving IL-17, western Illinois and eastern Iowa.** We can’t build a strong future without investing in our youngest learners. The stories I heard were powerful reminders that cuts to early childhood education don’t just impact budgets—they impact people. I’ll keep fighting to protect and invest in these programs. Our children deserve nothing less.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107261697/544115745/-1812448514?refcode=em-5.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODVjYTYzNS02MzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2OfmUNzjhOUpj8Uu7FD7JdyA25oprmUhCQmrTaK7Iw=)
**And on this trip, and every trip, it’s a great privilege to fly out of one of IL-17’s four commercial airports!** Here’s to keeping Central Illinois connected to the world from CIRA Bloomington-Normal!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107261698/544115746/-1812448514?refcode=em-5.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODVjYTYzNS02MzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2OfmUNzjhOUpj8Uu7FD7JdyA25oprmUhCQmrTaK7Iw=)
I’m so grateful to everyone in the district, and it’s the highlight of serving my community to meet my neighbors of IL-17 where they are.
[**If you can, chip in a $3 grassroots contribution to help flip the Midwest blue and bring our community-first spirit to the majority in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107261699/544115747/-1812448514?refcode=em-5.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODVjYTYzNS02MzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2OfmUNzjhOUpj8Uu7FD7JdyA25oprmUhCQmrTaK7Iw=)

clean_body: | = Peter, Sometimes, it’s nice to get away from Washington, and back to my home district around real people who just want to get to know each other and rally around each other’s challenges. Folks are fed up with the chaos in Washington, and just want to see results that actually benefit us. And it’s not easy in this environment of hate and division that extremists promote, but we have to always keep focus on the ones doing the work, not those yelling the loudest. Below are some highlights from events over the past month that I wanted to share. But first and foremost, I want to thank you, Peter. Your support allows me to support these people in making real, meaningful change. And I’m confident that if we keep going, we can bring that spirit of meaningful, working-class change back to Washington. -Eric | = I had a blast walking down Main Street in Kewanee with Mayor Gary Moore meeting incredible local business owners, hearing their stories, and celebrating the heart of this community! From florists to furniture, Kewanee’s small businesses are full of pride, resilience, and hustle. I’m proud to be their partner in Washington and can’t wait to be back! = I spent time with Meals on Wheels in Rockford delivering food to real people. It’s important to learn about the impact of this program and understand why it’s better and more economical to keep senior citizens in their homes. Big thanks to my friend Larry for taking the wheel and showing me the ropes. = I was proud to visit the brand new Northern Illinois Food Bank location in Rockford, right in the heart of a former food desert. The last time I was in this building, it was a Kmart—today, it’s a lifeline. I promised I’d be back when the doors opened, and I’m grateful to see this promise fulfilled. This space is now delivering hope, dignity, and healthy meals to families who need it most. = I met at the headquarters of the wonderful nonprofit SAL Community Services, serving IL-17, western Illinois and eastern Iowa. We can’t build a strong future without investing in our youngest learners. The stories I heard were powerful reminders that cuts to early childhood education don’t just impact budgets—they impact people. I’ll keep fighting to protect and invest in these programs. This week the Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu officially declared his plan to fully colonize Gaza--and it is critical to recognize how his illegal act harms us all.
Unsurprisingly, Netanyahu is couching his cruel and illegal decision in alleged security by "expanding the military offensive against Hamas." Never mind that [Netanyahu yet again broke the truce between Israel and Hamas](https://substack.com/redirect/c6b7f69e-15f5-48e4-a0d1-3736e9f242f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). He's added that this will be an "_intensive_ and prolonged assault." Netanyahu's security cabinet has approved a strategy that ultimately includes _seizing the Gaza Strip_ and controlling humanitarian aid. He has furthermore explicitly stated that Israeli troops will not follow the previous model of short-term raids but will instead hold the ground they seize. This is not just another escalation or attempt at security; this is a strategy for occupation and permanent control. This is colonization. It is ethnic cleansing. It is genocide. It is critical we understand what is at stake here and loudly speak out for justice, because nothing good can come from staying uninformed and silent. **Let 's Address This.**
**I am doing everything in my power to uphold justice for all people, and I cannot do it alone. Join 131,000+ thoughtful activists and add your name below.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-H1OV836R8M1aczsNNwRjMEXYaQn1mFmeKx5sbME2FA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=163049578)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5be6128a-82ce-4097-9b0d-3205a4e7b6f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Netanyahu and Gallant are wanted by the ICC for war crimes.
## How We Got Here
For years, we have been warning that Netanyahu is not interested in peace. We have pointed out that he has _[rejected a two-state solution and denies Palestinian sovereignty](https://substack.com/redirect/46ff1c79-d03b-4bbe-a01b-40d77f39f3f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , even as international consensus has demanded it. We have noted that Israeli media and his own military generals condemned him for [repeatedly ](https://substack.com/redirect/340c4b4c-7112-44a4-8c5f-0d6b097b60d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[blocking a ceasefire deal](https://substack.com/redirect/340c4b4c-7112-44a4-8c5f-0d6b097b60d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. We have highlighted that even the [families of Israeli hostages call him "](https://substack.com/redirect/340c4b4c-7112-44a4-8c5f-0d6b097b60d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Mr. Death](https://substack.com/redirect/340c4b4c-7112-44a4-8c5f-0d6b097b60d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[,](https://substack.com/redirect/340c4b4c-7112-44a4-8c5f-0d6b097b60d0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" for insisting on war and refusing peace. But when we spoke out, politicians--including some on the left--mocked us as alarmists, unhelpful, and unreasonable. They told us to trust Biden when he said he was "relentlessly working on getting a deal done." Yet, [even Biden's own officials now admit that he never once asked Netanyahu for a deal](https://substack.com/redirect/2dbb6016-4d96-4e82-9507-9a1087e5921e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
This betrayal is profound. It exposes the emptiness of so-called diplomatic efforts and reveals a grim truth: the U.S. government has been complicit in enabling Netanyahu's campaign of genocide.
## Genocide and War Crimes: A Legal Reckoning
The International Criminal Court (ICC) has issued arrest warrants for Netanyahu, accusing him of war crimes and genocide. These charges are not hyperbole. They are grounded in international law, and yet the United States refuses to enforce this warrant ([while calling on the world to enforce a virtually similar warrant against Putin for his war crimes against Ukraine](https://substack.com/redirect/b4e87083-6be4-4e2d-b094-430eb0b0ce2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). This astounding hypocrisy is not just a moral crisis--it is a _legal_ one. The ICC's arrest warrants are based on well-documented evidence of these violations. The deliberate targeting of civilians and the systematic destruction of infrastructure necessary for civilian survival constitute genocide under international law.
## Trump and HR 867: Criminalizing Free Speech to Silence Criticism
As if complicity in genocide wasn't enough, the U.S. government under Trump is now actively working to criminalize dissent against Israel's apartheid policies. As I shared recently, [HR 867, if passed, would fine Americans up to $1 million and imprison them for 20 years](https://substack.com/redirect/db3121c4-04d2-4d04-8cbb-3c5fe4a86d52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if they support or participate in peaceful boycotts of Israel. This bill is a direct assault on the First Amendment and on the right to peaceful protest.
By pushing this legislation, the U.S. government is declaring that speaking out against human rights violations is a crime. Imagine if Martin Luther King Jr. had been criminalized for leading the Montgomery Bus Boycott. This bill seeks to silence dissent, effectively making it illegal to stand with Palestinians in their struggle for survival. This is all the more dangerous as Netanyahu moves to commit even more war crimes against the Palestinian people.
## This Is Genocide. This Is Fascism. Speak Up.
If you have ever wondered what you would have done during the darkest moments of history--_this is your moment._ We cannot afford to be silent. We cannot afford to rationalize or justify state-sponsored violence. The inhumanity imposed on Palestinians is not just brutal; it is illegal. It is genocide. It is fascism. And it is the same blueprint being used here in the United States to disappear immigrants and U.S. citizens. This is why what happens in Palestine affects us over here. If we allow our tax dollars to be used to commit genocide abroad, do you really think they can't be likewise weaponized to destroy democracy at home? The silence from Western leaders and corporate media is complicity. It echoes the tragic historical pattern of turning a blind eye to genocidal violence. Denying due process, raiding homes without warrants, and silencing dissent are the hallmarks of autocratic regimes.
The bottom line is this -- Netanyahu is telling the world that he will violently displace 1.7M Palestinians in Gaza, and the United States is funding his genocide. Raise your voice, contact your member of Congress, and continue to speak out against this injustice. Because remaining silent is remaining complicit.
**Let's Address This is made possible by you, the thoughtful person reading this. Join our movement by subscribing below.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/49e82ffd-45dd-4584-830e-8b6f8321a767?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

subject: Clarence Thomas cast the deciding vote to BAN transgenders from our military.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson

name: JD Vance
subject: I thank God every day for this victory
body:
We needed it.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aqRJ/?__vbtrk=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend - this is Vice President JD Vance.
**_[I sat down to write you this email today and ended up writing more than I had planned, but I hope you’ll take the time to read my message in its entirety](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aqRJ/?__vbtrk=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
As my term as Vice President crosses the 100 day mark, I am reflecting on the importance of winning the election in 2024, _and how different our country would be if the result were different_.
I thank God every day for raising up our movement in victory, because the vision for America that Kamala Harris was running on was straight out of a nightmare.
Just think -
**Kamala would have supercharged DEI in every facet of American life.** President Trump and I rooted out DEI in our government, root and stem.
**Kamala would have imported another 20 million illegal immigrants across our open southern border.** President Trump and I have completely closed our southern border and have begun the largest deportation effort in the history of our country.
**Kamala would have implemented Soviet-style price controls while exporting our jobs.** President Trump and I have lowered prices and are bringing back the good-paying jobs that made the American economy the envy of the world.
Right now, we are truly entering the Golden Age of America, and the success of our Administration does not belong to us, it belongs to the American people, the forgotten men and women of our country who were sold out by the elites and political class of our country for decades.
**Since the day I got into politics, I’ve been fighting for the citizens of this country to reclaim the promise of America that was stolen from them by the political class in DC.**
That’s a fight I’m happy to be in, shoulder to shoulder with patriots like you, friend.
**_But it’s also a fight that the Democrats and their billionaire donors are chomping at the bit to have again in 2026._**
Make no mistake, the Democratic political machine is firing on all cylinders to win back power. They are posting record fundraising hauls, hiring highly trained activists in key districts and states, and recruiting candidates to run against every vulnerable Republican in the country.
Here’s the long and short of it -
**_[For the first time since being sworn in, I’ve teamed up with Chairwoman Elise Stefanik - one of my strongest allies in Congress - to raise $250,000 in the next 10 days](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aqRJ/?__vbtrk=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
That’s no walk in the park, and it won’t be easy, but trust me it’s going to be worth it.
**_[You know by now that I didn’t come from much, so when I ask for something, it’s important](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aqRJ/?__vbtrk=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I’m asking you to help us just get a little bit closer. We’ve set a goal to have our average gift of $47, if you can just chip in $40 to help us get there it is a major win for our country.
[CHIP IN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aqRJ/?__vbtrk=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_In Freedom,_
**Vice President JD Vance**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aqRJ/?__vbtrk=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg4NzQzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

**But if Abigail Spanberger becomes governor this year, her victory would send a BIG signal that Democrats are ready to fight back and win BIG in 2026.**

That's why we need to continue building on the strong foundation Abigail's campaign has built: mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and reaching voters across the Commonwealth.

**This new race rating is proof — our hard work is _already paying off_ this cycle!**

clean_body: We can make BIG changes in Virginia — starting right now | = Peter, we have a BIG update from Virginia: The Cook Political Report just moved Virginia's governor race rating from TOSS-UP to LEAN DEMOCRAT! = The writing is on the wall: Virginians want change, and they want leaders who will PROTECT their rights, not destroy them. The movement is on our side, Peter, and we know EMILYs List champion Abigail Spanberger has what it takes to flip this seat. = | = All eyes are on Virginia, Peter. The outcome of this race in November will set the stage for 2026 and beyond. Here's why: If Winsome Earle-Sears becomes governor, the GOP will see this as a green light to continue with their extremist, undemocratic agenda. But if Abigail Spanberger becomes governor this year, her victory would send a BIG signal that Democrats are ready to fight back and win BIG in 2026. That's why we need to continue building on the strong foundation Abigail's campaign has built: mobilizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and reaching voters across the Commonwealth. This new race rating is proof — our hard work is already paying off this cycle! = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

name: House Conservatives Fund
subject: SIGN NOW TO IMPEACH PARTISAN JUDGES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the House Conservatives Fund
body:
Our message to the American people is simple:

| | | **RFK Jr. says people with autism are broken. Don’t believe his LIES.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xEtVMKoYKE5A3U18xzCvEzVeNNyYi3zvLebz5RaW-cSbWH184ZKI8bOZpQJPx_MjpyXqXP8C9wyOuiIpOMCTnyz20S5dS51ur3RYsXOVcG3yRLJOI3ofas9qP_yv8qIgIIdJwfHl-vhbWFpXmMhiI8o663T4P-OD55xHMFF7MyTDj1hq8QVobxWQCwhD-Izbmf-H3-ikW2DR_CbpfLygD25s6S6JNu6LLe2aM2zdOC6PTeTpdWn8m3wN2DvGTZNF1Mmv0OG7W848CBn_g3D-1XkWPS63dA--9MQLyjjw0PmA4r0WoCRpOvE6rTt9AqJUTQVst-pcjAx3N4cm0g_caHbVFmmx12nXlig0igWKJdaDz5tvbkb5anzYBGqOEixXBsrRvQKKLNhRkRQT8lnLZ1q6ikIHQivFMy-Z4sy8GXw/4ga/Oi8paCxcTc26n69qiTyIyQ/h0/h001.FxYqnK4T33-v5rcXKEY5Ad9TZf56e-XwiTtCu8R7ktc)[Join Able Dems and sign the petition demanding RFK’s resignation!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xEtVMKoYKE5A3U18xzCvEzVeNNyYi3zvLebz5RaW-cSbWH184ZKI8bOZpQJPx_MjpyXqXP8C9wyOuiIpOMCTnyz20S5dS51ur3RYsXOVcG3yRLJOI3ofas9qP_yv8qIgTPKS-0hIUiuiQXSXkIFFImIs6bEVSJqK-9zA1OAy4qGAEMTWR8YjMIX-kyLf-ZjGi90DpI41jZkNCgLX07dQNpE2B98hEEvSJ2LRaK-4ToCAz7rlS4w4PTRT8cehqchQS_WdY_4w3XPsxr-Mq577BmsYTz7iqxI-79jenlR0S3fvaPOYeZChs4f-_QdIZDJ4VZYeHNo6AznUkGO4HGGC5xJGneAoFZRgmaniwz4o7zij3EzUgqa1M_o2RpaNw1FzyT9crcf1KBy-c2U9bF3o-UirmVth-h3903a4LqQT2NQ/4ga/Oi8paCxcTc26n69qiTyIyQ/h1/h001.gJLLabBWsGqtJ0pfKtxSPQhZiMAGqYw14kx0rPZ2mLc)
* * *
Trump’s Health and Human Services Secretary RFK Jr. has spent his career spreading DEBUNKED conspiracies that childhood vaccines cause autism. As a result children have died from illnesses that could have been prevented by vaccines.
Compounding the damage he has done, RFK Jr says kids with autism will never pay taxes, hold a job, play baseball, write a poem, or go on a date.
RFK Jr’s portrayal is inaccurate and damaging. Many individuals with autism lead fulfilling lives, achieving personal and professional success, particularly when they receive appropriate support and accommodations.
His ableist statements overlook autism's diversity, spreading fear and misinformation. _Autism isn’t a tragedy, dehumanization is._
**__RFK Jr. is dangerous and UNFIT to lead the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS).**
******[Sign ON to call for his resignation at RFKResign.org!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xEtVMKoYKE5A3U18xzCvEzVeNNyYi3zvLebz5RaW-cSbWH184ZKI8bOZpQJPx_MjpyXqXP8C9wyOuiIpOMCTnyz20S5dS51ur3RYsXOVcG3yRLJOI3ofas9qP_yv8qIjKmCaD95vn4dUWEoHG7BUiw2QjcrGse9JC0O48EHZP0spwmoSmVLUCcFI0hPR3lvu8cGF3R_0BEYsjDGx4Dle6h5VbEyp4GMPSRef0L3LiOywDnMHL28aTRNTZvuPI-uwwJlSlpb9UEz3_rcjG-Ur8NMrdQTD_NtKaB1ZV8PElow_2X5KiBSDQbqvrNZN8OVgGj-luOH6dHT8EXWdgPpbEc2BHkc-VOe7HjW7ChGJc9Xj8o2HnkbsLrR0uSwP5goDT9-r7zgtAEuvIMiTwc_kRBHcmzQSc4ChrB6q4G0BH1A/4ga/Oi8paCxcTc26n69qiTyIyQ/h2/h001.m8xpZqjhkKCDe_syEgeCC1aD4Aghy_JstakDvbH6SAI)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39xEtVMKoYKE5A3U18xzCvEzVeNNyYi3zvLebz5RaW-cSbWH184ZKI8bOZpQJPx_MjpyXqXP8C9wyOuiIpOMCTnyz20S5dS51ur3RYsXOVcG3yRLJOI3ofas9qP_yv8qIjLcC0z3GOpMHfkvq8C4JZbg6c_GNCCca0m7hV8gzWnK-3I-xovkpnQL5ByIfNrZFtYUkvLVa6loua76YEcifOry9F6pcR6uF0kDzmGEcAscACLpaPfNjVFuYRyspPlM6bONWmjCs2eyFCcP3PrgMirmJDE84M9LKum7QcGvMCUF79750u3NQjcT2U2-7bO7FM-ExS3ehzEh1xcokLW0tOmikoTEPPoY0NOSCSA7qOEc1shM1lmDGD0T_GTSa2Lk3jfXQneaRZ_k6WRwc18bW-jwk6bC8sVoRyRstQgrKIQ-A/4ga/Oi8paCxcTc26n69qiTyIyQ/h3/h001.xgoFeKmxTMLUBL2P9XAzgvS04on4YrpqSISpafUfiBY)
---
Vaccines do NOT cause autism. That lie has been repeatedly debunked by millions of scientific hours and hundreds of peer reviewed papers, yet RFK Jr. is spending over $50 million in taxpayer money on an predetermined study to keep his conspiracy theory alive.

RFK Jr. is weaponizing pseudoscience against kids under the guise of autism research. Declaring conclusions before studies begin, promoting dangerous treatments like Vitamin A overdoses, and sowing vaccine fear make him not just reckless but cruel. It is eugenics in disguise.
**
**

clean_body: | | | RFK Jr. says people with autism are broken. Don’t believe his LIES. Trump’s Health and Human Services Secretary RFK Jr. has spent his career spreading DEBUNKED conspiracies that childhood vaccines cause autism. As a result children have died from illnesses that could have been prevented by vaccines. Compounding the damage he has done, RFK Jr says kids with autism will never pay taxes, hold a job, play baseball, write a poem, or go on a date. RFK Jr’s portrayal is inaccurate and damaging. Many individuals with autism lead fulfilling lives, achieving personal and professional success, particularly when they receive appropriate support and accommodations. His ableist statements overlook autism's diversity, spreading fear and misinformation. Autism isn’t a tragedy, dehumanization is. RFK Jr. is dangerous and UNFIT to lead the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). ** | Vaccines do NOT cause autism. That lie has been repeatedly debunked by millions of scientific hours and hundreds of peer reviewed papers, yet RFK Jr. is spending over $50 million in taxpayer money on an predetermined study to keep his conspiracy theory alive. RFK Jr. is weaponizing pseudoscience against kids under the guise of autism research. Declaring conclusions before studies begin, promoting dangerous treatments like Vitamin A overdoses, and sowing vaccine fear make him not just reckless but cruel. It is eugenics in disguise. RFK Jr. is degrading autistic kids, denying proven science, and desecrating our health system with lies. **Able Dems works year round to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will fight for an inclusive society and recognize the valuable contributions we make to our nation. **Thanks for your support. -Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. subject: A president who doesn’t know he needs to uphold the Constitution?

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250507_constitution_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250507_constitution_act]
Folks,
Did you see President Trump's response when he was asked if he needs uphold the Constitution of the United States as president? He said:
"I don’t know."
On January 20th, 2025, President Trump took an oath: "I do solemnly swear that I will faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and will to the best of my ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States."
We know Trump says things to generate outrage, but we can't let ourselves see this is as normal conduct from the president. If there was ever a time for us to stand up and fight back, it’s now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250507_constitution_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_250507_constitution_act]

By intimidating universities and law firms, weaponizing the Justice Department, using the federal government to attack perceived enemies, and undermining our very Constitution, President Trump is working to consolidate his power and fundamentally reshape our country
We cannot just sit by and watch. We’ve got to stand up and fight back.
Michael is fighting Trump at every turn. He is leading a bipartisan bill to rein in Trump's power to impose his reckless tariffs and send our economy into crisis. He continues to push this administration to keep our commitment to Ukraine in their battle against Putin's tyranny. He has challenged RFK Jr.'s dangerous conspiracy theories, pushed Tulsi Gabbard on her lies, and demanded Pete Hegseth resign over his carelessness with our national security.
Michael needs your support to combat Trump and protect Colorado. If you’re with us, chip in $5 today. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250507_constitution_act&amount=5&nvep=&hmac=]
Thank you,

Peter,
I’m proud to share some exciting news: Labor unions across Colorado are standing with our campaign!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250507-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250507-email]
These organizations represent the hardworking people who keep Colorado strong, and I am honored to have their support. Can you help us continue building the momentum by chipping into my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250507-email]
As Attorney General, I will always stand with workers. I’ll fight to protect the rights of working families, hold corporations accountable when they exploit workers, and defend the right to organize, advocate, and be treated fairly on the job.
With the backing of Colorado unions — and grassroots supporters like you — we’re building a campaign that will fight for fairness, dignity, and opportunity for everyone.

clean_body: [] Peter, I’m proud to share some exciting news: Labor unions across Colorado are standing with our campaign! [] These organizations represent the hardworking people who keep Colorado strong, and I am honored to have their support. Can you help us continue building the momentum by chipping into my campaign today? [] As Attorney General, I will always stand with workers. I’ll fight to protect the rights of working families, hold corporations accountable when they exploit workers, and defend the right to organize, advocate, and be treated fairly on the job. With the backing of Colorado unions — and grassroots supporters like you — we’re building a campaign that will fight for fairness, dignity, and opportunity for everyone. People power this campaign, and that’s why I am reaching out. Will you chip in today to help us keep fighting for working people across Colorado? body:
We are launching our first-ever non-partisan GOTV program.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107266720/544133391/1219430133?refcode=EM_F_250507match_N_NPPEF_IN_8_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2OTk0NTE4LTZkMmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GuaTT1bS_e1Vy-m2WmOP5gw4vBu60hxAWPR6-cFhiM0=)
