| | Friend,

May 20th is the primary election in Pennsylvania, and eligible voters across the Commonwealth are already making their voices heard by completing their mail-in ballots.

**For the first time EVER, the New PA Project Education Fund is preparing to launch a non-partisan get-out-the-vote (GOTV) program to ensure every eligible voter turns out in this primary election. But we can’t do it without you.**

**Thanks to an angel donor, every dollar you give today will be matched up to $50,000! That means your $50 gift becomes $100, $250 becomes $500, $500 becomes $1000, and more!**

Your gift today will help fund NPPEF’s non-partisan GOTV program, including:

* Door-to-door canvassing across five regions
* Non-partisan voter education printed literature
* Extensive virtual and on-the-ground staff trainings

[**Have a BIG impact in the upcoming primary elections by donating $25 today and have 2X the impact.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107266725/544133398/1219430133?refcode=EM_F_250507match_N_NPPEF_IN_8_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2OTk0NTE4LTZkMmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GuaTT1bS_e1Vy-m2WmOP5gw4vBu60hxAWPR6-cFhiM0=)

If fully funded, NPPEF will be able to knock on **thousands of doors throughout all five of our regions across the Commonwealth** over the two-week GOTV period starting this week, May 9 - May 20. Our staff will engage eligible voters at the doors to emphasize the importance of participating in the primary election, help make a plan to vote, and provide non-partisan civic education on what positions are on the ballot.

**Don’t miss your chance: On May 20, voters will have the opportunity to make their voices heard by voting for the candidates that best represent their values and their party for the general election in November.**

[**Help us ensure voters understand the POWER of their votes by chipping in a MATCHED contribution of $25 or whatever you can now. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107266731/544133402/1219430133?refcode=EM_F_250507match_N_NPPEF_IN_8_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2OTk0NTE4LTZkMmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GuaTT1bS_e1Vy-m2WmOP5gw4vBu60hxAWPR6-cFhiM0=)

clean_body: We are launching our first-ever non-partisan GOTV program.| | | = | | Friend, May 20th is the primary election in Pennsylvania, and eligible voters across the Commonwealth are already making their voices heard by completing their mail-in ballots. For the first time EVER, the New PA Project Education Fund is preparing to launch a non-partisan get-out-the-vote (GOTV) program to ensure every eligible voter turns out in this primary election. But we can’t do it without you. Thanks to an angel donor, every dollar you give today will be matched up to $50,000! That means your $50 gift becomes $100, $250 becomes $500, $500 becomes $1000, and more! Your gift today will help fund NPPEF’s non-partisan GOTV program, including: Door-to-door canvassing across five regions Non-partisan voter education printed literature Extensive virtual and on-the-ground staff trainings = If fully funded, NPPEF will be able to knock on thousands of doors throughout all five of our regions across the Commonwealth over the two-week GOTV period starting this week, May 9 - May 20. Our staff will engage eligible voters at the doors to emphasize the importance of participating in the primary election, help make a plan to vote, and provide non-partisan civic education on what positions are on the ballot. Don’t miss your chance: On May 20, voters will have the opportunity to make their voices heard by voting for the candidates that best represent their values and their party for the general election in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let’s do this, New PA Project Education Fund Donations to the New PA Project Education Fund supports our staff’s voter and community engagement efforts including; voter registration, civic education, organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | | | The New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) is a non-partisan organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making. I'm the Second Lady of Pennsylvania and a proud mom to our adorable daughter Harper. Recently, I had the opportunity to share my experiences with pregnancy and motherhood at the Black Maternal Health Summit in Pittsburgh. **It’s a conversation we have to have – Black women face discrimination, receive a lower quality of care, and are three times more likely to die from a pregnancy-related issue. ** I have over a decade of experience engaging my community on the social issues that matter, and Black maternal health is something incredibly personal and important to me. _**It matters now more than ever.**_ At a time where DEI protections have been rolled back, Roe v. Wade has been overturned, and Medicaid is in danger of being defunded, having real leaders like my husband and Governor Shapiro in Harrisburg who will fight for all women means the world to me. But I could be biased... 😉 [**If, like me, you understand how important my husband’s leadership is at such a critical moment in our history, would you consider pitching a few dollars today to help keep him in office fighting for me, for you, and your aunts, mothers and grandmothers?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107267279/544135210/15868926?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_050725_BLAYRE_90DO30MO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWJlMmE2OS02ZDJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-fRY9hB1j2AVkiJOppNG-KiNs4sOKEdOGMF9e5egnhA=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

| | The saga over this election continues, Team. **Here's the latest update:** Last year, North Carolina passed a bill that reallocated power away from the Governor. **This was a purely partisan move after the state legislature** \-- _which had a supermajority of one party_ \-- was upset that the other party had held onto the governor's office in the 2024 election, when State Attorney General Josh Stein beat Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Mark Robinson. The North Carolina Court of Appeals (one rung below the state supreme court) upheld that new law in a court challenge, so the North Carolina State Auditor -- a partisan elected politician of the same party as the state legislature's majority -- was able to appoint new members to the North Carolina Election Board. **Instead of a pro-voting rights election board filled with appointments by the newly elected governor, opponents of voting rights now have a majority on the state election board.** This is yet another example in North Carolina where opponents of voting rights are more focused on protecting their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. **Hypocritical partisans are blatantly trying to steal this judicial election in plain sight.** And you can bet they're going to try to do it in the 49 other states if they get away with it here. [**We must keep the pressure up to stop this post-election interference with legitimate votes. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us spread the word and make these ballots count in North Carolina and stop suppression across the country >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107267349/544135433/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=kJvrycFlcgPpmH7bk+z9flfB2MH7abW3fZMEZh8O7M8QFq0fuwn6864VBTt/c0Awc13ab5Magouyutq4QK1IZjMeyG0FAD3Qe84OGxGTe30=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhlZGI3ZDVjLTZkMmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6auHj9g9HBP11TK3avPijIJjxBeMDNUw3WsDjf3F_mE=&emci=25ae91a3-592b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=8edb7d5c-6d2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=33603084)

| | **The backstory if you haven't been following this:** After the 2024 election, the**** North Carolina state supreme court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court, which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties. Back on Election Day 2024, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- _both of which increased Riggs' lead._ After months of legal wrangling, the North Carolina Court of Appeals ruled in Griffin’s favor, deciding that 60,000 ballots in four heavily democratic counties must be recounted and verified. The ruling states that all 60,000 people must be notified and given 15 business days to provide proof of identity, or their vote will be thrown out. **This ruling would have disenfranchised tens of thousands of people without showing any proof that any of these voters are actually ineligible.** After incumbent Justice Allison Riggs appealed a ruling to cure or discard 60,000 valid votes, **a federal appeals court blocked the partisan North Carolina attempt to silence these voters**. A George W. Bush-appointed and a Biden-appointed judge placed a hold on the cure process, with a Trump-appointed judge dissenting. Now, vengeful partisans have taken control of the state elections board in order to steal this seat for good. What's really the big deal here? **If Judge Griffin's campaign thought the registration process was legally flawed, he should have challenged it *before* the election.** He also should have challenged the process in every county, not just four that don't align with his political party. This is a blatant attempt to change the rules just because he lost. And his partisan cronies are going along with it to protect their power and their majority on the state supreme court.[**We've got to make sure everyone knows about this egregious intervention before these votes are stolen and the voices of the people are silenced. clean_body: Popular Information: The five-month campaign to steal a North Carolina Supreme Court seat| | | | | | | The saga over this election continues, Team. Here's the latest update: Last year, North Carolina passed a bill that reallocated power away from the Governor. The North Carolina Court of Appeals (one rung below the state supreme court) upheld that new law in a court challenge, so the North Carolina State Auditor -- a partisan elected politician of the same party as the state legislature's majority -- was able to appoint new members to the North Carolina Election Board. Instead of a pro-voting rights election board filled with appointments by the newly elected governor, opponents of voting rights now have a majority on the state election board. This is yet another example in North Carolina where opponents of voting rights are more focused on protecting their own power than they are in serving the people and having fair elections. Hypocritical partisans are blatantly trying to steal this judicial election in plain sight. And you can bet they're going to try to do it in the 49 other states if they get away with it here. Friends,
DC’s out-of-touch liberal elites think they can tell Wisconsinites how to live, work, and raise their families. Every day, I’m fighting back—defending our conservative values, protecting our freedoms, and making sure hardworking taxpayers like you have a voice in Congress.
From securing our borders to lowering inflation, from defending the Second Amendment to protecting the unborn, I’m standing strong against the radical liberal agenda. But I can’t do it alone.
Nancy Pelosi may be gone, but the Left is more determined than ever to flip seats like mine and push their socialist schemes. They’re pouring millions into Wisconsin to silence voices like ours.
I need your help to fight back. Will you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 today to help me defend Wisconsin’s seat and keep America on the right track?
👉 **Click here to**[**contribute now**](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=562fc227d1&e=561a28864e)
Every dollar makes a difference in this battle for the soul of our nation. Together, we can protect the values that make Wisconsin—and America—great.
Thank you for your unwavering support.
For freedom,
**Scott Fitzgerald**
U.S. Representative, Wisconsin

Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | _

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I’m running… in more ways than one!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=268%2E181023%2EUJN7xm)
Team —
People always say that campaigns are a marathon and not a sprint. They’re right — and I know that firsthand.
You may not know this about me, but I’m an avid runner. I recently completed the London Marathon, where I joined people from around the world, powered not just by their feet, but by purpose.
And back in 2016, I ran the Boston Marathon _while I was eight months pregnant_ with my son. Just a few weeks after qualifying, I found out I was pregnant. Honestly, I didn’t think I’d be able to do it.
But I’m always up for a challenge. I took it one step at a time, one mile at a time, and pushed myself until I ran all 26 miles of the Boston Marathon and completed something I never thought possible.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q22025.rGq0NW&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=268%2E181023%2EUJN7xm)
I’ve carried this mentality to everything I’ve done, including my campaign for Secretary of State. I reached one voter, one community, one county at a time, until we built a winning coalition.
Now, I’m fighting to make Michigan the best place in the country to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home as Michigan’s next governor — but that work won’t happen overnight. We will win this campaign by taking it one step at a time, knocking on one door at a time, and making one donation at a time.
[**You can help sustain this campaign for the long run (all 26 miles, if you will!) by making a monthly recurring contribution. Can you chip in monthly in honor of the marathon that is this campaign for governor?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/612?c0=jmb-em-q22025.8Jm6WU&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=268%2E181023%2EUJN7xm)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Join me in congratulating Allison Riggs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This is a victory for democracy itself.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107268734/544140551/823540626?refcode=ea.f971615c-702b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.f971615c-702b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTcxNjE1Yy03MDJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QHrLWjy21iJHp2vV8v9p3ujxMx-lxJO9lzy58WS-ENo=&emci=7cca3558-5d2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f971615c-702b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1049176)
Hello Peter, I am proud, grateful, and deeply relieved that **North Carolina Supreme Court Justice Allison Riggs** has prevailed in defending her November 2024 election victory from a far-right attempt to undermine it. I appointed Justice Riggs to the Court in 2023 because I knew her to be a jurist whose commitment to defending the rights of North Carolinians was ironclad. She has proven that commitment again and again over the last six months. **Justice Riggs fought for every last legal NC voter’s ballot to count.** This week, the federal court agreed that her opponent’s attempt to change the election rules after the fact, and potentially throw out tens of thousands of ballots, would violate those voters’ right to constitutional due process. Finally, her opponent has conceded and Justice Riggs’ victory is set to be certified. This is a win for democracy itself. **[Will you join me and congratulate Justice Riggs on this hard-won — and fair, legal, and democratic — victory? Click here to sign our note of congratulations >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107268735/544140552/824399746?refcode=ea.f971615c-702b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.f971615c-702b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTcxNjE1Yy03MDJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QHrLWjy21iJHp2vV8v9p3ujxMx-lxJO9lzy58WS-ENo=&emci=7cca3558-5d2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f971615c-702b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107268736/544140553/824399746?refcode=ea.f971615c-702b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.f971615c-702b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTcxNjE1Yy03MDJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QHrLWjy21iJHp2vV8v9p3ujxMx-lxJO9lzy58WS-ENo=&emci=7cca3558-5d2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=f971615c-702b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1049176)

clean_body: This is a victory for democracy itself. | Hello Peter, I am proud, grateful, and deeply relieved that North Carolina Supreme Court Justice Allison Riggs has prevailed in defending her November 2024 election victory from a far-right attempt to undermine it. I appointed Justice Riggs to the Court in 2023 because I knew her to be a jurist whose commitment to defending the rights of North Carolinians was ironclad. She has proven that commitment again and again over the last six months. Justice Riggs fought for every last legal NC voter’s ballot to count. This week, the federal court agreed that her opponent’s attempt to change the election rules after the fact, and potentially throw out tens of thousands of ballots, would violate those voters’ right to constitutional due process. Finally, her opponent has conceded and Justice Riggs’ victory is set to be certified. This is a win for democracy itself. | Thank you, Roy Cooper mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Urgent Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Demand Trump reverse his cuts to funding for cures for childhood cancer, Alzheimers, and other horrific diseases
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Tell Trump to stop blocking promising disease-cure research!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0f83234-9a9b-4ac1-9fcd-1de86bd93fb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te30d36df-d771-4c91-a209-8a7775beb649/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump was already on a rampage against medical research, public health programs, and science in general. But now he's actually ending highly promising research into cures for Alzheimer's, childhood cancers, and other horrific ailments. **[Add your name, and demand that Trump reverse himself.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63152ea1-ff13-4bfe-a1a1-11eb13224391/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Americans across the political spectrum overwhelmingly support funding for this research, and with good reason. But Trump's actions will delay promising treatments and cures by years, if not decades. He's blocked research grants to universities working on this front, and now he's trying to make deep, devastating cuts to the National Institutes of Health and the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. These cuts would put our country's health in serious jeopardy, undoing decades of progress and preventing scientists from finding new cures and saving lives. Not to mention leaving us completely unprepared for a public health crisis like Covid-19. We can't let Trump cut critical research and block cures to deadly diseases. We need to show our collective outrage and stop him from putting our health at stake. **[Sign your name to tell Trump: STOP blocking disease-cure research!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6fd098d-cbcc-4eb2-8e2e-0b47ad27359f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T901a46ea-68f3-4ac3-b2b8-c9816320804e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Got a progressive cause or organization you want to promote? [Become a Left Action sponsor](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20496a6c-d4b8-4944-b7df-0ce6a378876c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))

|

subject: FWD: Will You Help Us Keep The Fire Burning At Camp Elah? 🙏🇺🇸
body:
| | | It’s Sean Feucht with an update — God has opened a massive door for Let Us Worship in Washington, D.C. We’ve held revivals on the National Mall, worshiped in the Rotunda of the Capitol, and in the West Wing of the White House. We base these outreaches out of our D.C. headquarters, Camp Elah—named after the Valley of Elah, where David defeated Goliath. We are intent on slaying giants of our own, but we can’t do it alone. Please consider contributing to our Camp Elah fundraising campaign. Our goal is to fully fund Camp Elah for the remainder of 2025. This will allow us to focus on what’s ahead—completing the Revive in ’25 Tour and much more! **[If you feel led, please contribute today to help sustain Camp Elah through the end of 2025. Let’s keep the fire burning in Washington, D.C.!](http://email.letusworship.co/c/eJxc0r2WsjoAheGrwY5ZIQkJFBaAI4gjoyg60rBCCIgEQUARr_6s8zfFVz_77XY2Z0JHHM3EXKOYEAwNHcwuc0BxjjHBucA5NkAKGeIaJMQ0hNAAJ7NyDgHUgQ6oZiCsgQ-WAkKhniJMMl2nSMFAiuHRj03XX8r2gzczOb8MQ6sgS4FLBS5leav6jz9GClz2ClxyBS63qxgl1mXNnsnpdHfLMSUuULvHi34GC-TZYbqKzK2vNmdtgoU8CW-8RFK3nBFUcQrqLs8D28v1SDC1Sx33azgcrq6mRvnuKe3ouJoetfQ9q7rL6uto0b2T5AV_r5kzhvXg6EYcRCji22nLa3cdktw-J7aoIb2FvnEvj_prGOtrsV-HfuLcj8EpBN-7Y_B9vmZrEljaxUjV58ST8aur7qXqkeRc1i5bLFF90uV2km83_Xm0oLVGMBU28t8bKqpF8pSdOpoHZnHgYy_auCH1hKvtmu8EPF4vXqnBeQjV5BkT5yAWbCxiLf_c7g_T9Clb-f1Tm5FDY_oz-VU5Nv0-Vt8L4lTqMfdPCb4tLLZZeHeGKxpyamacloBeltFqdx3Wo1eOwHbisG_L9bgi_HwuXaAWxsmLq2GfCsfJbLo_vSzyPj5PR96ou9EPD290mZr-cNuJjRH82NmTFq-tRc3Ae0SdiRcvnLb2WO48I_Z2ClwGq9zZTM_Pl5_0nf-gqdpHKLbc-1ePzo2MFbg0ZrUYWMYGNleorUBYi75nhVhlCoT_vAji3DQh07XMpBkmWDdQJlJEuAEI4ZSxv4fQUSAcRN1KNvy2GiUAQPCftl1zFXz4HyGhJv5XOKtbVha33w5h3dA1U6GLWTfP2rGUsuwJVTAoalbKD97Us-cc_hUAAP__eXEMRg)** Till All Hear,Sean

| | Dear Peter,
---
This is a very special time for Let Us Worship. Tomorrow is the National Day of Prayer, and this week we are celebrating THREE YEARS of our D.C. ministry, Camp Elah.

God has opened MASSIVE doors in the political world and allowed us to minister to, pray for, pray with, and share the Gospel with policymakers, elected officials, and men and women who make up all levels of our government—and let me tell you, GOD’S AT WORK!!

We are launching a two-week prayer time and fundraising drive to help fully fund Camp Elah for this year and beyond. We want Let Us Worship to grow ROOTS in Washington, D.C., and become synonymous with Christ-centered politics. When people talk about the next generation of God-fearing politicians and politicos, we want them to have passed through our doors and worshiped with us!
---

| | This two-week fundraising drive is critical to our mission. We’ve spent so much time and resources bringing worship and the Gospel to the far corners of the earth—Israel, Turkey, South Africa, and Mozambique (so far!)—but we don’t want to ignore the Lord’s calling on our ministry in Washington, D.C.

If you are able and feel led, please consider contributing to our Camp Elah ministry and investing in a Christ-centered government for years to come.
---

clean_body: | | | It’s Sean Feucht with an update — God has opened a massive door for Let Us Worship in Washington, D.C. We’ve held revivals on the National Mall, worshiped in the Rotunda of the Capitol, and in the West Wing of the White House. We base these outreaches out of our D.C. headquarters, Camp Elah—named after the Valley of Elah, where David defeated Goliath. We are intent on slaying giants of our own, but we can’t do it alone. Please consider contributing to our Camp Elah fundraising campaign. Our goal is to fully fund Camp Elah for the remainder of 2025. This will allow us to focus on what’s ahead—completing the Revive in ’25 Tour and much more! Till All Hear,Sean \-------Forwarded message------- From: Sean Feucht Date: Wednesday, April 30, 2025 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: Will You Help Us Keep The Fire Burning At Camp Elah? 🙏🇺🇸 | | Dear Peter, This is a very special time for Let Us Worship. Tomorrow is the National Day of Prayer, and this week we are celebrating THREE YEARS of our D.C. ministry, Camp Elah. God has opened MASSIVE doors in the political world and allowed us to minister to, pray for, pray with, and share the Gospel with policymakers, elected officials, and men and women who make up all levels of our government—and let me tell you, GOD’S AT WORK!! We are launching a two-week prayer time and fundraising drive to help fully fund Camp Elah for this year and beyond. We want Let Us Worship to grow ROOTS in Washington, D.C., and become synonymous with Christ-centered politics. When people talk about the next generation of God-fearing politicians and politicos, we want them to have passed through our doors and worshiped with us! | | | | This two-week fundraising drive is critical to our mission. We’ve spent so much time and resources bringing worship and the Gospel to the far corners of the earth—Israel, Turkey, South Africa, and Mozambique (so far!)—but we don’t want to ignore the Lord’s calling on our ministry in Washington, D.C. If you are able and feel led, please consider contributing to our Camp Elah ministry and investing in a Christ-centered government for years to come. Till all hear, Sean | | | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

subject: Elon Musk is making billions of dollars off the federal government
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107269432/544143215/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWU0NGQ0MS03MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PXEKTKyxMiM8oIoOON0fKN0enlVjy0-om0rZuPNARfI=&emci=631c0f57-b32a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=19e44d41-722b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6787172)
---
Hey Folks:
Thanks to Trump and Elon, DOGE is well on its way to completely eliminating essential federal programs. The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), the EPA, the Department of Veterans Affairs, and AmeriCorps have all had their funding slashed and workers eliminated thanks to DOGE.
**Meanwhile, Elon’s companies are receiving billions of dollars in government contracts.**
Thanks to DOGE’s cuts to NASA and the FAA, Starlink and SpaceX are conveniently positioned to leech resources from the federal government that should be going to essential services.
**This is blatant corruption.**
An unelected billionaire is poised to make himself even richer off our tax dollars. And if we don’t do something about it, he’ll just keep sabotaging public services to rake in more money.
[We’re sick and tired of Elon Musk taking advantage of our political system. clean_body: | Hey Folks: Thanks to Trump and Elon, DOGE is well on its way to completely eliminating essential federal programs. The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), the EPA, the Department of Veterans Affairs, and AmeriCorps have all had their funding slashed and workers eliminated thanks to DOGE. Meanwhile, Elon’s companies are receiving billions of dollars in government contracts. Thanks to DOGE’s cuts to NASA and the FAA, Starlink and SpaceX are conveniently positioned to leech resources from the federal government that should be going to essential services. This is blatant corruption. An unelected billionaire is poised to make himself even richer off our tax dollars. And if we don’t do something about it, he’ll just keep sabotaging public services to rake in more money. | Thanks for taking a stand! NextGen America | | = |

I don’t need to tell you how important it is that we take back the Senate next year. That’s why I’ve set a $250,000 launch day goal to come out of the gate swinging and show the MAGA movement that the United States Senate cannot be bought and sold. Please, Peter, can you rush $10 before midnight split between me and Blue Amp Action to take back the Senate? Anything you can chip in will make a major difference >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0583274d-00f3-493a-98fb-65d638046648/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Peter, I don’t need to tell you about why it’s critical that we take back the Senate to shut down Trump’s far-right MAGA maniacs. In just 100 days, they’ve tried to take a sledgehammer to our Democracy. I served in Congress through Trump’s first presidency, and we’re witnessing firsthand the destruction he leaves in his path. My parents moved here from India when I was a kid in search of the American Dream. And they did a pretty incredible job of providing for my brother and I. They worked hard and made it because of critical programs like public housing and SNAP assistance. Now, Donald Trump wants to dismantle those critical services that provide a helping hand to millions of Americans. That’s why I REFUSE to sit by and watch him and his cronies dismantle these crucial programs. **[So, I’m humbly asking you,](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc749b0c1-386f-47f2-afc7-df3c976ef291/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ Peter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e47013e-2b7b-4b79-a4d6-da9be05305ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3153cb2e-0b33-41cc-9d56-13f61b725f16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter, I don’t need to tell you about why it’s critical that we take back the Senate to shut down Trump’s far-right MAGA maniacs.

In just 100 days, they’ve tried to take a sledgehammer to our Democracy.

I served in Congress through Trump’s first presidency, and we’re witnessing firsthand the destruction he leaves in his path.

**My parents moved here from India when I was a baby in search of the American Dream.**

And they did a pretty incredible job of providing for my brother and I.

They worked hard and made it because of critical programs like public housing and SNAP assistance.

Now, Donald Trump wants to dismantle those critical services that provide a helping hand to millions of Americans.

clean_body: = = It’s Raja Krishnamoorthi here. I just launched my Democratic campaign for Sen. Dick Durbin’s open Senate seat in Illinois. = | | = Peter, I don’t need to tell you about why it’s critical that we take back the Senate to shut down Trump’s far-right MAGA maniacs. In just 100 days, they’ve tried to take a sledgehammer to our Democracy. I served in Congress through Trump’s first presidency, and we’re witnessing firsthand the destruction he leaves in his path. My parents moved here from India when I was a baby in search of the American Dream. And they did a pretty incredible job of providing for my brother and I. They worked hard and made it because of critical programs like public housing and SNAP assistance. Now, Donald Trump wants to dismantle those critical services that provide a helping hand to millions of Americans. = = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Raja Krishnamoorthi | Democrat Raja Krishnamoorthi is running for Senate in Illinois to fight back against Donald Trump and the far-right MAGA movement, protect critical programs like Social Security and Medicare, and rebuild the middle class. body:
Here's what JanePAC supporters told us.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107269749/544144375/1328794144?refcode=ea.158303c2-722b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.158303c2-722b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1ODMwM2MyLTcyMmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnBEWHX__iEJ990Ml4lBqM3QS5U4ZAdv8KKfEuGtZ5w=&emci=9138e07e-512b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=158303c2-722b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)
---
Hi there — last week, Jane asked folks to take a short strategy survey to help shape the next phase of our people-powered climate movement. Today, we’ve tallied up the results, and we wanted to give you a quick look at what we learned from grassroots supporters like you: **1\. People want accountability.** A strong majority of respondents told us that calling out fossil fuel corporations and holding them accountable is the most effective way to grow our movement. **2\. Climate impacts are personal.** The top climate-related concerns were extreme weather, pollution and public health, and the rising cost of living driven by the climate crisis. **3\. The fight goes beyond protecting our climate.** When we asked what other issues JanePAC should speak up about, the most common response was threats to democracy and voting rights, with Trump’s authoritarian agenda close behind. This feedback is already shaping our roadmap for the year ahead — and we’re gearing up to endorse new climate champions, mobilize voters in key races, and build the strongest possible defense against Donald Trump’s dirty agenda in Washington. **[This work doesn’t happen without people like you, but we haven’t heard from you yet. You can still share your thoughts by clicking here. We promise there are real people reviewing your feedback.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107269751/544144377/928451194?refcode=ea.158303c2-722b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.158303c2-722b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1ODMwM2MyLTcyMmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnBEWHX__iEJ990Ml4lBqM3QS5U4ZAdv8KKfEuGtZ5w=&emci=9138e07e-512b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=158303c2-722b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)** | [**TAKE THE SURVEY →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107269758/544144384/928451194?refcode=ea.158303c2-722b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.158303c2-722b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1ODMwM2MyLTcyMmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BnBEWHX__iEJ990Ml4lBqM3QS5U4ZAdv8KKfEuGtZ5w=&emci=9138e07e-512b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=158303c2-722b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: Here's what JanePAC supporters told us. | Hi there — last week, Jane asked folks to take a short strategy survey to help shape the next phase of our people-powered climate movement. Today, we’ve tallied up the results, and we wanted to give you a quick look at what we learned from grassroots supporters like you: 1\. People want accountability. A strong majority of respondents told us that calling out fossil fuel corporations and holding them accountable is the most effective way to grow our movement. 2\. Climate impacts are personal. The top climate-related concerns were extreme weather, pollution and public health, and the rising cost of living driven by the climate crisis. 3\. The fight goes beyond protecting our climate. When we asked what other issues JanePAC should speak up about, the most common response was threats to democracy and voting rights, with Trump’s authoritarian agenda close behind. This feedback is already shaping our roadmap for the year ahead — and we’re gearing up to endorse new climate champions, mobilize voters in key races, and build the strongest possible defense against Donald Trump’s dirty agenda in Washington. | Thank you for being part of this work. We’re so glad you’re here. — Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: House Republican Leadership
subject: Salon attacks Pete Hegseth a veteran and public servant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We’re not just angry, we’re DISGUSTED!

| |
---
| | | _We 're not just angry, we're DISGUSTED!_

Salon just fired off an hit piece and called your Secretary of Defense **" a monumental national security risk."**

This is revolting. It's a vicious insult hurled at a two-time Bronze Star recipient and someone who dedicated his live to serving our nation's veterans.

House Majority Leader Scalise circulated a petition last week after The Atlantic published its character assassination against Pete Hegseth but now we're upping the stakes.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Putting the people back in power.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
People are afraid because authoritarians want to make you afraid, and they want you to be silent.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250507-5020-footer&t=1&akid=5020%2E420207%2EO4x7eA)
Peter,
This past Sunday, thousands of people from across the country joined us for our first-ever Resistance Lab 2.0 workshop to prepare for the constitutional crisis that is right in front of us.
**That’s thousands of people who gave up their time on a Sunday because they know that this is a time of crisis and the clock is ticking — and I couldn’t be more grateful.**
The truth is, democracies fall in a matter of months. Authoritarians come into power and then move with frightening speed to enact their chaos and cruelty. And unfortunately, too many of us in America have become complacent — many may have felt that our democracy was stable, and that checks and balances would protect us.
But what we are seeing now is that those checks and balances — whether it’s Congress or the courts — only work if those in power abide by them. If they don’t, then the only real course of action is for the people to act collectively to force change.
That’s why it’s so important that we all do our part. Democracies are never saved by just one person or even one institution. **It takes _all_ of us building momentum and doing what we can.**
We’re going to keep doing our part by bringing the Resistance Lab to people all over the country who want to learn about effective tactics for nonviolent resistance. But none of it is possible without your grassroots support.
[**If you’re in a position to donate, would you pitch in $10, $20, or whatever amount you can to help us sustain this nationwide organizing effort?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250507?refcode=em20250507-5020&amount=10&refcode2=5020_420207_O4x7eA&akid=5020%2E420207%2EO4x7eA)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250507?amount=10&refcode=em20250507-5020&refcode2=5020_420207_O4x7eA&akid=5020%2E420207%2EO4x7eA)**
I know there’s a lot of fear out there right now. People are afraid because authoritarians want to _make_ you afraid, and they want you to be silent.
But I also know that millions of us are standing up, speaking out, and taking direct actions to resist — and that truly matters.
So thank you, Peter, for everything you’re doing in this moment. Together we’ll build the momentum we need to put the people back in power.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250507-5020-footer&t=2&refcode2=5020_420207_O4x7eA&akid=5020%2E420207%2EO4x7eA)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: People are afraid because authoritarians want to make you afraid, and they want you to be silent. Peter, This past Sunday, thousands of people from across the country joined us for our first-ever Resistance Lab 2.0 workshop to prepare for the constitutional crisis that is right in front of us. That’s thousands of people who gave up their time on a Sunday because they know that this is a time of crisis and the clock is ticking — and I couldn’t be more grateful. The truth is, democracies fall in a matter of months. Authoritarians come into power and then move with frightening speed to enact their chaos and cruelty. And unfortunately, too many of us in America have become complacent — many may have felt that our democracy was stable, and that checks and balances would protect us. But what we are seeing now is that those checks and balances — whether it’s Congress or the courts — only work if those in power abide by them. If they don’t, then the only real course of action is for the people to act collectively to force change. That’s why it’s so important that we all do our part. Democracies are never saved by just one person or even one institution. It takes all of us building momentum and doing what we can. We’re going to keep doing our part by bringing the Resistance Lab to people all over the country who want to learn about effective tactics for nonviolent resistance. But none of it is possible without your grassroots support. I know there’s a lot of fear out there right now. People are afraid because authoritarians want to make you afraid, and they want you to be silent. But I also know that millions of us are standing up, speaking out, and taking direct actions to resist — and that truly matters. So thank you, Peter, for everything you’re doing in this moment. Together we’ll build the momentum we need to put the people back in power. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

# [Griffin vs. Riggs - it's finally over](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=163077439&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMDc3NDM5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY2NDQ3ODIsImV4cCI6MTc0OTIzNjc4MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oLXckIiyqeTwiMgXOvHgjxY1pWTlzrLy1I3MUjb8mJA)
### I couldn't say much about this, until today
| | [Jeff Jackson](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---
| May 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=163077439&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMDc3NDM5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NjY0NDc4MiwiZXhwIjoxNzQ5MjM2NzgyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTE0NTAyMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.i_u7g2S1VYXfEUlI0SU_gsvxbOdKT9RzydffeOpIduA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=163077439&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMDc3NDM5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY2NDQ3ODIsImV4cCI6MTc0OTIzNjc4MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oLXckIiyqeTwiMgXOvHgjxY1pWTlzrLy1I3MUjb8mJA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=163077439&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMDc3NDM5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDY2NDQ3ODIsImV4cCI6MTc0OTIzNjc4MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.oLXckIiyqeTwiMgXOvHgjxY1pWTlzrLy1I3MUjb8mJA)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jeffjacksonnc/p/griffin-vs-riggs-its-finally-over?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I couldn't say much about this - until today.
Here's what happened:
* * *
On my second day as Attorney General, I called a meeting to discuss the state Supreme Court election litigation.
As you know, the race had been called for Justice Allison Riggs. Then the other candidate, Jefferson Griffin, sued, and a sprawling legal battle began.
Our office - NCDOJ - led the legal defense of the election. Our client was the State Board of Elections, and their position was clear: the votes had been tallied three times, and Riggs had won.
It was a long meeting. But by the end, I was confident we had the right team in place. We've got some brilliant attorneys at NCDOJ, and this team, in particular, is truly impressive.
We made a series of early strategic decisions in that first conversation - including one that I insisted on: we wouldn't make any substantive public comment until the case was over.
Close elections are inherently partisan. And while public consensus seemed to grow over time that this election battle should end, I wanted to avoid inflaming passions or creating any perception of bias. It was clear we had the stronger legal argument, so I was comfortable letting the case speak for itself.
Still, the question kept coming: _" Why isn't the AG holding a press conference about this?"_
As the fight went on, the pressure to respond publicly increased. But the goal wasn't a soundbite. The goal was to win in court. The ideal scenario was one in which our legal arguments stayed front and center - and everyone stayed focused on the work.
The case made stops in just about every court you can imagine. It started with the State Board of Elections, then moved to state trial court, then to federal district court, back to state court, up to the Court of Appeals, then to the state Supreme Court - and finally back to federal court, where - on Monday - a federal judge (appointed by President Trump) ordered the election results to be certified.
And then, early today, we were in a meeting about tackling money laundering and fentanyl when someone broke the news: "Griffin concedes."
It was a big moment for a small team that's been carrying this huge case for months. I can't tell you how many hours they've worked - or how many legal filings they've written, revised, and argued along the way.
Now that we've won, here's what I want to say:
I'm proud that our office led the legal defense of this election. It was a serious legal fight to protect the lawful ballots of thousands of voters.
But let's be clear - this never should have happened.
There was no sound legal basis for trying to change the rules after the fact. From the start, it was an attempt to twist the law to reverse the outcome of a legitimate election.
And it put tens of thousands of valid votes at risk - including ballots from military servicemembers and long-time North Carolinians who followed the rules and voted lawfully.
This challenge failed. But it got more traction than it ever should have. That fact alone will encourage some to try again.
We'll be ready. We will always defend your right to vote - and the lawful outcomes of elections.
I'm deeply proud of the attorneys in my office who fought to protect those votes - and won.
Congratulations to Justice Allison Riggs.
The rule of law held. The will of the voters was upheld.
Best,
Jeff

Here's what happened: On my second day as Attorney General, I called a meeting to discuss the state Supreme Court election litigation. As you know, the race had been called for Justice Allison Riggs. Then the other candidate, Jefferson Griffin, sued, and a sprawling legal battle began. Our office - NCDOJ - led the legal defense of the election. Our client was the State Board of Elections, and their position was clear: the votes had been tallied three times, and Riggs had won. It was a long meeting. But by the end, I was confident we had the right team in place. We've got some brilliant attorneys at NCDOJ, and this team, in particular, is truly impressive. We made a series of early strategic decisions in that first conversation - including one that I insisted on: we wouldn't make any substantive public comment until the case was over. Close elections are inherently partisan. And while public consensus seemed to grow over time that this election battle should end, I wanted to avoid inflaming passions or creating any perception of bias. It was clear we had the stronger legal argument, so I was comfortable letting the case speak for itself. Still, the question kept coming: " Why isn't the AG holding a press conference about this?" As the fight went on, the pressure to respond publicly increased. But the goal wasn't a soundbite. The goal was to win in court. The ideal scenario was one in which our legal arguments stayed front and center - and everyone stayed focused on the work. The case made stops in just about every court you can imagine. It started with the State Board of Elections, then moved to state trial court, then to federal district court, back to state court, up to the Court of Appeals, then to the state Supreme Court - and finally back to federal court, where - on Monday - a federal judge (appointed by President Trump) ordered the election results to be certified. And then, early today, we were in a meeting about tackling money laundering and fentanyl when someone broke the news: "Griffin concedes." It was a big moment for a small team that's been carrying this huge case for months. I can't tell you how many hours they've worked - or how many legal filings they've written, revised, and argued along the way. Now that we've won, here's what I want to say: I'm proud that our office led the legal defense of this election. It was a serious legal fight to protect the lawful ballots of thousands of voters. But let's be clear - this never should have happened. There was no sound legal basis for trying to change the rules after the fact. From the start, it was an attempt to twist the law to reverse the outcome of a legitimate election. And it put tens of thousands of valid votes at risk - including ballots from military servicemembers and long-time North Carolinians who followed the rules and voted lawfully. This challenge failed. But it got more traction than it ever should have. That fact alone will encourage some to try again. We'll be ready. We will always defend your right to vote - and the lawful outcomes of elections. I'm deeply proud of the attorneys in my office who fought to protect those votes - and won. Congratulations to Justice Allison Riggs. The rule of law held. The will of the voters was upheld. body:
This is shocking

|
---

| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107270630/544147259/-1757917442?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_ABupdate_250507_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGYxNjI0Ny03NTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EIV7ilSN6V-wCB87rkcza_7FGczVk2eVmNxALHnzI3E=) Derek,

After Donald Trump ordered his Attorney General to investigate ActBlue – a blatant attempt to silence you and the millions of other Americans who use ActBlue to engage in the political process – **a report revealed that the funding for some of Trump’s “data” on ActBlue’s supposed “fraud” came from none other than a super-PAC bankrolled by Elon Musk.**

Of course the richest man in the world – who has spent over $300 million of his own money to elect his allies – is supporting Trump’s baseless investigation into one of the biggest pillars of Democrats’ grassroots fundraising infrastructure.

Trump and Musk want to make it harder for you to donate to the candidates and organizations you support – while billionaires like Elon dump unprecedented amounts of cash into super PACs to elect Republicans.

**It’s a never-before-seen abuse of power that we can’t let go unanswered.**

My campaign won’t let Trump or Musk strongarm our supporters or deter us from doing the work necessary to protect this seat in the midterms and take back the Senate for Democrats.

[_**The best way to join our fight against Elon Musk and Donald Trump is to support the candidates and organizations speaking out against them and their dangerous attacks on our democracy. Team, Republicans know they’re losing in the court of public opinion, which is why they’re pushing for the passage of the _**SAVE Act**_. This legislation is another Republican effort to attack voting rights. If passed, the _SAVE Act_ would silence the voices of 21 million Americans, disenfranchise women voters, and make it more difficult to reregister to vote. Several key local elections are coming up, and New Mexico voters could be affected right as registration forms and mail-in ballots begin to circulate. **I refuse to stand by and let Republicans silence our voices. ** I’m doing everything I can to push back. And that includes working to flip the Senate and elect more pro-democracy leaders. **[If you stand with our fight to protect voting rights and support pro-democracy campaigns, please chip in $5 or more today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107271304/544149380/171185841?amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmIxYzRhMi03NTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N8ZyWIkSGcksis9u8T6w2RSrXzRsvv-oZjtxS2NNdZ8=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107271305/544149382/171185841?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmIxYzRhMi03NTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N8ZyWIkSGcksis9u8T6w2RSrXzRsvv-oZjtxS2NNdZ8=)

clean_body: Republicans know they can’t win a fair fight. Team, Republicans know they’re losing in the court of public opinion, which is why they’re pushing for the passage of the SAVE Act. This legislation is another Republican effort to attack voting rights. If passed, the SAVE Act would silence the voices of 21 million Americans, disenfranchise women voters, and make it more difficult to reregister to vote. Several key local elections are coming up, and New Mexico voters could be affected right as registration forms and mail-in ballots begin to circulate. I refuse to stand by and let Republicans silence our voices. I’m doing everything I can to push back. And that includes working to flip the Senate and elect more pro-democracy leaders. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Republicans know they can’t win a fair fight. name: Trump Corruption Watch via Our Revolution
subject: Stop Trump's Crypto Scam — Tell Congress to Reject the GENIUS Act Now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Dear friend,

TOMORROW, the Senate will vote on Donald Trump's dangerous GENIUS Act – a
deceptive bill designed to legitimize shady cryptocurrency schemes and
open floodgates for corruption. ESPECIALLY for Donald Trump.

Trump is already raking in billions in profits off of crypto schemes – and
this bill would supercharge that corruption, allowing Trump and other
billionaires to mint what amounts to their own private currencies by
creating a crypto product called "stablecoins".

To pass, the bill needs support from a handful of Democrats, and pressure
is building for them to say NO to Trump’s crypto con job.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26720?source=email-20250507&t=1011&akid=8414%2E5885482%2EdJhnvr ]Scoop: Trump coins spark Democratic feud over crypto legislation

With the vote rapidly approaching, it’s going to take ALL of us to demand
Democrats in Congress stand firm and block this bill before it's too late.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26721?source=email-20250507&t=1012&akid=8414%2E5885482%2EdJhnvr ]Our Revolution will deliver our petition directly to Capitol Hill
before the vote. We’ll be face-to-face with key Senators, holding
Democrats accountable and making sure they hear loud and clear: don’t sell
us out to crypto corporations and Trump’s cronies. Will you add your name?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26721?source=email-20250507&t=1013&akid=8414%2E5885482%2EdJhnvr ]ADD YOUR NAME

The bill hasn't even passed and the Trump family is racing to profit. They
just unveiled new plans at a luxury cryptocurrency conference in Dubai and
are moving ahead with a $2 billion deal with a UAE-backed fund using
Trump’s own stablecoin.

The level of corruption is stunning. But besides enriching Trump and his
powerful crypto allies, the GENIUS Act would let cryptocurrency firms
escape accountability, reducing oversight and slashing protections against
scams and abuses. Experts estimate that crypto scams cost everyday
Americans more than $10 billion last year alone – far exceeding losses
from traditional financial fraud.

And yet, unbelievably, Trump and his allies have persuaded Senators –
including a few Democrats tempted by crypto lobbyists – to get on board.
If passed, this bill would strip financial regulators of the tools they
need to defend working families, leaving millions more vulnerable.

We only have days left to stop this harmful bill from advancing further.
Democrats in the Senate are already feeling the heat, but it’s up to all
of us to keep up the pressure.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26721?source=email-20250507&t=1014&akid=8414%2E5885482%2EdJhnvr ]Will you urgently add your name to stop Trump’s crypto con job? Our
Revolution will deliver our voices straight to Capitol Hill before the
vote!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: GIFFORDS
subject: ❗To everyone who cares about our movement for gun safety, please don't skip this message. 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If everyone getting this email donated even $1, we'd have the resources to show that our movement is stronger than ever.
#

👋 Friends -
To everybody who cares about our movement for gun safety, please don’t skip this important message.

Just days ago, the Trump administration ripped away $1 billion in mental health resources to stop school shootings — during Mental Health Awareness Month.
This decision will have devastating impacts on our kids and communities.

In 2022, Republicans AND Democrats came together to pass the first federal gun violence prevention bill in nearly 30 years.
This included funding so schools could hire social workers and mental health professionals, including for at-risk kids.
These resources have been proven to reduce gun violence. But because of Donald Trump’s actions, millions of kids just lost their access to mental health services.

We know the Trump administration won’t stop there. They will try to dismantle all of the progress we’ve achieved to make our communities safer from gun violence.
We are doing all we can to demand elected officials up and down the ballot stand up to Donald Trump and pass gun safety legislation.
But team, that takes resources from supporters like you.

You helped us so much to pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act in 2022. Now, we need your support again to protect what we accomplished together.
99% of people won't give today; they'll simply click away.
But if everyone getting this email donated even $1, we'd have the resources we need to show that our movement is stronger than ever.

[**Please, if you’re ready to make a huge impact to advance our movement for gun safety, please give any amount to GIFFORDS PAC today. Our average online donation is around $27. Some give more, others give less. What matters most is that you are taking action today in the fight to make our communities safer.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250507-1-b&t=1&akid=10403%2E3935704%2EztRRdI)

clean_body: If everyone getting this email donated even $1, we'd have the resources to show that our movement is stronger than ever. 👋 Friends - To everybody who cares about our movement for gun safety, please don’t skip this important message. Just days ago, the Trump administration ripped away $1 billion in mental health resources to stop school shootings — during Mental Health Awareness Month. This decision will have devastating impacts on our kids and communities. In 2022, Republicans AND Democrats came together to pass the first federal gun violence prevention bill in nearly 30 years. This included funding so schools could hire social workers and mental health professionals, including for at-risk kids. These resources have been proven to reduce gun violence. But because of Donald Trump’s actions, millions of kids just lost their access to mental health services. We know the Trump administration won’t stop there. They will try to dismantle all of the progress we’ve achieved to make our communities safer from gun violence. We are doing all we can to demand elected officials up and down the ballot stand up to Donald Trump and pass gun safety legislation. But team, that takes resources from supporters like you. You helped us so much to pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act in 2022. Now, we need your support again to protect what we accomplished together. 99% of people won't give today; they'll simply click away. But if everyone getting this email donated even $1, we'd have the resources we need to show that our movement is stronger than ever. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** 🙏Thank you. Your support — especially today — is critical. The team at GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Victoria Spartz
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VICTORIA SPARTZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
We cannot allow radical Leftists to intimidate us into submission
---
| | | | | | |

Friend,

Support from patriotic, freedom-loving Americans like you fuels _everything I do_ in Congress.

The American people elected our President and Republicans in the House and Senate to advance real conservative priorities. From cutting waste and fraud in government to ending the illegal immigration crisis, **I 'm fighting with all Republicans to make progress for Americans.**

But in order to keep up the fight, **[I need your help.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=651ae1cc51d54befba044e4b87d38b10&_e=bpnf-qBVoMgpQ6Pup_1ZbDK6-e_UhxBAm1wj2JZJZnfO1PSJjDL9kj5lBLa4eq4DA2h46lJJ39U7RiDni0djU81w0ZwSTIpaDlsn337QOh9-yvBDl6sTVTgvN0XfFfXMxkJYY546ReJwK7l4vo87AeH1dxnNQ9HeadyWeA_rtWqCS6hZrqh-lJZ0_aesP_Bojw7Tm2A5ONoliHWT4NWIkgddeb1HmAZB5tAMZIiICKwGD8XMGLeF5BBYawF67m_wAMx4tw97uiliCSxEIwIXqcqMcBg3GSKNrwKdKxwy96rQ186SI0woyC1IHb1mlIBWOmw8GIznUXWI3omTVJSUWcj3wDA1YAZ9lcFO8ibMAzu0OasTF7wIiROv558ie9fj)** | [DONATE NOW](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=651ae1cc51d54befba044e4b87d38b10&_e=bpnf-qBVoMgpQ6Pup_1ZbDK6-e_UhxBAm1wj2JZJZnfO1PSJjDL9kj5lBLa4eq4DA2h46lJJ39U7RiDni0djU81w0ZwSTIpaDlsn337QOh9-yvBDl6sTVTgvN0XfFfXMxkJYY546ReJwK7l4vo87AeH1dxnNQ9HeadyWeA_rtWqCS6hZrqh-lJZ0_aesP_Bojw7Tm2A5ONoliHWT4NWIkgddeb1HmAZB5tAMZIiICKxZKW2s0VshKaUD61AKxjj8E8dNVv02k2umy1M6GNTiQ60rFHB-g6RUAE4Cw2y1q0tmiye1hgrEMSzyoTbnxVAJv6PzuAMfJ94XtyXt_daKP7iI1H-d5LLFS08ig_MdVPTR4bKggqFn4RI2e2Gawi1W)
---

We cannot allow radical Leftists to intimidate and bully us into submission. **Your support will ensure I can continue to stand up for the freedoms and values we hold dear** -_regardless of anything the Democrats do to distort the truth._

On the other hand, without grassroots support from patriotic Americans, I will be at a _severe disadvantage._ I will not be able to spread my messages far and wide, and my fight to advance conservative, America First priorities will be that much harder.

**What 's at stake is far too important to let up for even a moment.**

I grew up in a socialist-controlled Ukraine. _I know firsthand that limited government is always better._ I know how dangerous it is to give even an inch to radical-Leftists.

That's why I fight every single day to champion conservative principles in Congress. **Our country must never go down the dark path of socialism.**

If you agree-if you want to be a part of my movement to stop the waste, fraud and abuse, shrink the government and expand our freedoms-**[right now is the best moment to join me.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=651ae1cc51d54befba044e4b87d38b10&_e=bpnf-qBVoMgpQ6Pup_1ZbDK6-e_UhxBAm1wj2JZJZnfO1PSJjDL9kj5lBLa4eq4DA2h46lJJ39U7RiDni0djU81w0ZwSTIpaDlsn337QOh9-yvBDl6sTVTgvN0XfFfXMxkJYY546ReJwK7l4vo87AeH1dxnNQ9HeadyWeA_rtWqCS6hZrqh-lJZ0_aesP_Bojw7Tm2A5ONoliHWT4NWIkgddeb1HmAZB5tAMZIiICKy_zZttvZvGLW6i_Tkf2Cg1Plw4KmYhVp-ww_K5nkoRGzFuYJ_YRiC0PLEWNPa5sxVu6LqmqYCB_a1_O2w5WrypnB7SBhsW2kp8QKRrkQd5jNQMQvUQf6pc-u70wJdYpxq6zFkK-hX3dRHJYS4ysz14)**

[DONATE NOW](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=651ae1cc51d54befba044e4b87d38b10&_e=bpnf-qBVoMgpQ6Pup_1ZbDK6-e_UhxBAm1wj2JZJZnfO1PSJjDL9kj5lBLa4eq4DA2h46lJJ39U7RiDni0djU81w0ZwSTIpaDlsn337QOh9-yvBDl6sTVTgvN0XfFfXMxkJYY546ReJwK7l4vo87AeH1dxnNQ9HeadyWeA_rtWqCS6hZrqh-lJZ0_aesP_Bojw7Tm2A5ONoliHWT4NWIkgddeb1HmAZB5tAMZIiICKxj7TATumex9MiVYUS0pMovYc8x_i-mpy6XzBJ33mxrDS3BkQOG2L9YHy1VGZSN-IRPXzBmJzTiboubkt40_HaNF-3-BlvT3_CFun5jsMguXWpcf21rcikpqxnrqQ5uD6x1cIHlyhMuAeQih5ZOvOsq)

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

I can't do this without you, Friend.

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: it’s exhausting
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Believe me, it’s a lot to deal with. But I refuse to get overwhelmed: I roll up my sleeves and get to work.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107272372/544153060/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDdiYTZhNC03ODJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3Q9pAOeB6Dh5_EDCq7bQJtUACENFeX-ZGMB1Ima80s=) I know the news can be exhausting right now. Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs are driving up the cost of everything from electronics to groceries. Musk’s DOGE cronies are demolishing federal agencies and canceling vital public services. And the government is still diverting crucial resources towards an illegal scheme to ship immigrants to a foreign prison overseas. **And in the midst of all Trump’s chaos, Republicans in Congress are plotting to steal hardworking Americans’ Medicaid benefits to pay for another billionaire tax break.** Believe me, it’s a lot to deal with. But I refuse to get overwhelmed: **I roll up my sleeves and get to work. And you can help too.** Whether it’s by attending a protest, calling your representatives, or donating to candidates and causes fighting for vulnerable communities, you have the power to fight back and make a difference today. That’s why I’m reaching out with a special request: [**Will you take a moment to fill out our May priorities survey? I need to know which fights are most important to you, and help you find a way to fight back as Donald Trump escalates his all-out assault on America’s values. →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107272373/544153061/-1037485393?refcode=email_050725_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDdiYTZhNC03ODJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3Q9pAOeB6Dh5_EDCq7bQJtUACENFeX-ZGMB1Ima80s=&emci=68640e5a-662b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=e47ba6a4-782b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=5643047) | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107272374/544153063/-1037485393?refcode=email_050725_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDdiYTZhNC03ODJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3Q9pAOeB6Dh5_EDCq7bQJtUACENFeX-ZGMB1Ima80s=&emci=68640e5a-662b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=e47ba6a4-782b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=5643047)**
---
I appreciate your input. We might not be able to win every fight, but with this grassroots movement by my side, I know we can make a real difference.
Thank you,
-Andrea

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: a beacon of hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Team,
On Election Day this November 2025, I don’t just want to win — **_I want to win big.
**_
Because as Democrats, the bigger we win in Virginia in 2025, the louder a message we’ll send about the 2026 midterms.
People in Virginia and across the country are looking at our race as a bellwether for Democrats. In every zip code and every community, Democrats are understandably frightened and angry about the chaos coming out of Washington. And to them, our race is a beacon of hope. It’s an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation’s history.
And can I be honest for a minute? That’s a lot of weight on my shoulders. But I’m ready to seize the moment and win big. I feel honored that people have put so much hope into our campaign, and it’s a big reason why I’ve worked to stay above the fray and focus on what matters: **winning big and delivering real, meaningful change when we do.**
And I hope that as you read this email, you’ll buy into that vision too. Because there is light at the end of the tunnel. We just have to keep going. So let’s win big in 2025 — so we can win big in 2026, and 2027, and 2028, and beyond.
[**But we can’t do it without you! Will you split a donation between The Long Run and my campaign today to make sure we have what it takes to win big this November?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-spanberger.5n3PZX&refcode=em250507-1-360&t=1&akid=5542%2E196590%2EzuBYs_)

People in Virginia and across the country are looking at our race as a bellwether for Democrats. It’s an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation’s history. And can I be honest for a minute? That’s a lot of weight on my shoulders. But I’m ready to seize the moment and win big. I feel honored that people have put so much hope into our campaign, and it’s a big reason why I’ve worked to stay above the fray and focus on what matters: winning big and delivering real, meaningful change when we do. And I hope that as you read this email, you’ll buy into that vision too. Because there is light at the end of the tunnel. We just have to keep going. So let’s win big in 2025 — so we can win big in 2026, and 2027, and 2028, and beyond. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Abigail Spanberger

name: Wes Moore
subject: What I had to say on The View
body:
[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=37%2E1086043%2Ewgqw8d ]Wes Moore for Governor[ https://act.wesmoore.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=37%2E1086043%2Ewgqw8d ]Wes Moore for Governor

I know about
the impact bad policies can have on people’s lives. And right now, there’s
a lot of chaos coming out of Washington.

From the farmers on the Eastern Shore to the people who work at the Port
of Baltimore, from families who are seeing prices go up to federal workers
who are losing their jobs, I’ve heard the pain many are facing across
our state because of
bad policy coming out of Washington.

But this is a moment where we must know our own power. Governors and state
governments are the bulwark against bad policies from the Trump
administration. We’re taking action to support workers and defend
Maryland’s economy — and it’s working.

I’m here to tell you it can be done, but it will take all of us working
together.

clean_body: [ ]Wes Moore for Governor[ ]Wes Moore for Governor I know about the impact bad policies can have on people’s lives. And right now, there’s a lot of chaos coming out of Washington. From the farmers on the Eastern Shore to the people who work at the Port of Baltimore, from families who are seeing prices go up to federal workers who are losing their jobs, I’ve heard the pain many are facing across our state because of bad policy coming out of Washington. But this is a moment where we must know our own power. Governors and state governments are the bulwark against bad policies from the Trump administration. We’re taking action to support workers and defend Maryland’s economy — and it’s working. I’m here to tell you it can be done, but it will take all of us working together. ## Grans lead protest as influx of visitors to Anglesey beach hotspot leaves village gridlocked
Two grandmothers and a dedicated community member are spearheading protests against the traffic chaos plaguing Newborough, Anglesey. The picturesque Welsh village has become gridlocked due to an influx of visitors heading to its popular beach. Locals are expressing growing frustration as the village regularly grinds to a halt during peak tourist seasons. Hey Peter! My name is Ociele, Digital Organizer with One PA. After election day, everyone has been talking about how the far-right dominates online. We have learned the hard way: every time we fight, we don’t always win. The biggest takeaway though is _**when we don’t fight, we lose — always.**_ [That’s why, we’re assembling a statewide digital team to fight back by amplifying racial, economic, gender, electoral, and environmental justice issues on social media.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107272719/544154691/598754829?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250507_vol_megaphone_team_oc_act_xx_l1&ms=EM_FL_OPA_20250507_vol_megaphone_team_oc_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4NmQ1MmFiLTc5MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L-4Ur8Mq0hcCF23rdHWFwxDUj5jRZydqTi8-h6eUIm4=&emci=dea67e05-781c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=886d52ab-792b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1206669) | [Join us](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107272721/544154693/598754829?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20250507_vol_megaphone_team_oc_act_xx_sbt1&ms=EM_FL_OPA_20250507_vol_megaphone_team_oc_act_xx_sbt1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vQ1BELzEvMTEzNTk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4NmQ1MmFiLTc5MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=L-4Ur8Mq0hcCF23rdHWFwxDUj5jRZydqTi8-h6eUIm4=&emci=dea67e05-781c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=886d52ab-792b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1206669)
