clean_body: When we don’t fight, we lose — always | = Hey Peter! My name is Ociele, Digital Organizer with One PA. After election day, everyone has been talking about how the far-right dominates online. We have learned the hard way: every time we fight, we don’t always win. The biggest takeaway though is when we don’t fight, we lose — always. | Together, we can push back against Trump and MAGA, and make an impact in our state! It’s real people talking to real people the way they connect – online with our training and support. See you online! Ociele Hawkins Digital Organizer | One PA is a grassroots movement for racial, economic, and social justice in Pennsylvania. We empower Black communities through voter education, endorse candidates who share our values, and prioritize leadership development. Our commitment is to challenge political disillusionment, protect and expand democracy, and unite everyday people to have a voice in our political system. | = = * = | | Paid for by One Pennsylvania One PA 533 S 52nd St Philadelphia, PA 19143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Republicans are doing everything they can to flip the Granite State red.
Peter,
**🚨 New Hampshire is one of the top Senate battleground races 🚨**
National Republicans spent MONTHS trying to convince their handpicked candidate to run for Senate in Georgia — and he just turned them down.
That means that all eyes are now on New Hampshire. Donald Trump and national Republicans can’t afford another loss, so you can bet that they are turning all their efforts toward recruiting an extremist candidate in New Hampshire and flipping the Granite State red.
We aren’t going to let them, but if we’re going to fight back, we need your help **TODAY** to raise the resources we’ll need to fight back against the MAGA billionaires.

Republicans are planning to rip millions of people off their health insurance to fund trillions in tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy.

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107273114/544155632/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc3OGM1MS03YjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y3C85kS-903e7B9wYvCfSUZP0JdMBswmmaRgb36NrOU=&emci=66d8f64a-7b2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1d778c51-7b2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15529135) | Hi there, this week is National Teacher Appreciation Week. This is an important moment for me: I spent over a decade in the classroom teaching students history. Teachers deserve the world — I know how hard they work to deliver for our children, and I am fighting for them in Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107273115/544155633/-1534047261?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc3OGM1MS03YjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y3C85kS-903e7B9wYvCfSUZP0JdMBswmmaRgb36NrOU=) One thing that I always made clear to my students is that it took people fighting for the right to vote, our Constitutional freedoms, and the life we enjoy today. Our historical heroes only became heroes once they used their voices and their people power for good. We are in another historical moment — and what you do in this moment matters. We are currently living under a President who is openly defying the rule of law and a unanimous Supreme Court decision. We can move forward in this moment and fight to protect our democracy from the authoritarianism of the Trump administration, **but it will take all of us to fight back.** **[Your support gives our team the foundation I need to keep up this energy and build the coalition we need across the 5th District to stand up to extremism. clean_body: | | Hi there, this week is National Teacher Appreciation Week. This is an important moment for me: I spent over a decade in the classroom teaching students history. Teachers deserve the world — I know how hard they work to deliver for our children, and I am fighting for them in Congress. = One thing that I always made clear to my students is that it took people fighting for the right to vote, our Constitutional freedoms, and the life we enjoy today. Our historical heroes only became heroes once they used their voices and their people power for good. We are in another historical moment — and what you do in this moment matters. We are currently living under a President who is openly defying the rule of law and a unanimous Supreme Court decision. We can move forward in this moment and fight to protect our democracy from the authoritarianism of the Trump administration, but it will take all of us to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your continued support. Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Kim Schrier
subject: When I first decided to run for Congress, it wasn’t part of some long-term plan.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I became a doctor to care for people. I became a Congresswoman to protect them. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107273381/544156706/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzgyM2M5OS03YzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BdlFvjUoP8mqhPFRRs7sL8RuFrZhvHUh1_8--vM-bgI=&emci=9a7b97ca-b92a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=2c823c99-7c2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter—In just a minute I'm going to ask you to [**consider chipping in any amount you can to help keep this campaign in fighting shape all year round.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107273382/544156707/-1351093942?refcode=em25_250507_frheal_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250507_frheal_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=2c823c99-7c2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzgyM2M5OS03YzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BdlFvjUoP8mqhPFRRs7sL8RuFrZhvHUh1_8--vM-bgI=) But before I do, _I want to explain why:_

When I first decided to run for Congress, it wasn’t part of some long-term plan.

I was a practicing pediatrician, and I loved taking care of my patients and working alongside incredible nurses and healthcare workers in our community.

But then, my member of Congress at the time voted to dismantle the Affordable Care Act—**a move that would have shuttered rural hospitals, left families unable to afford life-saving medications, and stripped health coverage from millions of Americans, including thousands right here in Washington’s 8th District.**

I couldn’t sit by and watch that happen. I knew that somebody needed to act, and fast. So I ran for Congress. And since the moment I arrived in Washington, I’ve fought tooth and nail to protect and expand healthcare access for families like yours. I’ve worked to cap insulin costs at $35 a month for seniors, pushed for lower prescription drug prices for everyone, and co-sponsored legislation to expand mental health services and improve maternal healthcare, and keep kids safer online.

I’ve supported bills that strengthened protections for people with pre-existing conditions and fought efforts to weaken the Affordable Care Act. Because, as a doctor, I know what these policies mean in real life. For the new mom trying to afford critical medication, for the child struggling with asthma, for the senior who’s rationing prescriptions because they cost too much—these are real people, our friends, neighbors, family members, and even ourselves.

And now, Donald Trump and extreme Republicans are coming after our healthcare...again! They’ve made it clear they’ll never stop trying to gut critical programs like Medicaid and Medicare—programs that provide vital support for millions of Americans, from low-income families to seniors to people with disabilities. **They've made it clear they don't care about the consequences on everyday Americans and have no interest in serving the people,_only themselves._**

Simply put: I’m fighting with everything I’ve got to hold extremists accountable, protect essential health programs, and build a healthcare system that works for all of us, not just the wealthy and well-connected, but I can't do it alone. [**Will you chip in today to help me protect affordable, quality healthcare for every American?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107273383/544156708/-1351093942?refcode=em25_250507_frheal_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250507_frheal_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=2c823c99-7c2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzgyM2M5OS03YzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BdlFvjUoP8mqhPFRRs7sL8RuFrZhvHUh1_8--vM-bgI=) clean_body: I became a doctor to care for people. I became a Congresswoman to protect them. Peter—In just a minute I'm going to ask you to = But before I do, I want to explain why: When I first decided to run for Congress, it wasn’t part of some long-term plan. I was a practicing pediatrician, and I loved taking care of my patients and working alongside incredible nurses and healthcare workers in our community. But then, my member of Congress at the time voted to dismantle the Affordable Care Act—a move that would have shuttered rural hospitals, left families unable to afford life-saving medications, and stripped health coverage from millions of Americans, including thousands right here in Washington’s 8th District. I couldn’t sit by and watch that happen. I knew that somebody needed to act, and fast. So I ran for Congress. And since the moment I arrived in Washington, I’ve fought tooth and nail to protect and expand healthcare access for families like yours. I’ve worked to cap insulin costs at $35 a month for seniors, pushed for lower prescription drug prices for everyone, and co-sponsored legislation to expand mental health services and improve maternal healthcare, and keep kids safer online. I’ve supported bills that strengthened protections for people with pre-existing conditions and fought efforts to weaken the Affordable Care Act. Because, as a doctor, I know what these policies mean in real life. For the new mom trying to afford critical medication, for the child struggling with asthma, for the senior who’s rationing prescriptions because they cost too much—these are real people, our friends, neighbors, family members, and even ourselves. And now, Donald Trump and extreme Republicans are coming after our healthcare...again! They’ve made it clear they’ll never stop trying to gut critical programs like Medicaid and Medicare—programs that provide vital support for millions of Americans, from low-income families to seniors to people with disabilities. They've made it clear they don't care about the consequences on everyday Americans and have no interest in serving the people,only themselves. Simply put: I’m fighting with everything I’ve got to hold extremists accountable, protect essential health programs, and build a healthcare system that works for all of us, not just the wealthy and well-connected, but I can't do it alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- With gratitude, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107273820/544158131/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjgwNzdmYi03ZDJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KiBRhi2xFMCmOpK2GyyvkHIaEmRD8hW3wmizOX6Xoag=)

Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Recently, I sat on the Capitol steps and shared one of the most painful memories of my life: holding my husband Andy’s hand as he took his last breaths after a battle with cancer. That experience is why I will never stop fighting Republican attempts to cut access to health care. **Predictably, Stephen Miller jumped at the opportunity to distract his audience by using schoolyard taunts against me.**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107273821/544158139/-1992657408?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjgwNzdmYi03ZDJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KiBRhi2xFMCmOpK2GyyvkHIaEmRD8hW3wmizOX6Xoag=) **Notice what Stephen is doing here.** He doesn’t _actually_ care about women — men, or anyone for that matter. He’s trying to distract from the fact that the far-right wants to take away health care from millions of Americans. The only “pretending” that’s happening here is the Republicans pretending to care about working people while doing everything they can to make life harder for them. I’m sick of it. I’m not here to play into Stephen Miller and the GOP’s bigotry, Peter. No matter how much they attack me, I’m not backing down. I will protect health care from their sticky fingers. **[Peter, will you stand with me by splitting an urgent donation of $10 between me and Fair Shot PAC right now? ## Democrats declare holy war on Christianity, and Catholic Church confirms it will defy new law * WorldNetDaily * by Bob Unruh
Majority Democrats in the autocracy in the state of Washington now have declared open war on Christianity, and the Catholic Church has responded with a volley that includes its commitment to defy a new law. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Passing the torch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Thank you, Senator Durbin.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250507-1&t=1&akid=2094%2E587540%2EHiQpwQ)
Did you see this news, Peter?
**Illinois’ longest serving Senator in state history, Dick Durbin, recently announced his retirement from the Senate, opting not to seek re-election in the 2026 midterm elections.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250507_1_dick_durbin?refcode=em20250507-2094&amount=5&refcode2=2094_587540_HiQpwQ&akid=2094%2E587540%2EHiQpwQ)
Senator Durbin has earned a lengthy record of advocacy and accomplishments to show for it.
Senator Durbin co-authored the original Dream Act and played a significant role in the creation of the DACA program. He has played a leading role in fighting for and achieving meaningful criminal justice reforms. He has also never shied away from taking on the special interests and right-wing extremism – and he’s long been a voice of reason, including as one of the only senators to vote against the Iraq War.
**Now, Senator Durbin says he knows in his heart it’s time to “pass the torch.”**
**Peter, we need to see more of this courageous leadership in Washington.** We know it’s not an easy decision – and we applaud Senator Durbin for making it.
So many of our elected leaders have long records of fighting for us. We are not here to bash them or diminish their service. But we _are_ encouraging them to embrace and empower a new generation of leaders who can continue their fight.
**Leaders We Deserve exists to provide a much-needed boost to young, bold progressives who are running for Congress and state legislatures.** We elected a slate of young leaders in the last election – and we’re not planning to slow down.
In the midterm elections, we’re planning to help young leaders flip red seats blue in competitive seats across the country. And we’re launching a $20 million fund to help young candidates mount primary challenges against asleep-at-the-wheel Democrats who are failing to meet the moment. **This will be our biggest year yet.**
**[If you’re ready to help us elect the next generation of progressive leaders, we need your support more than ever. Can you rush a $5 contribution now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250507_1_dick_durbin?refcode=em20250507-2094&amount=5&refcode2=2094_587540_HiQpwQ&akid=2094%2E587540%2EHiQpwQ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250507_1_dick_durbin?amount=5&refcode=em20250507-2094&refcode2=2094_587540_HiQpwQ&akid=2094%2E587540%2EHiQpwQ)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250507-1&t=2&refcode2=2094_587540_HiQpwQ&akid=2094%2E587540%2EHiQpwQ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2094%2E587540%2EHiQpwQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2094%2E587540%2EHiQpwQ)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

name: Nellie Pou
subject: A quick thank you
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pout-header-3.png]

Team,

I know we've been in your inbox a lot recently, but I want to take a moment to send a thank you to all the folks who stepped up to help us meet our steep April fundraising goal.

With Mike Johnson and the NRCC targeting our race and poised to spend millions, we cannot miss any fundraising goal because while they rely on their ultra-wealthy mega donors, we rely on hardworking families chipping in a few bucks when they can.

It's been a whirlwind since coming to Congress, and I recently spoke to the Bergen Record about my first few months in Washington. Give it a read here [https://www.northjersey.com/story/news/new-jersey/2025/04/25/nj-rep-nellie-pou-reflects-on-first-months-in-congress/83008402007/] .

If you missed out on giving in April, you can do so here. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=250507_np_ty_l1] Our May goal is even bigger as we plan to grow our campaign team to best prepare us for the Republican onslaught.

With you,

Nellie
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/115406/images/pou_headshot_crop.jpg]

About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=6a65b721-7e2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca] Give Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pou_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=6a65b721-7e2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca]
Follow Nellie
https://x.com/NelliePou [https://x.com/NelliePou] https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/ [https://www.facebook.com/senatorpou/] https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/ [https://www.instagram.com/congresswomannelliepou/]

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Fire season is almost here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
The dry season arrived early in New Mexico, and that means forest fires could start up at any time.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1799%2E400544%2E-8v0ge)
The dry season arrived early in New Mexico, and that means forest fires could start up at any time.
**But instead of making sure the Forest Service is prepared to keep our communities safe, Donald Trump is making cuts at the very same agency that’s supposed to be managing the risks.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250507_1_dry_season?amount=5&refcode=em20250507-1799&refcode2=1799_400544_-8v0ge&akid=1799%2E400544%2E-8v0ge)
According to a Forest Service employee who was fired in February (and then rehired after a court ruling), the cuts are damaging morale at the agency and stopping important work like brush clearing from getting finished.
Trump and his billionaire friends talk a lot about “efficiency,” but these cuts aren’t making the government more efficient.
**They’re making New Mexicans — and _everyone_ living in areas at risk of wildfire — less safe.** And in addition to the lives they’re putting at risk, this could end up costing us _more_ money when we have to clean up the mess.
Governors are the first line of defense against the new Trump administration, and New Mexicans deserve a leader who will fight to protect our lands and keep our communities safe. I’ve never backed down from a fight, and I won’t start now.
**[But I need your help to win this race. So if you can, please pitch in $5 or any amount today to help me keep growing this grassroots movement and fighting back against the Trump administration.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250507_1_dry_season?amount=5&refcode=em20250507-1799&refcode2=1799_400544_-8v0ge&akid=1799%2E400544%2E-8v0ge)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250507_1_dry_season?amount=5&refcode=em20250507-1799&refcode2=1799_400544_-8v0ge&akid=1799%2E400544%2E-8v0ge)**
Thank you for standing with me in this fight,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250507-1&t=2&refcode2=1799_400544_-8v0ge&akid=1799%2E400544%2E-8v0ge)**

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Proud to endorse Juan De Jesus Sanchez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
I’m proud to endorse my friend Juan De Jesus Sanchez to be New Mexico’s next Land Commissioner.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=f%2BEQY6umcpNRlIrRHM%2Fb0%2BLCnRlcmoOXZsHAVxhmrDySFxtqf82kM0T8p7lT4LoA3Tnt8VsxS5nHVRQO7bvQz9evkU4rx%2FXAfWYen8yeDH5Xa1F%2FyRVdX1%2BLkKvmAABj88lnkeHXAtUk1vEkir6AVj%2F0%2F50zH4AbzYJLGYVIJEXOJc5T1ThgGhHcJCgmR5HbU8k%2BE40GIYIYKJ4yHEzWofJgH%2Bg8iJ%2FNiWhIfw1M6fEHtgtqU8rgJcCGO9NVzmgwhUTR0u%2F6kl%2FwbDRrPi7%2FPlM3AeXGsyV2PjukEHTYin%2BCPNUAdU7EiO62hFF0AnyJEXSV4MCydu34n5hzN2y8AVfD6pdSSDuJUN%2BbBqqrpo%2BoUi5AbXDyZ39n2xv3bVMaGB8bUH0%2Bxzb4wekopp0qSsl6v10ByCzzHUvZWdokLWc%3D)
---
| |
---
It's Gabe Vasquez. I am deeply humbled to be able to represent New Mexico’s second district and protect our public lands. Our public lands are core to our identity, and as NM-02’s congressman, I am dedicated to protecting them and have worked tirelessly to ensure New Mexicans have access to our public lands. That’s why I’m proud to endorse my friend Juan De Jesus Sanchez to be New Mexico’s next Land Commissioner. [If you’re able, will you chip in $10 to support Juan today? Juan is a 13th-generation New Mexican, Democrat, farmer, and conservation advocate.
He’s running for New Mexico Land Commissioner because he believes in protecting public lands, strengthening rural economies, and ensuring that land and water remain in the hands of those who steward them responsibly today and will continue to do so for generations to come.
Last month, reports surfaced that House Republicans were considering proposals to sell our public lands as part of a budget reconciliation package.
Let me be absolutely clear: **Our public lands are not for sale.**
New Mexicans cherish our open spaces, our national parks, and the public lands that fuel our outdoor economy and define us as Americans.
Any attempt to sell these lands to the highest bidder is an attack on our way of life, our communities, and our future generations.
Juan and I will keep fighting to ensure our public lands stay in public hands — accessible, protected, and conserved.

# [Breaking: New Public Lands Caucus Launches in Congress today ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=163083102&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMDgzMTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY2NTAwOTAsImV4cCI6MTc0OTI0MjA5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4ODM5MzkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.J9GVQvBX2lZiMJ7my9MlSAxtcbzLEI8CpJV8t8QnkCk)
### Public Lands Belong to the People, Not Private Interests
| | [Caroline Gleich](https://substack.com/@carolinegleich)
---
| May 7
---
| [](https://substack.com/@carolinegleich)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=163083102&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMDgzMTAyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NjY1MDA5MCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ5MjQyMDkwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjg4MzkzOSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HPNJIBY85BFAlzmdnUStyf2AS-9yjsRNZe32zr1D16o&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=163083102&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMDgzMTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY2NTAwOTAsImV4cCI6MTc0OTI0MjA5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4ODM5MzkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.J9GVQvBX2lZiMJ7my9MlSAxtcbzLEI8CpJV8t8QnkCk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2883939&post_id=163083102&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYzMDgzMTAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDY2NTAwOTAsImV4cCI6MTc0OTI0MjA5MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4ODM5MzkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.J9GVQvBX2lZiMJ7my9MlSAxtcbzLEI8CpJV8t8QnkCk)
---
| | [](https://substack..NYe5sWdbI6lIk5Q_yI6U4OO3lrOj_SHpVTfaRhTCV7s?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/carolinegleich/p/breaking-new-public-lands-caucus?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

**"Public lands aren't Democrat. They're not Republican. They are for everybody to enjoy."** - Rep. Gabe Vasquez
This morning, I had the honor of speaking with Rep. Gabe Vasquez (D-NM) on a special live-streamed episode of _[The Caroline Gleich Show](https://substack.com/redirect/07fe4182-f0a5-4aa4-b868-f13c506d873e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to mark the launch of the bipartisan **Public Lands Caucus** --a bold new coalition in Congress dedicated to protecting America's public lands from privatization.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1a3dd705-d458-42f6-97a0-fe40ea82920c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo courtesy of Rep. Vasquez
As Rep. Vasquez explained:
**"We launched this caucus to protect the public lands that define our identity as Americans. These lands are not just acres on a map --they're sacred spaces that belong to all of us, not commodities to be auctioned off."**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..e1KtsdpDly05hCgSW_DApX7xu-Ats15lDuPqFMzDVgc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=163083102)
### Why Now?
Vasquez and other members of Congress created the caucus in response to renewed threats:
**"We've seen some efforts that have continued to come back from the dead in states like Utah and other places in an attempt to privatize federal lands."**
That's why he and Rep. Ryan Zinke--yes, a former Secretary of the Interior--are teaming up across party lines to introduce legislation like the **Public Lands in Public Hands Act** , which, in Vasquez's words, **"prevents the wholesale or transfer of federal lands to private entities."**
### What's at Stake?
We talked about the push to sell off public lands as a slow and sophisticated strategy:
**"By cutting the workforce, it's also a way to cut access and say the federal government is unable to adequately manage federal lands. So maybe somebody else could manage it better. And then that translates to saying, 'Well, we can sell it to a private entity.'"**
He warned:
**"If you go to a state like Texas where only 2% is public land, you see how limited access is. You have to pay for access. I think folks who want to capitalize off of that industry --hunting, fishing, skiing--they want to make you pay for it."**
### A Tool for Advocates
This new caucus gives advocates a centralized place to engage.
**"This is going to be a great tool for advocates. We have endorsements from over a dozen conservation organizations."**
Even if your member of Congress isn't on the caucus yet, they can be:
**"We'd love to have your help. Our office is the point of contact. You can send an email, make a phone call, or tag your member of Congress on Twitter encouraging them to join."**
### Bears Ears, Escalante & What You Can Do
We also spoke about the danger facing places like Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2b0dd581-1c8a-49b1-803a-213f26f086f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We also spoke about the threats facing places like Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante:
**"We saw the last administration reduce those monument boundaries. That means folks have to stand up again --get off the trail and into a legislator's office, make calls, send emails, participate in a local group."**
**"It's exhausting. And I think that's part of the plan for folks who want to privatize these places --they want to tire us out."**
But there's hope in action:
**"It just really takes everybody --business owners, tribal communities, veterans, environmental advocates, birders, hunters, anglers--to come together once again to defend these places."**
### Final Word
**"Public lands are the great equalizer. On a trail, it doesn't matter how much money you have or where you're from. Nature treats you just the same."**
I hope you'll take this as your sign to stand up.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e4dce580-afb8-43e8-914d-3cbca9378921?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Call to Action:**
📢 **[Write your lawmakers](https://substack.com/redirect/5ae9efd5-3b38-4d6c-bdd3-aa6f32efb004?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ to support the Public Lands in Public Hands Act. ](https://substack.com/redirect/5ae9efd5-3b38-4d6c-bdd3-aa6f32efb004?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
🏔️ **Outdoor brands:** Join the [Brands for Public Lands coalition](https://substack.com/redirect/3a0c0cc1-4fb2-4dcc-a836-c3239f0334a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with The Conservation Alliance.
📣 **Share this post** and the [livestream](https://substack.com/redirect/7452835b-875e-4a07-ae68-8cac87bf6f04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)/[podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/2f61daaa-ccb0-446d-b1b7-bce12027be7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to spread the word.

clean_body: Public Lands Belong to the People, Not Private Interests | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Public Lands Belong to the People, Not Private Interests | | | May 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | "Public lands aren't Democrat. They're not Republican. They are for everybody to enjoy." - Rep. Gabe Vasquez This morning, I had the honor of speaking with Rep. Gabe Vasquez (D-NM) on a special live-streamed episode of to mark the launch of the bipartisan Public Lands Caucus --a bold new coalition in Congress dedicated to protecting America's public lands from privatization. | | ---|---|--- Photo courtesy of Rep. Vasquez As Rep. Vasquez explained: "We launched this caucus to protect the public lands that define our identity as Americans. These lands are not just acres on a map --they're sacred spaces that belong to all of us, not commodities to be auctioned off." Why Now? Vasquez and other members of Congress created the caucus in response to renewed threats: "We've seen some efforts that have continued to come back from the dead in states like Utah and other places in an attempt to privatize federal lands." That's why he and Rep. Ryan Zinke--yes, a former Secretary of the Interior--are teaming up across party lines to introduce legislation like the Public Lands in Public Hands Act , which, in Vasquez's words, "prevents the wholesale or transfer of federal lands to private entities." What's at Stake? We talked about the push to sell off public lands as a slow and sophisticated strategy: "By cutting the workforce, it's also a way to cut access and say the federal government is unable to adequately manage federal lands. So maybe somebody else could manage it better. And then that translates to saying, 'Well, we can sell it to a private entity.'" He warned: "If you go to a state like Texas where only 2% is public land, you see how limited access is. You have to pay for access. I think folks who want to capitalize off of that industry --hunting, fishing, skiing--they want to make you pay for it." A Tool for Advocates This new caucus gives advocates a centralized place to engage. "This is going to be a great tool for advocates. We have endorsements from over a dozen conservation organizations." Even if your member of Congress isn't on the caucus yet, they can be: "We'd love to have your help. Our office is the point of contact. You can send an email, make a phone call, or tag your member of Congress on Twitter encouraging them to join." Bears Ears, Escalante & What You Can Do We also spoke about the danger facing places like Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante: | | ---|---|--- We also spoke about the threats facing places like Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante: "We saw the last administration reduce those monument boundaries. That means folks have to stand up again --get off the trail and into a legislator's office, make calls, send emails, participate in a local group." "It's exhausting. And I think that's part of the plan for folks who want to privatize these places --they want to tire us out." But there's hope in action: "It just really takes everybody --business owners, tribal communities, veterans, environmental advocates, birders, hunters, anglers--to come together once again to defend these places." Final Word "Public lands are the great equalizer. On a trail, it doesn't matter how much money you have or where you're from. Nature treats you just the same." I hope you'll take this as your sign to stand up. | | ---|---|--- Call to Action: 📢 🏔️ Outdoor brands: Join the with The Conservation Alliance. 📣 Share this post and the to spread the word. name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Don’t let them fool you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:

Peter — Republicans are selling out our environment to the highest bidder with the most extreme attack on public lands in American history. Yesterday, I sat through 15+ hours of a House Natural Resources committee markup, where Republicans refused to even engage with us and defend their legislation. The GOP is trying to ram through bills that sell off our lands, waters, and wildlife all to bankroll billionaire tax cuts. They also want to give legal immunity to America’s worst polluters, permitting them to dump toxic waste and destroy the resources our communities rely on. I began my career at the United Nations working to defend our climate from the polluters willing to destroy it, and was proud to help deliver the Paris Climate Agreement. **_**[And I promise, Peter, I will fight relentlessly to protect our environment. If you’re with me, can I count on your support today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107275214/544163194/1386253589?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQ1YTdhMi04MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0YdhuShzTWNkNdpfFo62-atF1AIOwg7ZOn2w0FO9-Y=)**_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107275215/544163195/1386253589?express=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQ1YTdhMi04MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0YdhuShzTWNkNdpfFo62-atF1AIOwg7ZOn2w0FO9-Y=)

Don’t let Republicans fool you, Peter. This bill wouldn’t just give handouts to the billionaire CEOs of Big Oil — _**and my Republican colleagues, some of whom sit on and lead the House Committee on Natural Resources, stand to benefit from passing this bill and selling out our environment.**_
Their motives are clear, and I won’t stay silent as they destroy the lands and waters we rely on. _**[Pitch in right now to stand with me in this fight for our environment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107275221/544163201/1386253589?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzQ1YTdhMi04MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m0YdhuShzTWNkNdpfFo62-atF1AIOwg7ZOn2w0FO9-Y=)**_

subject: FOX & Friends Reveals New Breakthrough Solar Generator – Demand Skyrockets!
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

**FOX & Friends Reveals
New Breakthrough Solar
Generator - Demand
Skyrockets!** _**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/n8Su6QvlJAdheAkudkN-Gg~~/AARclBA~/_gQEZr9MD4bw3q_zWfS9GRAIfUtbr_FdM6HXExgNYhFXc6RFWuT9h32gyF5HUJwTCQOIQtDcMa7A1wLCJSTuc1nMQ_Dws352jHXjLGOmv34bE462doWZ5oodfhlPwuVoD1MaCICNrwdFj-0bcGFneIXNiEDsei0-0xi6JAxpLJbyzpw9WbRT38VQ7u5BQ0kiEVH1lesu96psR6e7LTY_3FyloQOr5gsNCneob_GqivzJyJYKs2266bKwpOGvAmhGniIiXRBwP70j6yB1yd7YRnvMsT2vqD7KxPcpf5DFgpU~) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. body:
| Bonnie is taking action to restore accountability to immigration enforcement and fight against the Trump Administration’s lawless actions. The American people have a right to know who is acting in the name of our government, and Bonnie is ready to fight for that.

**_[Read more from Bonnie below, and click here to sign our petition in support of requiring transparency amongst ICE officers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107275968/544165570/-793284918?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250507_PT_ICE_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICEVisibility2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmMzNTQxZS04NTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CfcolvYQ68PDeJw21dNt6X-NFwcttCusX85AsG8PtM=&emci=58fda913-842b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5bc3541e-852b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=30096098)_** | | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107275970/544165572/-793284918?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250507_PT_ICE_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICEVisibility2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmMzNTQxZS04NTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CfcolvYQ68PDeJw21dNt6X-NFwcttCusX85AsG8PtM=&emci=58fda913-842b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5bc3541e-852b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=30096098)
---
* * *
**_Begin forwarded message:_**

In the last few months, we’ve witnessed a disturbing escalation of unconstitutional tactics: Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents operating in plain clothes, abducting people off the street, and instilling fear in our communities. These kinds of actions — supported and encouraged by our administration — undermine critical foundations of our democracy: due process, transparency, and the rule of law.

That’s why I just introduced the ICE Visibility Act of 2025: a bill that would require all ICE agents and officers to wear clearly marked uniforms during enforcement actions. **No more hiding behind anonymity. No more fear in our communities.

_[If you agree with Bonnie, click here to sign our petition supporting the return of due process and transparency in our institutions. We need 500 signatures by the end of the week to make a change.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107275972/544165575/-793284918?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250507_PT_ICE_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICEVisibility2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmMzNTQxZS04NTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CfcolvYQ68PDeJw21dNt6X-NFwcttCusX85AsG8PtM=&emci=58fda913-842b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5bc3541e-852b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=30096098)_**_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107275976/544165577/-793284918?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250507_PT_ICE_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICEVisibility2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmMzNTQxZS04NTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CfcolvYQ68PDeJw21dNt6X-NFwcttCusX85AsG8PtM=&emci=58fda913-842b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5bc3541e-852b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=30096098)_
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107275978/544165581/-793284918?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250507_PT_ICE_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICEVisibility2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmMzNTQxZS04NTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CfcolvYQ68PDeJw21dNt6X-NFwcttCusX85AsG8PtM=&emci=58fda913-842b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5bc3541e-852b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=30096098)
---
When the Trump Administration defies court orders and uses federal agents to bypass constitutional protections, it isn’t just attacking immigrants — it’s attacking democracy itself.

ICE officers deliberately concealing their identities creates a dangerous confusion and opens the door for impersonators to intimidate individuals simply going about their day. The current administration is using ICE as a weapon of fear, creating hostile situations not only for the community but the agents as well.

The bill I have introduced is a direct response to that lawlessness. We must restore checks and balances, protect civil liberties, and make sure our communities are safe from this intimidation.

**_[Stand with us today and sign the petition to keep our community safe.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107275981/544165583/-793284918?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250507_PT_ICE_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_ICEVisibility2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmMzNTQxZS04NTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_CfcolvYQ68PDeJw21dNt6X-NFwcttCusX85AsG8PtM=&emci=58fda913-842b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5bc3541e-852b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=30096098)_**

Thank you,

Bonnie
* * *

name: NDRC HQ
subject: Why don’t Republicans want to host town halls?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We need your support to build a fairer, more representative democracy
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107276662/544168021/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3YTZmNjNhLTg2MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1WG6Cyb63x-btNLVuEGDQ5k9M7T4zuUb4K4GkPasBmQ=&emci=2cf9c24f-652b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=77a6f63a-862b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, One of the central premises of our government is that every lawmaker should be able to answer to their constituents. Lately, we've seen Americans showing up at town halls angry and demanding answers from their Republican representatives. We’re sure you've seen the clips of a Kansas senator abruptly leaving his town hall early and Georgia Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene calling her constituents “brainwashed.” It has gotten to a point where, to avoid the uproar from constituents and the embarrassing footage making the rounds online, a top Republican told his congressional colleagues to stop holding in-person town halls. **Just hide from your constituents.** It's an absurd and fundamentally undemocratic strategy. And one of the main reasons they think they can get away with it? **Gerrymandering.** The extreme wing of the Republican Party has grown dependent on drawing maps designed to lock themselves in non-competitive districts, where they know they’ll win as long as they have an “R” next to their name. It allows them to feel free to disregard their constituents’ opinions. At the end of the day, these lawmakers aren’t accountable to anyone but their party leaders. **And when elected officials can pick their voters instead of voters picking their officials, the system is broken.** So here’s what the NDRC is doing about this: With a razor-thin margin in the House, we’re preparing to stop further Republican attempts to steal seats in Congress during the midterms. We’re working to elect Democracy Defenders in critical state-level elections — leaders who will have a direct role in determining how fair and representative our electoral maps will be. And we’re working right now to make sure everyone knows about Trump’s ham-handed attempts to tamper with the 2030 census. [**While the Republicans hide from their constituents, let’s build a fairer, more representative democracy that refuses to allow that failure of leadership. Can you make a donation today to help power this work?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107276663/544168022/469381256?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_RepTownHallsAppeal_email_20250507-NDRC-Tier1-RepTownHallsAppeal_var1&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250507-NDRC-Tier1-RepTownHallsAppeal_var1&utm_campaign=RepTownHallsAppeal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3YTZmNjNhLTg2MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1WG6Cyb63x-btNLVuEGDQ5k9M7T4zuUb4K4GkPasBmQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We need your support to build a fairer, more representative democracy | Peter, One of the central premises of our government is that every lawmaker should be able to answer to their constituents. Lately, we've seen Americans showing up at town halls angry and demanding answers from their Republican representatives. We’re sure you've seen the clips of a Kansas senator abruptly leaving his town hall early and Georgia Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene calling her constituents “brainwashed.” It has gotten to a point where, to avoid the uproar from constituents and the embarrassing footage making the rounds online, a top Republican told his congressional colleagues to stop holding in-person town halls. Just hide from your constituents. It's an absurd and fundamentally undemocratic strategy. And one of the main reasons they think they can get away with it? Gerrymandering. The extreme wing of the Republican Party has grown dependent on drawing maps designed to lock themselves in non-competitive districts, where they know they’ll win as long as they have an “R” next to their name. It allows them to feel free to disregard their constituents’ opinions. At the end of the day, these lawmakers aren’t accountable to anyone but their party leaders. And when elected officials can pick their voters instead of voters picking their officials, the system is broken. So here’s what the NDRC is doing about this: With a razor-thin margin in the House, we’re preparing to stop further Republican attempts to steal seats in Congress during the midterms. We’re working to elect Democracy Defenders in critical state-level elections — leaders who will have a direct role in determining how fair and representative our electoral maps will be. name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Can you give the POWER Act some power, Peter?
body:
The POWER Act (HB 3546), one of our Energy Affordability & Utility Accountability priority bills, needs your help to move forward in the legislature!| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277489/544170567/-742598373?contactdata=Uc3atoDibPKxDDsDwcbUVW4Bq9Vjz9Pdlzie4/EEru1J+ByyofVbrD0L9k0Yf4XcrvoaWtU4K/KShSyyHa5Qa8ZDZbD9f8voViHaIlTFrKMa9HQ13H2jC5RuNkll0biY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMzM3YTdhLTg4MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ng6OxgyJzJtcH5x_ypxu4Un4Lzz5pOB6RyWFp54MZVc=&emci=35c7d26c-002b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1d337a7a-882b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)
---
Dear Peter, Today, I was in the state Capitol, speaking to lawmakers and advocating for our priority Energy Affordability & Utility Accountability bills. One of these bills that needs your support is the POWER Act **(**[**HB 3546 A**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277493/544170572/-445438303?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMzM3YTdhLTg4MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ng6OxgyJzJtcH5x_ypxu4Un4Lzz5pOB6RyWFp54MZVc=&emci=35c7d26c-002b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1d337a7a-882b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)**)**. We’re coming up on another set of important deadlines in this legislative session, and right now the POWER Act needs your support to progress. [**Will you send your senator a message today to give the POWER Act some power to pass this important deadline?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277495/544170576/-742598373?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMzM3YTdhLTg4MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ng6OxgyJzJtcH5x_ypxu4Un4Lzz5pOB6RyWFp54MZVc=&emci=35c7d26c-002b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1d337a7a-882b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)
---
[ **Send your message here** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277497/544170581/-742598373?contactdata=Uc3atoDibPKxDDsDwcbUVW4Bq9Vjz9Pdlzie4/EEru1J+ByyofVbrD0L9k0Yf4XcrvoaWtU4K/KShSyyHa5Qa8ZDZbD9f8voViHaIlTFrKMa9HQ13H2jC5RuNkll0biY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMzM3YTdhLTg4MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ng6OxgyJzJtcH5x_ypxu4Un4Lzz5pOB6RyWFp54MZVc=&emci=35c7d26c-002b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1d337a7a-882b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)
---
I’m sure you’ve noticed your energy bills increasing in recent years. Did you know that one of the reasons for this increase is the energy demand that large energy users like data centers are putting on the system? Yes, large energy users are adding to _your_ energy costs! Even though large energy users are using more energy, they are paying less for their energy than Oregon households and businesses. The POWER Act, championed by Representative Marsh, is here to tackle the growing demand and rising cost for energy across the state. The POWER Act will hold large energy users accountable for the energy they use by instating policies that create a different category of customer for data centers, cryptocurrency, and other big tech, to ensure that they are paying their fair share without burdening other average users, like households and small businesses. The POWER Act is here to protect Oregonians from rising utility costs. But it may not get the chance to do so if it is not scheduled for a work session before the upcoming deadline on Friday, May 9th. That’s why your senator needs to hear from you on why this bill is so important to you. [**Give some power to the POWER Act now!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277499/544170583/-742598373?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMzM3YTdhLTg4MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ng6OxgyJzJtcH5x_ypxu4Un4Lzz5pOB6RyWFp54MZVc=&emci=35c7d26c-002b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1d337a7a-882b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)
---
[ **Send your message here** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277501/544170585/-742598373?contactdata=Uc3atoDibPKxDDsDwcbUVW4Bq9Vjz9Pdlzie4/EEru1J+ByyofVbrD0L9k0Yf4XcrvoaWtU4K/KShSyyHa5Qa8ZDZbD9f8voViHaIlTFrKMa9HQ13H2jC5RuNkll0biY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkMzM3YTdhLTg4MmItZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ng6OxgyJzJtcH5x_ypxu4Un4Lzz5pOB6RyWFp54MZVc=&emci=35c7d26c-002b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=1d337a7a-882b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=2107230)
---
Sincerely,
---

Britney VanCitters _(she/her)_
OLCV Political & Organizing Director

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: Trump called me a “lowlife” and “very low-IQ person”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |

name: Care in Action
subject: ACT NOW: Protect our voting rights
body:
Sign our petition to stop ACTIVE voter suppression by Congress.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277595/544170913/664783965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlY2MxZi04OTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-m04oksaO7PkHEextgRYGFTzp-f2BcU4z6kxkHMKgk=&emci=187f33d4-fd29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=871ecc1f-892b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)
Peter, **our voting rights are under attack.**
The SAVE Act is a bill under review in the Senate that could disenfranchise millions of American voters, especially people who changed their last name upon marriage. It would require all voters to provide **in-person proof of U.S. citizenship,** like a passport or birth certificate, when registering to vote or updating their voter registration.
**This is voter disenfranchisement and an attempt to silence our voices, plain and simple. **
We need to pressure the Senate to stop this cruel voter suppression bill. **[**_Please sign this petition with our partners at Coalition on Human Needs to demand the Senate vote NO:_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277596/544170914/253260523?source=group-care-in-action-2025&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlY2MxZi04OTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-m04oksaO7PkHEextgRYGFTzp-f2BcU4z6kxkHMKgk=&emci=187f33d4-fd29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=871ecc1f-892b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)**
**_**********__[Sign our petition](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277597/544170915/253260523?source=group-care-in-action-2025&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlY2MxZi04OTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-m04oksaO7PkHEextgRYGFTzp-f2BcU4z6kxkHMKgk=&emci=187f33d4-fd29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=871ecc1f-892b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)__**********_**
Over 140 million Americans who are eligible to vote don’t have easy access to the documents this law would require for voter registration, making it even more difficult for people to vote.
The SAVE Act would effectively block access to the ballot for so many care workers and caregivers in our community — who work long, irregular hours and often need to register to vote online or by mail. The requirement to show proof of citizenship in-person would _effectively end online and mail voter registration nationwide — which was crucial in expanding access to the ballot box for eligible voters._
It would also purge voters from voting rolls without notice, and cause long lines and voting delays at voter registration offices.
As our endorsed Care Champion Rep. Jennifer McClellan (VA-04) put it, “It is a slap in the face for all of the women generally and Black women specifically who gave blood, sweat and tears for the right to vote.”
The Senate needs to stand up for voting rights. ****_**[**_Can you sign this petition with our partners at Coalition on Human Needs to tell the Senate to reject the SAVE Act?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277598/544170916/253260523?source=group-care-in-action-2025&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlY2MxZi04OTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-m04oksaO7PkHEextgRYGFTzp-f2BcU4z6kxkHMKgk=&emci=187f33d4-fd29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=871ecc1f-892b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)**_****
**_**********__[Sign our petition](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107277599/544170917/253260523?source=group-care-in-action-2025&referrer=group-care-in-action-2025&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.careinaction.us%2Fa%2Fcare-in-action-membership-2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzFlY2MxZi04OTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7-m04oksaO7PkHEextgRYGFTzp-f2BcU4z6kxkHMKgk=&emci=187f33d4-fd29-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=871ecc1f-892b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=864787)__**********_**
Thank you for taking action to protect our voting rights.
Care in Action

FBI Director Kash Patel tore Democrat Rep. Madeleine Dean apart after she chose to pick a fight and accuse him of perjury in front of congress.
**[This was personal...](https://substack.com/redirect/a945e197-40be-4207-a8db-a8be469532af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a945e197-40be-4207-a8db-a8be469532af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a945e197-40be-4207-a8db-a8be469532af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You've shown yourself unfit to lead this important agency!" Dean told Patel, before actually having the audacity to accuse him of politically weaponizing the FBI against Democrats. "I was an impeachment manager for President Trump's 2nd impeachment. It was a sad, solemn duty,... when can I, a former impeachment manager, expect the FBI at my door?"
**["You know who was targeted by a weaponized FBI, me!"](https://substack.com/redirect/a945e197-40be-4207-a8db-a8be469532af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Patel said, before clarifying that he does not have a political enemies list, nor does his book mention one. "You should read the book!"
Dean scolded Patel for defending January 6 political prisoners before accusing him of committing perjury during his senate confirmation hearing.
"You repeatedly denied having any involvement in the firing of FBI officials who engaged in the prosecution against Jan 6 insurrectionists,... whom you referred to as 'political prisoners.'" Dean said mockingly. "Since then, multiple whistleblowers have come forward and we know that you likely committed perjury!"
Dean elaborated, "At the same hearing, you claimed you were not familiar with Stew Peters, and anti-semitic Holocaust-denier, despite the fact that you appeared on Mr. Peters' podcast 8 separate times,... My second question is, should we worry more about your memory or your veracity?!"
**["We should worry more about your lack of candor!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/a945e197-40be-4207-a8db-a8be469532af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Patel fired back at the Democrat, daring her to produce proof that he lied about anything. "You're accusing me of committing perjury?! Tell the American people how I broke the law and committed a felony! Have the audacity to actually put the facts forward instead of lying for political banter so you can have a 20 second donation hit!!"
Watch Patel refuse to back down to the Democrat congresswoman's bold accusation:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a945e197-40be-4207-a8db-a8be469532af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **All HELL breaks loose on CNN when anti-woke journalist YELLS at Democrats for defending illegal gangbangers**
Newsweek editor Batya Ungar-Sargon **[exploded at CNN Democrats during a loud debate](https://substack.com/redirect/36fa5fb2-f21f-4446-aadd-9fb601b3e669?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for caring more about illegal gangbangers and criminals than American citizens.
"The energy in defense of these gangbangers, the way that that looks to average Americans is insane!!" Ungar-Sargon said, having to scream over several interruptions from other panelists.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/36fa5fb2-f21f-4446-aadd-9fb601b3e669?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/36fa5fb2-f21f-4446-aadd-9fb601b3e669?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Do you know why that triggers me?!" podcast host Van Lathan interjected. "That triggers me because I come from a place where a whole bunch of people, they're American citizens but they're thrown away, because they might have committed crimes, because they got in trouble when they were young!"
**["You should be angriest!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/36fa5fb2-f21f-4446-aadd-9fb601b3e669?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ungar-Sargon fired back. "That they care about the gangbangers and not those people!"
Lathan responded, "No, what I care about is that there is a system of laws that is supposed to protect the due process of those people, and that has to matter!"
"I am angry about that!" Ungar-Sargon shouted. "I am angry that there are black people in prison that didn't get due process! I don't know why the Democrats are not angry about that."
Another pundit chimed in, asking "so why is it okay for anybody else to not get due process?"
"Because they are not citizens!! We do not owe them the same thing!" she exclaimed. **["It has to mean something to be an American!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/36fa5fb2-f21f-4446-aadd-9fb601b3e669?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/36fa5fb2-f21f-4446-aadd-9fb601b3e669?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Stefanie, Off the Sidelines
subject: Your 60-second update:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
It’s Stefanie. I’m the Executive Director here at Off the Sidelines PAC. 👋

We’re focused on empowering activists to speak out against the Trump administration’s constant barrage of attacks on our rights — and ultimately, elect a strong and inclusive Democratic majority in the midterms that will fight — and I mean _really_ fight — for vulnerable communities.

Right now, there are a lot of folks feeling hopeless and asking me: _“What can I do?”_

**I know the news cycle can feel overwhelming, so I want to give you a 60-second update on what you need to know this week and how you can take action:**

🔵 The House GOP is attempting to push their harmful tax bill through to a vote this month, which aims to make the **largest cut to Medicaid in history.** That’s essential health care that 72 million Americans rely on — especially seniors, children, working families and folks with disabilities.

🔵 Trump signed an executive order to **defund NPR and PBS** — public broadcasting stations that are critical to our communities and provide free, trustworthy and educational programming to kids, seniors and everyone in between.

🔵 As Trump **recklessly introduces tariffs and causes the stock market to crash,** working class Americans are struggling to make ends meet — and matters could get worse if the GOP’s cuts to Medicaid, Social Security, SNAP and other vital programs pass.

To get back to the earlier question — “What can I do?” — the answer is simple:

**Take a minute to call your representatives and Senators. The GOP only has a three-seat majority in the House and a narrow majority in the Senate — so that means a handful of votes could be the difference between passing or rejecting their dangerous agenda.[**_Click here to find your representatives’ information._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107277693/544171301/305343292?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.05.07_OTS-60-Second_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjg5ZTFjNS04OTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IOfnlqxMJiu8lIt_2ctWI2WSS6KgssJ2ZwX-ALO3igc=&emci=a3ab6bf8-7a2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=e689e1c5-892b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7659029)**

We owe it to each other and our communities to raise our voices.

Together,

Stefanie

name: Indiana Dems
subject: Trump's dangerous budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, Late last week, Donald Trump and Elon Musk unveiled their proposed budget for the next fiscal year. The bottom line: it’s just more handouts for the wealthy on the backs of working Hoosier families. The impacts of this budget will be felt by families across the country. To pay for his $1.1 trillion in tax cuts to the wealthiest 1% of Americans, Trump is cutting over $800 million from Medicaid and over $200 million from SNAP. In addition, it ends the Low Income Home Energy Assistance program that over 108,000 Hoosier households use to stay out of the cold each winter. Veterans, too, are seeing massive cuts to the substance abuse programs at the VA that thousands rely on. **[We know the best way to create change is by electing new representatives at our Statehouse and in Washington D.C. Would you lend whatever financial support you can to help us keep having town halls in red districts, and gear up to prepare candidates for the 2026 elections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107277698/544171335/1764064610?refcode=250507budget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjNhM2UxYy04YTJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3zZ8sOM_uzQ0IpgPb7nfqdpL7OpehzqB-ban1Ks7PSU=)** Trump’s agenda is nothing but tax breaks for the wealthiest while cutting programs that disabled Hoosiers and low income families use to get by. It’s a backward agenda that hurts the most vulnerable among us. **[The first step to changing these priorities is by electing new leadership for Indiana and America. name: GOTV PAC
subject: Urgent: Help us support this critical race in San Antonio!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Last Saturday, San Antonio held its first open mayoral election in 16 years with 27 candidates on the ballot.
The clear frontrunner? Gina Ortiz Jones. A veteran, a former Air Force intelligence officer, and the second-highest-ranking civilian in the U.S. Air Force under President Biden.
Gina led the field, but since no one crossed the 50% threshold, she now advances to a runoff on June 7 against Rolando Pablos, a Republican operative with deep ties to Governor Greg Abbott, who appointed him Secretary of State.
Peter, this race may be local, but the consequences aren’t.
San Antonio is the 7th most populous city in the country, with a population greater than that of 11 states. With the city council likely to become more conservative, this election is critical for Democrats to win.
With barely 10% of the electorate voting on Saturday, voter turnout becomes crucial. That is where Get Out the Vote PAC comes in. Gina’s race is ideal for GOTV’s voter turnout program, which we plan to launch later this week. Early voting starts on May 27 and is key to Gina’s victory.
Peter, can you contribute $25 or more to support GOTV’s independent voter turnout efforts in this little-publicized yet critical race? The size of GOTV’s program depends entirely on how much we can raise between now and June 7. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email05072025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.

name: Katie Porter
subject: millions more uninsured
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39706%2E3422442%2Ev22Exj)
Dear Derek,
The non-partisan Congressional Budget Office just released a new analysis of Republicans’ proposed health care cuts, and it’s some bad news.
**[Read on for my full health care update as of today, May 7, but first, will you chip in $5 to support my campaign for governor, so I can keep fighting to protect our health care?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250507_1_ak?refcode=em20250507-39706&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39706_3422442_v22Exj&akid=39706%2E3422442%2Ev22Exj)**
Let’s start with a review. Congressional Republicans passed a budget earlier this year that called for hundreds of billions in cuts to key government programs. A report at the time found that it is literally impossible to meet their goals without cutting Medicare and Medicaid.
Now, today’s new analysis shows us exactly what this is going to mean for families. **Enacting Republicans' top health care proposals will result in millions of Americans losing their insurance.**
The stakes are clear. Americans are going to die because they don’t get the lifesaving care they need. Others will face financial ruin because they just happened to get sick.
Here’s a bit of good news: Congress is still negotiating how to turn the budget into actual policy. That means there’s still time to stop these harmful cuts.
Public pressure works. We need to get loud and stay loud. Hands off our health care!
Since launching my campaign, I’ve consistently said that our next governor has to be a health care governor. **[Can you chip in $5 today to send a clear message that the people want leaders who strengthen our health care, not slash it?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250507_1_ak?refcode=em20250507-39706&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39706_3422442_v22Exj&akid=39706%2E3422442%2Ev22Exj)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250507_1_ak?refcode=em20250507-39706&refcode2=39706_3422442_v22Exj&akid=39706%2E3422442%2Ev22Exj)
Thanks for reading,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250507-39706&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39706_3422442_v22Exj&akid=39706%2E3422442%2Ev22Exj)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39706&t=4&akid=39706%2E3422442%2Ev22Exj)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39706)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39706&t=5&akid=39706%2E3422442%2Ev22Exj)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
