name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Benefactor Card
body:
I’d like to send you your new 2025 Hillsdale College Benefactor Card.

|
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/PCaN4YJR4sRCcIDOg5E2ILm16680YDRLp8ROL7fiRCUuWtiNElIs1pmfxPd3-jA1B39caaPS1R39vCPUMKKahT4ZvEPlDoKpKk2RP6pxa7OaOtwn6NZC4CVNBC-OTNQZXYpxCrcsYjm5G4BK0uygfeBlMSWOBintcwDTYLE9UvWLV062gADx2dL-/X_YSnbCpV-QppilN_GR3T0e1t-julCbp/8)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/NbRVEkw7vLhaPy2Ak0LyHIo9NYYLKfkYhM84FZ5-uxnXex-rDlckkWopflpi2jZIbFdSrGQWDWNBHw5BF9vZb_zKj89BNlHzQu3juaNs_fPS9hLQg0fohloRroNmaLPLGovk8koI0n4HnDcgAyqnt1HQSXSjOk_BR6XaxJi8SIqxhPRnlr3KJ6LWmYVu_GkM_SbgHXjNulBER0jA-q6vCUr9CTwgjLBH6lFOhEK_GJcl2CIIvoGDL960FSl6xaigGbeQa9psIb63YdJL_QVHH0nfNjJaKcMSo38H1n2T7LVTW5HYunwENVuB95DjJ00RWjp8kd-5bWottw0HVsMF0hnCKI-I6dUrWQsA5ZNoWX-saUsJnN2Bn7d08uSYjz91Cn-3qoLyCCudLbO5jl4vp3GJnfjFWvxM8opNvM3kVDsqr6qC7Qec1yG7x6IBxFNciUNTssea0EE/W9PmebzZ9dM_fiUcqkSD4eszC4gmj4Yb/8)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

I'd like to send you your new **2025 Hillsdale College Benefactor Card**.

This is our way of saying "thank you" for all you do to help us defend "We the People" against out-of-touch bureaucratic despots who reject the principles of the American Founding.
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/PYM6zOyGgt-jSbV3VErn5C8aqtiAqaSn3z4JCslscU4-3EyAw9asbC0CEC2EKd3SfLDfN95wcDNtoUKg8b82UM-8YN55eRctP-O4aYLrbuocjSizXqZPnbu6s8dzHUQAwcBtPd6OZ4Zs955GlkOsknGMbcdSITB2l3JKjrBvL1ugTC87PxZFDKNo1SH_WuUsdhBEIO47FMGL2SDwgA6ASd81RyGiZX-qZ6i5fH8hg7U8KKPplMlXJPZHCMmxmWS77lf9kDmPYNggUV3_Ys5IMC4chPPo4xoDrwk_TYHnXI_odN2IodNtYki_VZihjoHPpwpe6b6c7NKSDoi-8oEg-T5IcYxFJwun0mO629XgayAsACryqmEBBm5iPx-aF5Xtkwjk7iUrBHI53RSxFcCVnfw-yhnDe9w7DMrrf7qnccy7XDbvuir6UQiHIed8NXJLlCSTx36AT0Y/Uok0bZMliqHEXZnLAPcOZKpfCMMFQzc-/8)
**Your generosity helps us to counter a radical agenda in the universities** where bureaucrats are taught, the colleges where activists are trained, and the K-12 schools where children learn that boys can become girls and girls can become boys.

The far-Left wouldn't spend so much time accusing Hillsdale College of being a "danger" to education if our efforts hadn't struck a nerve.

These activists--along with their bureaucrat and legacy media allies--understand that we pose a threat to their anti-American indoctrination plan. One of the ways we are fighting back on the battlefield of education is through our **Project to Revive and Restore Liberty Through Education**.

You're an important part of our efforts, so for a gift of $25 or more, I'd like to send you your** 2025 Benefactor Card**.

**Please tell me where you 'd like your new card mailed by clicking on this secure link by May 31:**
**
[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025-benefactor-card](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/gfwNOY0JSopYK3NUifPYN-WYAq5QfnIpXRqMvTrp11ihSX9VE18Upm9RzitKFBaLlYyJSkuX-f7CIXQwiMS4NBRl3jPN30V5OdjGPAaCSyMfyTfpPUE2XL_v0lwSgtjW1BhinK5ffQ2TY0_78R5eJjhdv8gsA05qsW4_9WSN4lUBbIKP6Fp4GSvBZ560pgc2eNo8qfYYgykGhbppolXsUjK_HfM_nh9tuyJkUk4nEN0tx5a4zAAOdNo0a_c7GgFpKqroAI6QBAmhhuLRuhTw88IfO_7NX1RghFuhmGbiFTkWECPJumxVoN-r5mRAZ3lPG2PCuxKQPO0N98Au6zzi9Z2gmYu9_New9tf6NXSXoYk1E86QahU8zTaMRNaP0MDHPc4zu8De_n-_s2uM4nB6vZmz2W-Er4WT2QIKsTpoRCJkaBf3mAJXJFS9e7A056oHRKda3921hK4/4Gjin_YJrkcC-SQ24TiCkY7hkQIAF3QB/8)**

I'll be blunt: We need your continued support because **we 're fighting against a Goliath**.

Not only are these anti-American activists doing everything they can to tear down Western Civilization...

But they are extremely well-funded. They have Hollywood, Big Tech, mega-corporations, and liberal billionaires on their side.

Hillsdale College relies on the support of citizens like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty and want their children and grandchildren to live in freedom and be proud of America's great heritage of liberty.

**We could not accomplish our work without your help.**

Our constitutional system is hanging by a thread...but there are reasons for hope. One of those reasons is you and our work together is more important than ever.

We must never forget that the elite, out-of-touch bureaucrats who enforce the latest Leftist orthodoxy were indoctrinated by anti-American propaganda in our schools and universities. _And we cannot vote them out of office._

**This is why we plan to redouble our efforts in 2025 to engage the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education --to save our country from the radical ideas that threaten our liberty.**

Our educational outreach goals for 2025 include the following:
* **Reaching an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty**. The most widely circulated publication of its kind, Imprimis promotes individual liberty, limited government, free market economics, personal responsibility, and a strong national defense from a constitutional perspective.
* **Teaching citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** We must teach young people about our nation's history and its great heritage of liberty--otherwise, we will not preserve our country! Our free online courses (which you help make possible) have proven to be one of the most effective ways of countering false narratives about America.
* **Leading a movement to restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Far too many children in K-12 classrooms across the country are subjected to critical race theory, transgenderism, and other ideologies destructive of freedom. With your faithful support, we are returning excellence to K-12 education by launching and guiding classical charter and private schools nationwide.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale Benefactor Card** because you understand that we can't just talk about our country's problems--we have to take action. We have to do something while there's still time.

**Hillsdale has been devoted to the defense of liberty since the College 's founding in 1844. And we need your help as we prepare to redouble our educational efforts in 2025 to preserve freedom for future generations.**

As you may know, we accomplish all of our work without ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

This independence means that our ability to reach and teach additional millions in this critical year depends entirely on the help of trusted friends like you who understand the importance of education to liberty.

**Please show your continued support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or $75 --or more--by clicking the secure link below:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025-benefactor-card**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/15VDeLXkZErqAAlIYN-Xuxd_nVgKXp1pn4O2Ok-EZBgcPo3e2sfDRwtRqpgRW5lkFxdcrlPuIGPD6bBVhb6EHmFaGAmTX-ugbvCGeRQ_GInAiSGkRirjJZ8U1ejn0w43PbToT9bRZtgbi8d_QyNHxKz_ShURp2aUc77_8X-RSLUMcMUCx52mkCWx8tAmN9Ucu5kV9L7KDybVSqVtVcIhKeDGKtd2jJpj3IFE3fGeiYeWM5XhPqzlLSH_XhzzrHRKLA0XdSLkDs97R4IRYIuBMNPJN0k9Jsc8wSCNG8uDs_0GwXVm8F_vxhPHCLHdNBCW0pz4CSQC9VypAXW2DwGAjbLbmmrCG0hIgYjeUYEniLWkBDmVodEvK4C81BFCm9uR4PIsytn74J58nN8k-S_jQ3rJqxzL1AIClgVid4vLnVanu1iaQJ13uazS4LkuALYfEbM9VBxaAEE/W0-313w_HDxcBTcBa4hjvBnqv5NfxSq4/8)

Make sure you claim your **2025 Hillsdale College Benefactor Card** _before_ May 31. Thank you again for your partnership.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/HNo1V-kUftXyavtWTWt_7ONeZn2cnGagCj0A1Xlq6QlK5bcr8N0QLld65ay_OdTa9n7iEUbWevH3jOcsd6sEbVoLyqNaUCg9N_YhAM760pFxc_7CcF5yGGyTpHQfg-xKlgekmCMdRw0gNvPjEtD6JbdHu-FJvR44UNRbj9iKoNbscEXGUFMqQ6Q0tJDtxAEZBhVy2hpS7MUrJWJLk9lIvCVFYM1OxEmTbA/H9RmByyC3ToIKXKYf-4c7yj6hWgY9X3l/8) [Unsubscribe from all communications.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/PCaN4YJR4sRCcIDOg5E2ILm16680YDRLp8ROL7fiRCUuWtiNElIs1pmfxPd3-jA1B39caaPS1R39vCPUMKKahT4ZvEPlDoKpKk2RP6pxa7OaOtwn6NZC4CVNBC-OTNQZXYpxCrcsYjm5G4BK0uygfeBlMSWOBintcwDTYLE9UvWLV062gADx2dL-/X_YSnbCpV-QppilN_GR3T0e1t-julCbp/8)
| |

| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/W9UNPZuSMmjCOYoF2YzGgDg7-iJWmm-yQHgCik-wrs4kT9RafmYQg3oszkV9-NCUW2KD44OD-xiL-JX-fnLf5_4tq9U4T1QPUIOl-Tbl1Nta_W0ntz8_MckKewIQRTeSFeaqzvwur49fJpJRzsama_HtXAKo5CmmUMmkoeWVvnuuU3YX6ViXLTAOhjdDaJsLtlaD_sgFJQr8FDAql_WB2db0U_AiUi2ykDEioyTKeV1PNpFh4HmqSjfZBqpXW14IrAHAr8mz1zmdNEbo8W8KbrQVOpW66eA_oqJvcgl8md_nxmG_9Zgl05qzifQ4s-VGj245PxwD7NaQ-CHpJPA6Kt39x1uztdOzZQripK_F7xUMCGFla53ZXOvNt4_QCpZFL3P3GDCC80S3DwvfJmeL98YWMhaHQj1hzpbnV-FlQ2XUF41jEfdEYkdiIYFBi9bImCQb8r-1gWUHzZATF48Pj52fCRgDglbli_MXT6PAuYSua_an-w/tGcfjvIV7ML2ggB8m6CLcc-qT2MErplw/8)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: The South’s true legacy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
This region is a critical battleground for the freedom to vote. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107278301/544173575/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250507_f_WorkAcrosstheSouth_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2UyNDY5YS04YzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ONCqST0hB3qtVVZMotqCSPu3tj7ri_kHqx6rvWIB0s=&emci=59b37230-832b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=73e2469a-8c2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=1037277)

| | **At Fair Fight Action, while we’re rooted in Georgia, we’ve got reach across the South** through our coalition work — and this region is a critical battleground for the freedom to vote. We don’t need to open a textbook to remember how Jim Crow laws disenfranchised generations of Black voters in the South. We don’t need to open a newspaper to know that anti-voter extremists are still trying to keep the spirit of Jim Crow alive — by suppressing votes in communities of color in the South and around the country. But everyone should also understand that **the South’s true legacy isn’t about living under repression — it’s about fighting for freedom.** It’s about the decades of tireless activism and unyielding bravery by Civil Rights Movement leaders and foot soldiers alike. It’s about the tenacity and determination that led to accomplishments like the Voting Rights Act of 1965. And it’s about the perseverance of everyone who’s still fighting for free and fair elections. The South shows how far some people are willing to go to silence the voices of those they deem undesirable. But it also shows how hard we can fight back to make real the promises of democracy. That’s a lesson we all need to hold in our hearts for the fights ahead. **Throughout the South, we’re proud to work alongside partner organizations to secure voting rights and equal access to the ballot box.** With advocacy and education, with coalition-building and outreach, we fight in solidarity _against_ anti-voter legislation. We fight _for_ policies that make it easier for voters to make their voices heard. And we track, expose, and work to prevent the modern voter suppression tactics whose goals are all-too-reminiscent of Jim Crow. Look: no one should write off what we can accomplish in the South. Just recently, with Black voters leading the way and one of our partners fighting hard on the ground, Louisianans turned out in higher-than-expected numbers to stop an attempted power grab by state politicians who thought they could pass four constitutional amendments in a sleepy election. Not so fast. Those leaders got a fresh reminder of where true power lies in a democracy. And we’re working as part of a broad coalition in the South to make sure voters can exercise that power — while bringing a Southern lens to national conversations about how we defend democracy. **Southerners have been — and will stay — front and center in the fight for freedom.** And thank you for everything you do to help make this fight possible. The Fair Fight Action Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107278304/544173580/-814816234?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250507_f_WorkAcrosstheSouth_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2UyNDY5YS04YzJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ONCqST0hB3qtVVZMotqCSPu3tj7ri_kHqx6rvWIB0s=)

name: Team FLHP
subject: $5 can make a huge difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team, Today, **[we want to give you 5 reasons to give $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107278335/544173735/-1809995021?amount=5&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTVjZGQ1Y2QtOGMyYi1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yjTjsaP5HCeF1qYYgNbjxWAdyu78iIdluO2eWUdTZn8=) **to support all the work Gretchen is doing to make real progress for Michigan and elect candidates nationwide who will fight like hell for working families.
1. **Gretchen is delivering results.** Since becoming Governor of Michigan, she’s been laser-focused on making this state the best place to live, work, and raise a family. That’s why she’s worked hard to put more money back in the pockets of Michiganders, protect our fundamental freedoms, fix the damn roads, make our communities safer, and so much more.

2. **But people across the country are struggling.** Costs are still too high. Families are struggling to make ends meet. And too many Republicans across the country aren’t lifting a finger to make your life better.

3. **That’s why we need leaders who will fight like hell in Michigan and beyond.** Gretchen is determined to take her movement nationwide and elect candidates in all 50 states who will put politics aside and fight for our families, our workers, and our children.

4. **We have our work cut out for us**. Recent elections in Wisconsin and Florida proved that Democrats are fired up to elect leaders who will fight for us, but Republicans are gearing up to fight back. That’s why we must match their energy and prove to them that this grassroots team has what it takes to get the job done.

5. **$5 goes a long way.** While many people think that $5 won’t make much of a difference when millions are being spent on elections, here’s the truth: $5 donations from folks like you help us spread Gretchen’s message in Michigan and across the country, reach voters on the ground, and fuel our fight to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Every single dollar donated goes right to getting more people engaged and involved.

clean_body: | Team, Today, = to support all the work Gretchen is doing to make real progress for Michigan and elect candidates nationwide who will fight like hell for working families. 1. Gretchen is delivering results. Since becoming Governor of Michigan, she’s been laser-focused on making this state the best place to live, work, and raise a family. That’s why she’s worked hard to put more money back in the pockets of Michiganders, protect our fundamental freedoms, fix the damn roads, make our communities safer, and so much more. 2. But people across the country are struggling. Costs are still too high. Families are struggling to make ends meet. And too many Republicans across the country aren’t lifting a finger to make your life better. 3. That’s why we need leaders who will fight like hell in Michigan and beyond. Gretchen is determined to take her movement nationwide and elect candidates in all 50 states who will put politics aside and fight for our families, our workers, and our children. 4. We have our work cut out for us. Recent elections in Wisconsin and Florida proved that Democrats are fired up to elect leaders who will fight for us, but Republicans are gearing up to fight back. That’s why we must match their energy and prove to them that this grassroots team has what it takes to get the job done. 5. $5 goes a long way. While many people think that $5 won’t make much of a difference when millions are being spent on elections, here’s the truth: $5 donations from folks like you help us spread Gretchen’s message in Michigan and across the country, reach voters on the ground, and fuel our fight to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Every single dollar donated goes right to getting more people engaged and involved. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you! — Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: John Fetterman
subject: about yesterday's Supreme Court ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1001&akid=10078%2E434096%2Ek9vXUC ]John Fetterman

Hey Derek, it’s John.

The Supreme Court just ruled to allow the Trump administration to enforce their trans military ban.

So let me say one thing: Banning trans Americans from serving in the military is bullsh*t.

This isn't about being “woke.” It’s about being decent. It’s about respecting every person who courageously steps up to serve our country – *including* folks in the LGBTQ+ community.

Our military is stronger when it honors the dignity of all its members.

But Trump doesn’t get that. And now the Supreme Court is enabling him. His ban on trans military service is hateful, dangerous to our national security, and flat-out wrong. So I’m calling him out – he needs to rescind it right away.

👉 I want to show Trump and the Supreme Court that there is overwhelming support across PA and this country for our trans service members. So if you agree, will you add your name to my petition now?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51047?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk98-su-fl&t=1002&akid=10078%2E434096%2Ek9vXUC

These folks are out there risking their lives for *us*. Let’s show them that we have their backs.

Thanks for being in this fight with me.

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1003&akid=10078%2E434096%2Ek9vXUC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=10078%2E434096%2Ek9vXUC

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Never say never, Canada, says President Trump, time will determine if Canada will become the 51st state. President Trump's meeting with newly elected Prime Minister Mark Carney went very well with both parties interested in doing what is right for their people. The Department of Defense got a huge win in the Supreme Court, in order to keep our military focused on readiness and lethality, the military can ban transgender military service members. Congresswoman Beth Van Duyne joins me today as the president's "big, beautiful bill" gets hashed out in Congress. The rubber has met the road when it comes to spending, Conservatives are trying to cut spending to put a dent in our $37 Trillion debt and Democrats are crying foul about Medicaid. President Trump has been very clear there are no cuts to Medicaid, other than removing fraud and abuse. President Trump has urged Congress to get permanent tax cuts as investments in the private sector have surged under the president's leadership. President Trump set his sights on Hollywood and implemented a 100% tariff for films made in foreign countries. Foreign countries that incentivize studios have taken away American jobs and inserted propaganda into their films and President Trump wants American movies made in America.
Featuring:
**Rep. Beth Van Duyne**
U.S. Congresswoman | Texas, District 24
https://vanduyne.house.gov/

clean_body: Watch now (46 mins) | Never say never, Canada, says President Trump, time will determine if Canada will become the 51st state. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | | | | May 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | Never say never, Canada, says President Trump, time will determine if Canada will become the 51st state. President Trump's meeting with newly elected Prime Minister Mark Carney went very well with both parties interested in doing what is right for their people. The Department of Defense got a huge win in the Supreme Court, in order to keep our military focused on readiness and lethality, the military can ban transgender military service members. Congresswoman Beth Van Duyne joins me today as the president's "big, beautiful bill" gets hashed out in Congress. The rubber has met the road when it comes to spending, Conservatives are trying to cut spending to put a dent in our $37 Trillion debt and Democrats are crying foul about Medicaid. President Trump has been very clear there are no cuts to Medicaid, other than removing fraud and abuse. President Trump has urged Congress to get permanent tax cuts as investments in the private sector have surged under the president's leadership. President Trump set his sights on Hollywood and implemented a 100% tariff for films made in foreign countries. Foreign countries that incentivize studios have taken away American jobs and inserted propaganda into their films and President Trump wants American movies made in America. Featuring: Rep. Beth Van Duyne U.S. Congresswoman | Texas, District 24 Today's show is sponsored by: Ramp Want $250?? Is your finance team bogged down with tedious work like tracking down receipts or dealing with invoices? Guess what... Ramp handles everything--receipt matching, categorization, approvals, the works. Ramp has easy-to-use cards, spend limits, approval flows, vendor payments, and more. Ramp makes all your spending smarter with seamless integration! Join Ramp now and get $250 upon sign-up. Just go to Delta Rescue Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Sean Spicer, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Sean Spicer 2308 Mt Vernon Ave, Ste 415, Alexandria, VA 22301 ? ?

**$3.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** This fall, every single seat in the Virginia House is up for grabs – $3 helps win races like these and more. **Reason #2:** Trump and his billionaire allies are hell-bent on using their wealth to cement GOP power in the states. Elon Musk-aligned PACs spent over $25 million in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race, but Democrats secured a victory. **When grassroots supporters chip in $3, it helps our candidates compete.** **Reason #3:** Losing upcoming races will weaken our blue firewall against Trump's draconian agenda. $3 helps defeat extremists itching to roll back rights and restrict our freedoms. name: Justice Democrats
subject: “Thanedar misled colleagues”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Self-funded multimillionaire Rep. Shri Thanedar, who currently represents
Michigan’s 13th District, is misleading colleagues and trying to make
himself look like a real Congressman, but only since working-class
champion Donavan McKinney announced he’s challenging him.

On the same day as Donavan’s campaign launch, Shri announced that he’s
introducing seven articles of impeachment against Donald Trump.

His thinly-veiled, self-interested political stunt backfired and his
colleagues in Congress were furious. Not only did he sign up members of
Congress as co-sponsors without asking, but he even suggested he had the
backing of Democratic Party leadership when he didn’t.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250507-dm?refcode=em20250507-36654&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36654_1203867_HPYnwz&akid=36654%2E1203867%2EHPYnwz ]Tweet by Andrew Solender: Some House Dems are furious and think this is
clearly connected to his contested Dem primary. “This is a self-own,” said
one. Another said it “seems self-serving.” His use of official funds for a
billboard “has everyone upset,” said a senior Dem.

Multiple Democrats who signed onto his rogue impeachment push have since
withdrawn, and one anonymous Democrat told Axios, “It seems self-serving
and not a genuine effort to rein in the president."

To make matters worse, Shri wasted official congressional funds to pay for
billboards in his district promoting his impeachment stunt. We can’t say
we’re surprised: his office was already plagued with accusations of poor
constituent services, and he was even sued for fraud as a businessman.

This man tried to call Donavan — who has served more time in the State
Legislature than Shri did before running for Congress — "inexperienced,”
when his colleagues don't even trust him on something as monumental as
impeachment.

Shri is not a serious Congressman, and the people of MI-13 deserve way
better. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250507-dm?refcode=em20250507-36654&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36654_1203867_HPYnwz&akid=36654%2E1203867%2EHPYnwz ]Help us give them a progressive, working-class leader who will
truly fight for them: split $5 or more to Justice Democrats
and Donavan’s campaign now!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250507-dm?refcode=em20250507-36654&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36654_1203867_HPYnwz&akid=36654%2E1203867%2EHPYnwz ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250507-36654-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36654_1203867_HPYnwz&akid=36654%2E1203867%2EHPYnwz

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36654%2E1203867%2EHPYnwz

Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

In Congress, I knew how important issues like protecting healthcare, lowering prescription prices, and addressing the high cost of living were to Coloradans.
That’s why I took on Big Pharma and special interests, pushed to allow Medicare to negotiate lower prices, and worked to expand the Child Tax Credit to lower taxes for Colorado families.
But since my opponent, Gabe Evans, has taken office, we’ve seen the progress we worked so hard for stripped away. He has ignored Coloradans’ concerns about the impact Trump’s tariffs will have on prices and supported cuts to Medicaid – _just to give a tax break to billionaires._
**Unlike Gabe Evans, I'm running to represent people like you, Peter.[_**That’s why I’m asking you to take my campaign priorities survey and let me know your thoughts as we get further into this campaign. clean_body: Did you see Yadira’s last email, Peter? Yadira has always fought for the issues that matter most to Coloradans. That’s why she took on special interests, fought to lower the cost of healthcare, and advocated for working families in Congress – not billionaires. While her opponent, Gabe Evans, ignores Coloradans’ concerns and skips out on town halls, Yadira’s running to tackle their concerns head-on. As we get further into this campaign, she wants to hear from you, Peter, to ensure she’s prioritizing the issues that matter most in our community. | | Thanks, Team Caraveo \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Yadira Caraveo Date: Fri, May 2, 2025 Hi Peter – With the race to win back Colorado’s 8th District shaping up to be one of the most competitive races in the country next year, I want to hear from supporters like you about what issues that matter most. | In Congress, I knew how important issues like protecting healthcare, lowering prescription prices, and addressing the high cost of living were to Coloradans. That’s why I took on Big Pharma and special interests, pushed to allow Medicare to negotiate lower prices, and worked to expand the Child Tax Credit to lower taxes for Colorado families. But since my opponent, Gabe Evans, has taken office, we’ve seen the progress we worked so hard for stripped away. He has ignored Coloradans’ concerns about the impact Trump’s tariffs will have on prices and supported cuts to Medicaid – just to give a tax break to billionaires. Unlike Gabe Evans, I'm running to represent people like you, Peter. | Your input is critical to ensuring my campaign is working to address the issues that matter most in our community. Thank you, Yadira Caraveo | | | = Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add info@caraveoforcongress.com to your address book. This campaign is powered by grassroots donations. Pediatricians say that childhood vaccines are safe. A heroin-addled
nepo baby with a brain worm says they may not be. For busy voters, it
can be hard to know who to believe.
I lost my job, my wife has been deported, and I'm out of toilet paper.
But at least I know now that my kids will learn that slavery wasn't
really that bad.
### **Cliff 's Note: In Fact, Treasonous Trump Toadies Have Made Us Not Even Good Anymore**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9f7994a9-cebf-47c1-b766-22bc5a4974e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Scott Jennings, CNN's resident MAGA ventriloquist dummy](https://substack.com/redirect/b0a6e557-2858-48b3-b1db-1cfda134ba9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), who looks like he was born in yacht slippers and khakis, recently puffed up his chest on air, **declaring America the greatest country on Earth**. I mean, sure, one can recite a simple GOP slogan, like "I'm a follower of Jesus" or "family values," but that doesn't make it true. In fact, Scotty-boy and his phalanx of lunatic funders, friends and enablers have gutted [the very foundations](https://substack.com/redirect/8fa2e138-ab20-4da7-9cd4-b2630080b523?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of any greatness we've ever had.
Republicans have slashed education funding, leaving schools scrambling and students drowning in debt. They've proposed cutting $880 billion from Medicaid, threatening healthcare for millions ([RFK Jr. takes care of threatening the rest](https://substack.com/redirect/d51e66dc-ad54-4749-aec5-eab71ffa63d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). Environmental protections? Gone, as they roll back regulations and defund agencies tasked with keeping our air and water clean.
So, when longtime McConnell-leg-humper, Jennings, and his irradiated ilk chant "USA! USA!" they're not celebrating American excellence--they wouldn't know what that is if you painted it on their bodies just below their Trump-with-Rocky-musculature tattoos. No, it's a con, sleight of hand, a patriotic smokescreen to hide the fact **their policies have destroyed everything that once made this country great**.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/34cc4602-49bc-4f71-bf5a-a87d46c7916e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**So let me tell you why, in my humble opinion, America once possessed greatness...**

name: Michael Baumgartner
subject: First 100 Days…and there is much to celebrate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www
body:
I get asked a lot about how things are going for me personally in this new job.

| | | | | |
---
| | | | | Friends,The Republicans in Congress hit the ground running – cutting taxes, stopping illegal immigration, blocking fentanyl, and making strong reductions in government spending. The old establishment and far left activists have tried to block us at every turn, but we have not stopped or slowed down.We have not had as audacious a first 100 days since President Franklin D. Roosevelt, battling the Great Depression, entered the White House in 1933.I get asked a lot about how things are going for me personally in this new job. _Well, it has been an absolute honor to represent you and I’m grateful every day for your help getting me to Congress, and for your ongoing support and advice keeping me grounded at home._ I want to share some highlights of the last 100 days and tell you how proud I am to represent Eastern Washington in Congress! But also, my colleagues and I are working very hard every day to turn our country around!
* I was the first freshman member to pass a bill on the House floor. The DETERRENT act stops universities from hiding payments from foreign countries that can influence curriculum and hiring.

* My first visit to the Oval Office was very special. The President and I talked about our mutual friend, former WSU football coach Mike Leach, and he showed me the Declaration of Independence that he displays behind his desk. We have a country to save, and there is no better reminder!

* I have enjoyed the half a dozen town halls, as well as the advisory group roundtables, that I’ve already hosted in Eastern Washington. Some have been combative, but I always want to hear from community members in the district. I work for everyone and the town hall meetings are a great way to hear your ideas!

* It was an honor to host Wilbur Creston High School teacher, Ms. Stacey Nash, who was nominated by her students to join me at the State of the Union address. Her commitment to educating our youth is inspiring!

---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| _Family visit to the White House during Spring Break!_
---
|
---
| _Visit to the beautiful K Diamond K Ranch!_
---
| Let me share with you some additional accomplishments I’m really proud of:
* I visited our military personnel at Fairchild Air Force Base and in Iraq, and I am so appreciative of their work and bravery to keep our country free. I’m also happy to report they are encouraged by the new direction of the country and our efforts in Congress to clear away any hurdles.

* Congressional Republicans have voted to repeal dozens of job-killing federal regulations forced onto businesses by the Biden Administration.

* Meanwhile, and very importantly, we’re working to help people! We worked hard to set up and staff multiple offices so that we can answer mail and help with any problems that you may have. So far, we’ve answered hundreds of letters and thousands of phone calls –and helped return over one hundred thousand dollars to taxpayers.

I love this job!
It is the honor of a lifetime to get on the plane every week to fly to DC and work hard for Eastern Washington. Eleanor and I are very grateful for your support of my efforts in Congress, and your good wishes for our family back at home.
We’ve got work to do - and we’re just getting started!
Sincerely,
---
|
---

clean_body: I get asked a lot about how things are going for me personally in this new job. | | | | | | | | | | | Friends,The Republicans in Congress hit the ground running – cutting taxes, stopping illegal immigration, blocking fentanyl, and making strong reductions in government spending. The old establishment and far left activists have tried to block us at every turn, but we have not stopped or slowed down.We have not had as audacious a first 100 days since President Franklin D. Roosevelt, battling the Great Depression, entered the White House in 1933.I get asked a lot about how things are going for me personally in this new job. Well, it has been an absolute honor to represent you and I’m grateful every day for your help getting me to Congress, and for your ongoing support and advice keeping me grounded at home. I want to share some highlights of the last 100 days and tell you how proud I am to represent Eastern Washington in Congress! But also, my colleagues and I are working very hard every day to turn our country around! I was the first freshman member to pass a bill on the House floor. The DETERRENT act stops universities from hiding payments from foreign countries that can influence curriculum and hiring. My first visit to the Oval Office was very special. The President and I talked about our mutual friend, former WSU football coach Mike Leach, and he showed me the Declaration of Independence that he displays behind his desk. We have a country to save, and there is no better reminder! I have enjoyed the half a dozen town halls, as well as the advisory group roundtables, that I’ve already hosted in Eastern Washington. Some have been combative, but I always want to hear from community members in the district. I work for everyone and the town hall meetings are a great way to hear your ideas! It was an honor to host Wilbur Creston High School teacher, Ms. Stacey Nash, who was nominated by her students to join me at the State of the Union address. Her commitment to educating our youth is inspiring! | | | | | | | | | | | | Family visit to the White House during Spring Break! | | Visit to the beautiful K Diamond K Ranch! | Let me share with you some additional accomplishments I’m really proud of: I visited our military personnel at Fairchild Air Force Base and in Iraq, and I am so appreciative of their work and bravery to keep our country free. I’m also happy to report they are encouraged by the new direction of the country and our efforts in Congress to clear away any hurdles. Congressional Republicans have voted to repeal dozens of job-killing federal regulations forced onto businesses by the Biden Administration. * Meanwhile, and very importantly, we’re working to help people! We worked hard to set up and staff multiple offices so that we can answer mail and help with any problems that you may have. So far, we’ve answered hundreds of letters and thousands of phone calls –and helped return over one hundred thousand dollars to taxpayers. I love this job! It is the honor of a lifetime to get on the plane every week to fly to DC and work hard for Eastern Washington. Eleanor and I are very grateful for your support of my efforts in Congress, and your good wishes for our family back at home. We’ve got work to do - and we’re just getting started! Sincerely, | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Speaking to the WA Federation of Republican Women | | Ferry County Lincoln Day Dinner | | Baumgartner family runs Bloomsday 2025 | | Paid for by Vote Baumgartner for Congress | www.votebaumgartner.com Our mailing address is: Vote Baumgartner for Congress, PO Box 8508, Spokane, WA 99203 | | | | | | | | You can or | |

_Aloha, this is Mazie. Please read this message from my friend John Hickenlooper, who just launched his re-election campaign for the U.S. Senate. I hope you’ll consider helping my colleague John remain in the Senate to keep fighting for all of us._ Hey Peter, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington. **[Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Mazie Hirono to help build this campaign from the ground up?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107279975/544179797/-30801677?amount=&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjg4YjMwYi05MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9u1TJjIWjJ7YyMD5pP5X_BQOWEI8RdCKBIMLEOJUCc=)** | [DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107279977/544179800/-30801677?amount=&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjg4YjMwYi05MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9u1TJjIWjJ7YyMD5pP5X_BQOWEI8RdCKBIMLEOJUCc=)

Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_
**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**
Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107279979/544179802/-30801677?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjg4YjMwYi05MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9u1TJjIWjJ7YyMD5pP5X_BQOWEI8RdCKBIMLEOJUCc=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107279981/544179804/-30801677?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjg4YjMwYi05MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9u1TJjIWjJ7YyMD5pP5X_BQOWEI8RdCKBIMLEOJUCc=)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service — first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.
**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do — and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**
**[That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5 — about the cost of two Wynkoop pints — to help us build a winning campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107279983/544179806/-30801677?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjg4YjMwYi05MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9u1TJjIWjJ7YyMD5pP5X_BQOWEI8RdCKBIMLEOJUCc=)**
[DONATE $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107279984/544179808/-30801677?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjg4YjMwYi05MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9u1TJjIWjJ7YyMD5pP5X_BQOWEI8RdCKBIMLEOJUCc=)

[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107279986/544179809/-30801677?amount=&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250507_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjg4YjMwYi05MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9u1TJjIWjJ7YyMD5pP5X_BQOWEI8RdCKBIMLEOJUCc=)

I know we can win this the Colorado way — by bringing people together and solving problems.
Thanks for being part of the team.
Giddy up,
John

Oklahoma actively discriminates against religion in its charter-school program.Â

St. Isidore of Seville Catholic Virtual School wants to be part of Oklahomaâs charter-school program, and theyâre just as qualified as any non-religious charter school.Â

But because St. Isidore is religious, Oklahomaâs Attorney General sued to force the Board to cancel St. Isidoreâs contract after the Board accepted its application. And the Oklahoma Supreme Court sided with the Attorney General.

Thatâs why weâre proud to defend the Board all the way to the Supreme Court.Â

Weâll argue Oklahoma Statewide Charter School Board v. Drummond this spring.Â

Weâre standing up to religious discrimination in Oklahoma to protect religious freedom in states across the country.

And weâd love for you to join us.

name: Response needed (Team Murray)
subject: the lowest approval rating in 80 years
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Trump's first 100 days have been just as bad as he promised.
| | |
---
**Last week marked the 100th day of Donald Trump's second term.**
And given the harm he's inflicted on working families, our economy, and the rule of law itself, it's no wonder that his approval rating is UNDERWATER with Americans across the political spectrum – including a growing number of his own voters.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107280111/544180172/325315313?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk498-su-nd&refcode=jtk498-su-nd&recurring=0&sustainers=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTFlOTNkMC05MjJiLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nQ8yGYDoJyMLLpVBNnC-6LQvb7UV3_ycdUTsiM-l6pc=&emci=528b4b1a-992a-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5a1e93d0-922b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=13116610)

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: Our message to Republicans: It’s either your vote or your job.
body:
---
Derek, Every single day, I’m hearing from people like you who are enraged by Donald Trump. Rightfully so. I am too. Donald Trump has driven our country off the cliff. He's personally igniting crisis after crisis, and the cowards he surrounds himself with are only enabling him. Just over 100 days into his presidency, Republicans in Congress have proven they won’t stand up to Trump — or stand up for Americans. In fact, they’re putting health care on the chopping block for 80 million Americans just to give a tax handout to Trump’s billionaire friends. **We can’t just sit by and watch it happen. We’re organizing. We’re fighting back.** We’ve just launched our “Fight to Save Medicaid” month of action to put vulnerable House Republicans on notice in case they think they can get away with ripping health care away from their own constituents. Specifically, we’re targeting four vulnerable Republicans — Tom Barrett (MI-07), Don Bacon (NE-02), Mike Lawler (NY-17), and Brian Fitzpatrick (PA-01). These Republicans need to understand something: the price for this vote is their job. And we’re going to deliver that message loud and clear: in town halls, by urging voters to contact their representatives, and through constant pressure and accountability. Our representatives must serve the people — not ignore them — and certainly not harm them. Republicans will either learn that lesson now or at the ballot box. I’ll leave you with a few other updates on Democrats’ work:
* Over the last few months, we’ve told you about the lawsuits we’ve filed against Trump. We recently got a big win, as a U.S. District Court judge blocked key parts of Trump’s illegal executive order that attempts to undermine our elections. **Without this decision, many Americans across the country — including married women who changed their last name — could have been unable to register to vote.**
* We recently announced a $1 million monthly investment in our state parties — an investment unlike anything Democrats have done in modern times. **Elections are won in states and that’s exactly where we’ll be investing our resources.**

Our work isn’t just about organizing to fight back against Trump. It’s about organizing to make people’s lives better. Thanks to supporters like you, that’s exactly what we’re doing. Thank you, and I’ll have more to share soon. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250507_3366_fr&refcode2=3366_22930333_6p2sW7&akid=3366%2E22930333%2E6p2sW7)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Co-Pilot – We’ve seen so much happen since John James announced his campaign for Governor. Michiganders have seen exactly what happens when strong leadership and purpose meets action. From massive national security wins to support from BIG NAMES in the America First movement, the momentum behind John’s campaign is growing stronger every day. We wanted to make sure you were looped in. Here are some of the highlights:
---
|
---
_**MISSION ACCOMPLISHED: FIGHTER JETS COMING TO SELFRIDGE**_ Through the leadership of President Trump and John’s tireless work in Congress – Selfridge Air National Guard Base is receiving **a new fighter jet squadron**. **_"President Trump and I are getting done in 100 days what the previous administration and state leaders couldn’t accomplish in four years." – John James_**** _ _** This is what conservative leadership looks like—RESULTS, not broken promises. **Read more in[The Detroit News](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=9ed8efd9d7754d1d89e6ee2e63486427&_e=UyN8596NSciMvdM0gW61Jqr7xbF9Cv8UNBTp7PGhGXPiPMLmVvVz6BQsqHnni29bEXeHKwwkUGLbNUg5E-0VlmA-Yeje-LNYwtWyG2JhkxElND3LLcEW4gWrsTwi8YoZhnIBcYyc1pfeGp94aYTKyxNcQBy6_fpo0Qh5AVqlFFN-nsMZ6Mubuuy0h3AyVFn3mzbYkeL3vN3-ku4-_9F_-VXenJxGv1nV8VqP-oTDytFZdn4IFtDBrND0mcvTa52WTjv0fwvqW_gNB3opoTVWOLNipQulb7uJyChIqaiq7R9ixPtXLz8MiapGdrKFdPrjB1w4L5CsyMYGLp-2IPgwr-Cm_KhktRP1-QJrQ45sHlKWhvvWMDKyo_XS71FQH7K2cXY9Mb0qEXqQGYXySqSs6WJRMr8dVqQqbMUeW7LYwP8-4IOILMXgSdy6aRDBbbTWf2Jtcyshs6Upyr3NpsgowZjFV4NCIPx8dxG6Rs5Kfo54MDotiWJDwV4NnIs0WTBrhdP1tAJw1EU_7LOKMr63exAxlL-yVsEo0wZ1-vQUlbHEUmVEA_VNdGuDGfhJajT52_JFEVA7jL-iP44rHlhsOB9yTzdCKUs65YRDQSwMUnAVp5gHbRB4ejriFc3YkeKLdDxOmZ3JhpDOgsF1cQgQcyIDfV6T1_RpNkQUU8l9oyNAxyWJgsHqDFi-tJBdRwYFIAkFN-kdQCJ24ZMIvav1g-paqrTt8N5st71ocphf0W0%3D).**

[](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=9ed8efd9d7754d1d89e6ee2e63486427&_e=UyN8596NSciMvdM0gW61Jp9U8cJbjt3lS47EBy1cAj0-ytg3mfBO1i5wEq-HgnituTZayDmFs7KL3m7ItBTRd1xR3f52SRydc6pj5mA-aGhHqIWwpSCTmzYDzIPrEUVMUObP23srm4iZ4_cX4Bpo1Pd0Vj18ruXJUdZXJ11Y5nYqqRtClR7g4U24Me-mb8N5yzOlsZToKoBYvk68ZxWpl3IaCjqRZ1v6VlSEzonr_ZngWXONOdfCA8SEWo0UJefr_zgi2qnCDM4mFx1Q9S3QyYEYyDn6g2n_x5C84rXmGBURg2ftfu_VRNlh-nzEsgUkHvTeHMK-5CXQVa87ZwPiR9eq0in2ODMlAFiT4caSwIY_PUlpWQFBB3X1RypK7jKvVFqfkbptCiL_iEDoxFyzSA%3D%3D)

name: Mohan Seshadri
subject: 🚨 Endorsement Alert: Candidates Who Will Show Up For Our Communities
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org/ [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/]
Hi Peter,
As the first and only statewide Asian American Advocacy organization in Pennsylvania, we are thrilled to share our latest slate of exceptional candidates endorsed by our members. These candidates have demonstrated a deep commitment to serving our Asian American communities and advancing policies that will benefit ALL Pennsylvanians.
These latest endorsements reflect our members’ dedication to building strong statewide power and to support candidates who genuinely address the needs and issues critical to our communities. Want to help strengthen our impact and reach? Invest in Asian American power by donating today! [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=20.00&contactdata=dLL40byaAZkSSM6LMkXkOqHdmacRfJnpfvOhOI8EgGVoH3GgAoSqtLcp1brWrk+ZBPR4MlMeFS2s0hgUte0CqFiAeSLGV9DtoIy6ta45XcoODL8pwdJqjLT9K0HTYX8Uq9DG43h75vdlSXAFKzK2KodmKoihyrlrH2MYz6QPXyg=]
Donate [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=20.00&contactdata=dLL40byaAZkSSM6LMkXkOqHdmacRfJnpfvOhOI8EgGVoH3GgAoSqtLcp1brWrk+ZBPR4MlMeFS2s0hgUte0CqFiAeSLGV9DtoIy6ta45XcoODL8pwdJqjLT9K0HTYX8Uq9DG43h75vdlSXAFKzK2KodmKoihyrlrH2MYz6QPXyg=]
We proudly endorse:
* Larry Krasner for Philadelphia District Attorney
* Sherrie Cohen for Philadelphia Municipal Court Judge
* Ed Gainey for Pittsburgh Mayor
* Cindy Lam for Manaheim Township School Board of Directors
* Nalini Krishnankutty for State College Borough Council
* Gopal Balachandran for State College Borough Council
* Taiba Sultana for Easton City Council
* Nadeem Qayyam for Northampton County Commissioner
* Emily Singh for Luzerne County Council
* Uday Palled for Franklin Park Borough Council
* Sangeetha Patel for Chester Heights Borough Council
* Tung-To Lam for Palmer Township Supervisor
These candidates have the vision, leadership, and dedication needed to effectively represent Pennsylvania's diverse voices. Their commitment to equity, justice, and community empowerment aligns with our communities’ values, and we are proud to stand with them in this election.
Your donations help elect candidates who will fight for our communities at every level of government!
Donate [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=20.00&contactdata=dLL40byaAZkSSM6LMkXkOqHdmacRfJnpfvOhOI8EgGVoH3GgAoSqtLcp1brWrk+ZBPR4MlMeFS2s0hgUte0CqFiAeSLGV9DtoIy6ta45XcoODL8pwdJqjLT9K0HTYX8Uq9DG43h75vdlSXAFKzK2KodmKoihyrlrH2MYz6QPXyg=]
Mohan Seshadri
Executive Director
Asian Pacific Islander Political Alliance

**CNN REPORTS: 'I don't know': Trump says when asked if he needs to uphold the Constitution** This weekend, in an interview with CNN, Donald Trump said he “didn’t know” if he would uphold the Constitution. name: Rob Bonta
subject: NEW: My latest lawsuit against Donald Trump →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
I just filed my 19th lawsuit against President Trump’s administration.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250507&t=1&akid=1776%2E1088799%2E2X6cj1)
I have news for you: **I just filed my 19th lawsuit against the Trump administration for illegally withholding billions in federal funding for electric vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure.**
President Trump directed his Federal Highway Administration to thwart the $5 billion National Electric Vehicle Infrastructure (NEVI) program, which was already appropriated and approved by bipartisan majorities in Congress.
This program was designed to expand EV charging infrastructure nationwide, and as a result, it would reduce planet-warming pollution, expand access to clean vehicles, and create thousands of green jobs.
But the President continues his unconstitutional attempts to withhold funding from programs he doesn’t like. This time, he’s illegally stripping away billions of dollars for EV charging infrastructure, all to line the pockets of his Big Oil friends.
If he’s allowed to get away with this, Trump would _cost California more than $300 million, eliminate thousands of good-paying jobs, and dismantle a critical, emerging tech industry._
**The Trump administration must make a U-turn and release these funds ASAP.**
**[California will not back down to Trump and Big Oil. If I have your support, can you chip in $5 to our campaign so I can focus on this fight for a more sustainable, low-emissions future?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250507?refcode=em20250507-1776&amount=5&refcode2=1776_1088799_2X6cj1&akid=1776%2E1088799%2E2X6cj1)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250507?refcode=em20250507-1776&amount=5&refcode2=1776_1088799_2X6cj1&akid=1776%2E1088799%2E2X6cj1)**
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250507&t=3&refcode2=1776_1088799_2X6cj1&akid=1776%2E1088799%2E2X6cj1)**
